authors_text: Yuanpeng Tu
title: Domain Camera Adaptation and Collaborative Multiple Feature Clustering for Unsupervised Person Re-ID
title_zh: 用于无人监督行人重新识别的域摄像机自适应和协作多特征聚类
abstract: Recently unsupervised person re-identification (re-ID) has drawn much attention due to its open-world scenario settings where limited annotated data is available. Existing supervised methods often fail to generalize well on unseen domains, while the unsupervised methods, mostly lack multi-granularity information and are prone to suffer from confirmation bias. In this paper, we aim at finding better feature representations on the unseen target domain from two aspects, 1) performing unsupervised domain adaptation on the labeled source domain and 2) mining potential similarities on the unlabeled target domain. Besides, a collaborative pseudo re-labeling strategy is proposed to alleviate the influence of confirmation bias. Firstly, a generative adversarial network is utilized to transfer images from the source domain to the target domain. Moreover, person identity preserving and identity mapping losses are introduced to improve the quality of generated images. Secondly, we propose a novel collaborative multiple feature clustering framework (CMFC) to learn the internal data structure of target domain, including global feature and partial feature branches. The global feature branch (GB) employs unsupervised clustering on the global feature of person images while the Partial feature branch (PB) mines similarities within different body regions. Finally, extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets show the competitive performance of our method under unsupervised person re-ID settings.
summary: Recently unsupervised person re-identification (re-ID) has drawn much attention due to its open-world scenario settings where limited annotated data is available. Existing supervised methods often fail to generalize well on unseen domains, while the unsupervised methods, mostly lack multi-granularity information and are prone to suffer from confirmation bias. In this paper, we aim at finding better feature representations on the unseen target domain from two aspects, 1) performing unsupervised domain adaptation on the labeled source domain and 2) mining potential similarities on the unlabeled target domain. Besides, a collaborative pseudo re-labeling strategy is proposed to alleviate the influence of confirmation bias. Firstly, a generative adversarial network is utilized to transfer images from the source domain to the target domain. Moreover, person identity preserving and identity mapping losses are introduced to improve the quality of generated images. Secondly, we propose a novel collaborative multiple feature clustering framework (CMFC) to learn the internal data structure of target domain, including global feature and partial feature branches. The global feature branch (GB) employs unsupervised clustering on the global feature of person images while the Partial feature branch (PB) mines similarities within different body regions. Finally, extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets show the competitive performance of our method under unsupervised person re-ID settings.
abstract_zh: 最近，无监督人员重新识别（re-ID）由于其开放世界的场景设置而备受关注，其中可用的注释数据有限。现有的监督方法往往无法很好地概括未知领域，而无监督方法大多缺乏多粒度信息，并且容易出现确认偏差。在本文中，我们的目标是从两个方面在不可见的目标域上找到更好的特征表示，1）在标记的源域上执行无监督域适应，2）在未标记的目标域上挖掘潜在的相似性。此外，提出了一种协作伪重标记策略来减轻确认偏差的影响。首先，利用生成对抗网络将图像从源域传输到目标域。此外，引入人员身份保留和身份映射损失来提高生成图像的质量。其次，我们提出了一种新颖的协作多特征聚类框架（CMFC）来学习目标域的内部数据结构，包括全局特征和部分特征分支。全局特征分支（GB）对人物图像的全局特征采用无监督聚类，而部分特征分支（PB）则挖掘不同身体区域内的相似性。最后，对两个基准数据集的广泛实验显示了我们的方法在无监督人员重识别设置下的竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合领域自适应与协作多特征聚类的无监督行人重识别方法，旨在解决目标领域特征表示不足及确认偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有监督方法在未见领域泛化能力差，无监督方法缺乏多粒度信息且易受确认偏差影响，需提升目标领域特征表示并缓解偏差。
AI.method: 采用生成对抗网络实现源领域到目标领域的图像迁移，并引入身份保持损失；设计协作多特征聚类框架（CMFC），包含全局特征分支和局部特征分支以挖掘跨区域相似性。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法在无监督行人重识别任务中表现优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过领域自适应与多特征协作聚类的结合，有效提升了无监督行人重识别的性能并缓解了确认偏差问题。

authors_text: Boyan Jiang,Xinlin Ren,Mingsong Dou,Xiangyang Xue,Yanwei Fu,Yinda Zhang
title: LoRD: Local 4D Implicit Representation for High-Fidelity Dynamic Human Modeling
title_zh: LoRD：高保真动态人体建模的局部 4D 隐式表示
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2022. Project page: https://boyanjiang.github.io/LoRD/
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2022. Project page: https://boyanjiang.github.io/LoRD/
abstract: Recent progress in 4D implicit representation focuses on globally controlling the shape and motion with low dimensional latent vectors, which is prone to missing surface details and accumulating tracking error. While many deep local representations have shown promising results for 3D shape modeling, their 4D counterpart does not exist yet. In this paper, we fill this blank by proposing a novel Local 4D implicit Representation for Dynamic clothed human, named LoRD, which has the merits of both 4D human modeling and local representation, and enables high-fidelity reconstruction with detailed surface deformations, such as clothing wrinkles. Particularly, our key insight is to encourage the network to learn the latent codes of local part-level representation, capable of explaining the local geometry and temporal deformations. To make the inference at test-time, we first estimate the inner body skeleton motion to track local parts at each time step, and then optimize the latent codes for each part via auto-decoding based on different types of observed data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method has strong capability for representing 4D human, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods on practical applications, including 4D reconstruction from sparse points, non-rigid depth fusion, both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: Recent progress in 4D implicit representation focuses on globally controlling the shape and motion with low dimensional latent vectors, which is prone to missing surface details and accumulating tracking error. While many deep local representations have shown promising results for 3D shape modeling, their 4D counterpart does not exist yet. In this paper, we fill this blank by proposing a novel Local 4D implicit Representation for Dynamic clothed human, named LoRD, which has the merits of both 4D human modeling and local representation, and enables high-fidelity reconstruction with detailed surface deformations, such as clothing wrinkles. Particularly, our key insight is to encourage the network to learn the latent codes of local part-level representation, capable of explaining the local geometry and temporal deformations. To make the inference at test-time, we first estimate the inner body skeleton motion to track local parts at each time step, and then optimize the latent codes for each part via auto-decoding based on different types of observed data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method has strong capability for representing 4D human, and outperforms state-of-the-art methods on practical applications, including 4D reconstruction from sparse points, non-rigid depth fusion, both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 4D 隐式表示的最新进展侧重于使用低维潜在向量全局控制形状和运动，这很容易丢失表面细节并累积跟踪误差。虽然许多深层局部表示在 3D 形状建模方面显示出了有希望的结果，但其 4D 对应物尚不存在。在本文中，我们通过提出一种新颖的动态服装人体局部 4D 隐式表示（LoRD）来填补这一空白，它兼具 4D 人体建模和局部表示的优点，并且能够实现具有详细表面变形（例如衣服皱纹）的高保真重建。特别是，我们的主要见解是鼓励网络学习局部部分级表示的潜在代码，能够解释局部几何形状和时间变形。为了在测试时进行推理，我们首先估计内部身体骨骼运动以在每个时间步跟踪局部部位，然后根据不同类型的观察数据通过自动解码来优化每个部位的潜在代码。大量实验表明，所提出的方法具有很强的表示 4D 人体的能力，并且在实际应用中优于最先进的方法，包括稀疏点的 4D 重建、非刚性深度融合，无论是定性还是定量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LoRD的局部4D隐式表示方法，用于高保真动态着装人体建模，解决现有方法在细节保留和跟踪误差方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有4D隐式表示方法依赖全局低维潜在向量控制，导致表面细节丢失和跟踪误差累积；局部表示方法尚未扩展到4D动态人体建模领域。
AI.method: 通过学习局部部件级潜在代码解释几何与时间变形，结合骨骼运动估计与基于观测数据的自解码优化，实现高保真动态重建。
AI.result: 在稀疏点云重建、非刚性深度融合等任务中，LoRD在定性和定量指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: LoRD有效结合局部表示与4D建模优势，为动态人体高保真重建提供了新方案，在多个实际应用中表现优异。

search_text: LoRD: Local 4D Implicit Representation for High-Fidelity Dynamic Human Modeling LoRD：高保真动态人体建模的局部 4D 隐式表示 Recent progress in 4D implicit representation focuses on globally controlling the shape and motion with low dimensional latent vectors, which is prone to missing surface details and accumulating tracking error. While many deep local representations have shown promising results for 3D shape modeling, their 4D counterpart does not exist yet. In this paper, we fill this blank by proposing a novel Local 4D implicit Representation for Dynamic clothed human, named LoRD, which has the merits of both 4D human modeling and local representation, and enables high-fidelity reconstruction with detailed surface deformations, such as clothing wrinkles. Particularly, our key insight is to encourage the network to learn the latent codes of local part-level representation, capable of explaining the local geometry and temporal deformations. To make the inference at test-time, we first estimate the inner body skeleton motion to track local parts at each time step, and then optimize the latent codes for each part via auto-decoding based on different types of observed data. authors_text: Yu-Huan Wu,Da Zhang,Le Zhang,Xin Zhan,Dengxin Dai,Yun Liu,Ming-Ming Cheng
title: Ret3D: Rethinking Object Relations for Efficient 3D Object Detection in Driving Scenes
title_zh: Ret3D：重新思考驾驶场景中高效 3D 对象检测的对象关系
abstract: Current efficient LiDAR-based detection frameworks are lacking in exploiting object relations, which naturally present in both spatial and temporal manners. To this end, we introduce a simple, efficient, and effective two-stage detector, termed as Ret3D. At the core of Ret3D is the utilization of novel intra-frame and inter-frame relation modules to capture the spatial and temporal relations accordingly. More Specifically, intra-frame relation module (IntraRM) encapsulates the intra-frame objects into a sparse graph and thus allows us to refine the object features through efficient message passing. On the other hand, inter-frame relation module (InterRM) densely connects each object in its corresponding tracked sequences dynamically, and leverages such temporal information to further enhance its representations efficiently through a lightweight transformer network. We instantiate our novel designs of IntraRM and InterRM with general center-based or anchor-based detectors and evaluate them on Waymo Open Dataset (WOD). With negligible extra overhead, Ret3D achieves the state-of-the-art performance, being 5.5% and 3.2% higher than the recent competitor in terms of the LEVEL 1 and LEVEL 2 mAPH metrics on vehicle detection, respectively.
summary: Current efficient LiDAR-based detection frameworks are lacking in exploiting object relations, which naturally present in both spatial and temporal manners. To this end, we introduce a simple, efficient, and effective two-stage detector, termed as Ret3D. At the core of Ret3D is the utilization of novel intra-frame and inter-frame relation modules to capture the spatial and temporal relations accordingly. More Specifically, intra-frame relation module (IntraRM) encapsulates the intra-frame objects into a sparse graph and thus allows us to refine the object features through efficient message passing. On the other hand, inter-frame relation module (InterRM) densely connects each object in its corresponding tracked sequences dynamically, and leverages such temporal information to further enhance its representations efficiently through a lightweight transformer network. We instantiate our novel designs of IntraRM and InterRM with general center-based or anchor-based detectors and evaluate them on Waymo Open Dataset (WOD). With negligible extra overhead, Ret3D achieves the state-of-the-art performance, being 5.5% and 3.2% higher than the recent competitor in terms of the LEVEL 1 and LEVEL 2 mAPH metrics on vehicle detection, respectively.
abstract_zh: 当前基于激光雷达的高效检测框架缺乏对自然以空间和时间方式呈现的对象关系的利用。为此，我们引入了一种简单、高效且有效的两级检测器，称为 Ret3D。 Ret3D的核心是利用新颖的帧内和帧间关系模块来捕获相应的空间和时间关系。更具体地说，帧内关系模块（IntraRM）将帧内对象封装成稀疏图，从而允许我们通过有效的消息传递来细化对象特征。另一方面，帧间关系模块（InterRM）动态地密集连接其相应跟踪序列中的每个对象，并利用此类时间信息通过轻量级变压器网络进一步有效地增强其表示。我们使用基于中心或基于锚的检测器实例化了 IntraRM 和 InterRM 的新颖设计，并在 Waymo 开放数据集 (WOD) 上对其进行评估。在额外开销可以忽略不计的情况下，Ret3D 实现了最先进的性能，在车辆检测的 LEVEL 1 和 LEVEL 2 mAPH 指标方面分别比最近的竞争对手高出 5.5% 和 3.2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Ret3D，一种利用物体间空间和时间关系的高效3D目标检测框架，专门用于驾驶场景。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LiDAR的高效检测方法未能有效利用目标间自然存在的时空关系，导致检测性能受限。
AI.method: 设计两阶段检测器Ret3D，包含帧内关系模块（IntraRM）和帧间关系模块（InterRM），分别通过稀疏图消息传递和轻量级Transformer网络捕捉时空关系。
AI.result: 在Waymo数据集上，Ret3D在车辆检测的LEVEL 1和LEVEL 2 mAPH指标上分别超越最新方法5.5%和3.2%，且计算开销极小。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模时空物体关系，Ret3D在保持效率的同时实现了领先的3D目标检测性能。

search_text: Ret3D: Rethinking Object Relations for Efficient 3D Object Detection in Driving Scenes Ret3D：重新思考驾驶场景中高效 3D 对象检测的对象关系 Current efficient LiDAR-based detection frameworks are lacking in exploiting object relations, which naturally present in both spatial and temporal manners. To this end, we introduce a simple, efficient, and effective two-stage detector, termed as Ret3D. At the core of Ret3D is the utilization of novel intra-frame and inter-frame relation modules to capture the spatial and temporal relations accordingly. More Specifically, intra-frame relation module (IntraRM) encapsulates the intra-frame objects into a sparse graph and thus allows us to refine the object features through efficient message passing. On the other hand, inter-frame relation module (InterRM) densely connects each object in its corresponding tracked sequences dynamically, and leverages such temporal information to further enhance its representations efficiently through a lightweight transformer network. We instantiate our novel designs of IntraRM and InterRM with general center-based or anchor-based detectors and evaluate them on Waymo Open Dataset (WOD). With negligible extra overhead, Ret3D achieves the state-of-the-art performance, being 5.5% and 3.2% higher than the recent competitor in terms of the LEVEL 1 and LEVEL 2 mAPH metrics on vehicle detection, respectively. 当前基于激光雷达的高效检测框架缺乏对自然以空间和时间方式呈现的对象关系的利用。为此，我们引入了一种简单、高效且有效的两级检测器，称为 Ret3D。 Ret3D的核心是利用新颖的帧内和帧间关系模块来捕获相应的空间和时间关系。更具体地说，帧内关系模块（IntraRM）将帧内对象封装成稀疏图，从而允许我们通过有效的消息传递来细化对象特征。另一方面，帧间关系模块（InterRM）动态地密集连接其相应跟踪序列中的每个对象，并利用此类时间信息通过轻量级变压器网络进一步有效地增强其表示。我们使用基于中心或基于锚的检测器实例化了 IntraRM 和 InterRM 的新颖设计，并在 Waymo 开放数据集 (WOD) 上对其进行评估。在额外开销可以忽略不计的情况下，Ret3D 实现了最先进的性能，在车辆检测的 LEVEL 1 和 LEVEL 2 mAPH 指标方面分别比最近的竞争对手高出 5.5% 和 3.2%。 本文提出Ret3D，一种利用物体间空间和时间关系的高效3D目标检测框架，专门用于驾驶场景。 Yu-Huan Wu,Da Zhang,Le Zhang,Xin Zhan,Dengxin Dai,Yun Liu,Ming-Ming Cheng cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yanli Liu,Jiming Zhao,Chu-Min Li,Hua Jiang,Kun He
title: Hybrid Learning with New Value Function for the Maximum Common Subgraph Problem
title_zh: 最大公共子图问题的新价值函数的混合学习
abstract: Maximum Common induced Subgraph (MCS) is an important NP-hard problem with wide real-world applications. Branch-and-Bound (BnB) is the basis of a class of efficient algorithms for MCS, consisting in successively selecting vertices to match and pruning when it is discovered that a solution better than the best solution found so far does not exist. The method of selecting the vertices to match is essential for the performance of BnB. In this paper, we propose a new value function and a hybrid selection strategy used in reinforcement learning to define a new vertex selection method, and propose a new BnB algorithm, called McSplitDAL, for MCS. Extensive experiments show that McSplitDAL significantly improves the current best BnB algorithms, McSplit+LL and McSplit+RL. An empirical analysis is also performed to illustrate why the new value function and the hybrid selection strategy are effective.
summary: Maximum Common induced Subgraph (MCS) is an important NP-hard problem with wide real-world applications. Branch-and-Bound (BnB) is the basis of a class of efficient algorithms for MCS, consisting in successively selecting vertices to match and pruning when it is discovered that a solution better than the best solution found so far does not exist. The method of selecting the vertices to match is essential for the performance of BnB. In this paper, we propose a new value function and a hybrid selection strategy used in reinforcement learning to define a new vertex selection method, and propose a new BnB algorithm, called McSplitDAL, for MCS. Extensive experiments show that McSplitDAL significantly improves the current best BnB algorithms, McSplit+LL and McSplit+RL. An empirical analysis is also performed to illustrate why the new value function and the hybrid selection strategy are effective.
abstract_zh: 最大公共诱导子图（MCS）是一个重要的 NP 难题，具有广泛的实际应用。分支定界 (BnB) 是一类有效 MCS 算法的基础，包括在发现不存在比迄今为止找到的最佳解决方案更好的解决方案时连续选择顶点进行匹配和剪枝。选择要匹配的顶点的方法对于 BnB 的性能至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的价值函数和一种用于强化学习的混合选择策略，以定义一种新的顶点选择方法，并针对 MCS 提出了一种新的 BnB 算法，称为 McSplitDAL。大量实验表明，McSplitDAL 显着改进了当前最好的 BnB 算法 McSplit+LL 和 McSplit+RL。还进行了实证分析来说明为什么新的价值函数和混合选择策略是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合新价值函数和混合选择策略的BnB算法McSplitDAL，用于解决最大公共子图（MCS）问题。
AI.motivation: 现有BnB算法在顶点选择策略上存在性能瓶颈，需改进价值函数和选择机制以提升求解效率。
AI.method: 设计新型价值函数并融合强化学习的混合选择策略，构建顶点匹配方法，开发McSplitDAL算法框架。
AI.result: 实验表明McSplitDAL显著优于现有最佳算法McSplit+LL和McSplit+RL，且通过分析验证了新方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 新价值函数与混合策略有效提升算法性能，为MCS问题提供更优解决方案。

authors_text: Siyu Li,Milos Zefran,Igor Paprotny
title: Group-based control of large-scale micro-robot swarms with on-board Physical Finite-State Machines
title_zh: 具有机载物理有限状态机的大规模微型机器人群的基于群体的控制
abstract: An important problem in microrobotics is how to control a large group of microrobots with a global control signal. This paper focuses on controlling a large-scale swarm of MicroStressBots with on-board physical finite-state machines. We introduce the concept of group-based control, which makes it possible to scale up the swarm size while reducing the complexity both of robot fabrication as well as swarm control. We prove that the group-based control system is locally accessible in terms of the robot positions. We further hypothesize based on extensive simulations that the system is globally controllable. A nonlinear optimization strategy is proposed to control the swarm by minimizing control effort. We also propose a probabilistically complete collision avoidance method that is suitable for online use. The paper concludes with an evaluation of the proposed methods in simulations.
summary: An important problem in microrobotics is how to control a large group of microrobots with a global control signal. This paper focuses on controlling a large-scale swarm of MicroStressBots with on-board physical finite-state machines. We introduce the concept of group-based control, which makes it possible to scale up the swarm size while reducing the complexity both of robot fabrication as well as swarm control. We prove that the group-based control system is locally accessible in terms of the robot positions. We further hypothesize based on extensive simulations that the system is globally controllable. A nonlinear optimization strategy is proposed to control the swarm by minimizing control effort. We also propose a probabilistically complete collision avoidance method that is suitable for online use. The paper concludes with an evaluation of the proposed methods in simulations.
abstract_zh: 微型机器人技术的一个重要问题是如何用全局控制信号控制一大群微型机器人。本文重点讨论使用机载物理有限状态机控制大规模 MicroStressBot 群。我们引入了基于群体的控制的概念，这使得扩大群体规模成为可能，同时降低机器人制造和群体控制的复杂性。我们证明基于组的控制系统在机器人位置方面是可以本地访问的。基于广泛的模拟，我们进一步假设该系统是全局可控的。提出了一种非线性优化策略，通过最小化控制工作来控制群体。我们还提出了一种适合在线使用的概率完整的碰撞避免方法。本文最后对所提出的模拟方法进行了评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于群体的控制方法，利用机载物理有限状态机实现大规模微机器人集群的高效控制。
AI.motivation: 传统微机器人集群控制面临规模化复杂度高、控制信号难以全局协调的问题，亟需简化控制策略与制造复杂度的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计群体控制框架结合物理有限状态机，通过局部可访问性证明与非线性优化策略降低控制复杂度，并提出在线碰撞避免算法。
AI.result: 仿真验证了群体控制系统的局部可访问性，假设其全局可控性，且碰撞避免方法有效提升了集群运动安全性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大规模微机器人集群控制提供了可扩展的框架，平衡了系统复杂度与控制效率，具有实际应用潜力。

A nonlinear optimization strategy is proposed to control the swarm by minimizing control effort. We also propose a probabilistically complete collision avoidance method that is suitable for online use. The paper concludes with an evaluation of the proposed methods in simulations. 微型机器人技术的一个重要问题是如何用全局控制信号控制一大群微型机器人。本文重点讨论使用机载物理有限状态机控制大规模 MicroStressBot 群。我们引入了基于群体的控制的概念，这使得扩大群体规模成为可能，同时降低机器人制造和群体控制的复杂性。我们证明基于组的控制系统在机器人位置方面是可以本地访问的。基于广泛的模拟，我们进一步假设该系统是全局可控的。提出了一种非线性优化策略，通过最小化控制工作来控制群体。我们还提出了一种适合在线使用的概率完整的碰撞避免方法。本文最后对所提出的模拟方法进行了评估。 本文提出一种基于群体的控制方法，利用机载物理有限状态机实现大规模微机器人集群的高效控制。 Siyu Li,Milos Zefran,Igor Paprotny cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Yuya Maruyama,Hiroshi Fukui,Tsubasa Hirakawa,Takayoshi Yamashita,Hironobu Fujiyoshi,Komei Sugiura
title: Visual Explanation of Deep Q-Network for Robot Navigation by Fine-tuning Attention Branch
title_zh: 通过微调注意力分支对机器人导航深度 Q 网络进行可视化解释
abstract: Robot navigation with deep reinforcement learning (RL) achieves higher performance and performs well under complex environment. Meanwhile, the interpretation of the decision-making of deep RL models becomes a critical problem for more safety and reliability of autonomous robots. In this paper, we propose a visual explanation method based on an attention branch for deep RL models. We connect attention branch with pre-trained deep RL model and the attention branch is trained by using the selected action by the trained deep RL model as a correct label in a supervised learning manner. Because the attention branch is trained to output the same result as the deep RL model, the obtained attention maps are corresponding to the agent action with higher interpretability. Experimental results with robot navigation task show that the proposed method can generate interpretable attention maps for a visual explanation.
summary: Robot navigation with deep reinforcement learning (RL) achieves higher performance and performs well under complex environment. Meanwhile, the interpretation of the decision-making of deep RL models becomes a critical problem for more safety and reliability of autonomous robots. In this paper, we propose a visual explanation method based on an attention branch for deep RL models. We connect attention branch with pre-trained deep RL model and the attention branch is trained by using the selected action by the trained deep RL model as a correct label in a supervised learning manner. Because the attention branch is trained to output the same result as the deep RL model, the obtained attention maps are corresponding to the agent action with higher interpretability. Experimental results with robot navigation task show that the proposed method can generate interpretable attention maps for a visual explanation.
abstract_zh: 采用深度强化学习（RL）的机器人导航实现了更高的性能，并且在复杂环境下表现良好。同时，深度强化学习模型决策的解释成为提高自主机器人安全性和可靠性的关键问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于深度 RL 模型注意力分支的视觉解释方法。我们将注意力分支与预训练的深度 RL 模型连接起来，并通过使用经过训练的深度 RL 模型选择的动作作为监督学习方式的正确标签来训练注意力分支。由于注意力分支被训练为输出与深度强化学习模型相同的结果，因此获得的注意力图对应于具有更高可解释性的代理动作。机器人导航任务的实验结果表明，所提出的方法可以生成可解释的注意力图以进行视觉解释。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于注意力分支的可视化解释方法，用于深度强化学习中的机器人导航决策解释。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习在复杂环境中的机器人导航性能优异，但模型决策的可解释性不足，影响系统安全性和可靠性。
AI.method: 将注意力分支与预训练深度RL模型连接，通过监督学习用模型选择的动作作为标签训练注意力分支，生成与决策对应的注意力图。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法能有效生成可解释的注意力图，揭示机器人导航决策的关键视觉区域。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法为深度RL模型提供了直观的可视化解释，有助于提升机器人导航系统的透明度和可靠性。

authors_text: Jinxin Ding,Yuxin Huang,Keyang Ni,Xueyao Wang,Yinxiao Wang,Yucheng Wang
title: Intellectual Property Evaluation Utilizing Machine Learning
title_zh: 利用机器学习进行知识产权评估
abstract: Intellectual properties is increasingly important in the economic development. To solve the pain points by traditional methods in IP evaluation, we are developing a new technology with machine learning as the core. We have built an online platform and will expand our business in the Greater Bay Area with plans.
summary: Intellectual properties is increasingly important in the economic development. To solve the pain points by traditional methods in IP evaluation, we are developing a new technology with machine learning as the core. We have built an online platform and will expand our business in the Greater Bay Area with plans.
abstract_zh: 知识产权在经济发展中越来越重要。针对传统IP评估方法的痛点，我们正在开发以机器学习为核心的新技术。我们已经建立了一个在线平台，并将有计划地拓展我们在大湾区的业务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的知识产权评估技术，并构建了在线平台以解决传统方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统知识产权评估方法存在效率低、准确性不足等问题，亟需利用机器学习技术提升评估能力以适应经济发展需求。
AI.method: 以机器学习为核心技术，开发知识产权评估算法并搭建在线平台，计划在粤港澳大湾区扩展业务。
AI.result: 成功构建了知识产权评估在线平台，并制定了在粤港澳大湾区的业务扩展计划。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习技术为知识产权评估提供了创新解决方案，未来将在更大范围推广平台应用。

authors_text: Adrien Benamira,Tristan Guérand,Thomas Peyrin,Trevor Yap,Bryan Hooi
title: A Scalable, Interpretable, Verifiable & Differentiable Logic Gate Convolutional Neural Network Architecture From Truth Tables
title_zh: 来自真值表的可扩展、可解释、可验证和可微分的逻辑门卷积神经网络架构
abstract: We propose $\mathcal{T}$ruth $\mathcal{T}$able net ($\mathcal{TT}$net), a novel Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architecture that addresses, by design, the open challenges of interpretability, formal verification, and logic gate conversion. $\mathcal{TT}$net is built using CNNs' filters that are equivalent to tractable truth tables and that we call Learning Truth Table (LTT) blocks. The dual form of LTT blocks allows the truth tables to be easily trained with gradient descent and makes these CNNs easy to interpret, verify and infer. Specifically, $\mathcal{TT}$net is a deep CNN model that can be automatically represented, after post-training transformation, as a sum of Boolean decision trees, or as a sum of Disjunctive/Conjunctive Normal Form (DNF/CNF) formulas, or as a compact Boolean logic circuit. We demonstrate the effectiveness and scalability of $\mathcal{TT}$net on multiple datasets, showing comparable interpretability to decision trees, fast complete/sound formal verification, and scalable logic gate representation, all compared to state-of-the-art methods. We believe this work represents a step towards making CNNs more transparent and trustworthy for real-world critical applications.
summary: We propose $\mathcal{T}$ruth $\mathcal{T}$able net ($\mathcal{TT}$net), a novel Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architecture that addresses, by design, the open challenges of interpretability, formal verification, and logic gate conversion. $\mathcal{TT}$net is built using CNNs' filters that are equivalent to tractable truth tables and that we call Learning Truth Table (LTT) blocks. The dual form of LTT blocks allows the truth tables to be easily trained with gradient descent and makes these CNNs easy to interpret, verify and infer. Specifically, $\mathcal{TT}$net is a deep CNN model that can be automatically represented, after post-training transformation, as a sum of Boolean decision trees, or as a sum of Disjunctive/Conjunctive Normal Form (DNF/CNF) formulas, or as a compact Boolean logic circuit. We demonstrate the effectiveness and scalability of $\mathcal{TT}$net on multiple datasets, showing comparable interpretability to decision trees, fast complete/sound formal verification, and scalable logic gate representation, all compared to state-of-the-art methods. We believe this work represents a step towards making CNNs more transparent and trustworthy for real-world critical applications.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 $\mathcal{T}$ruth $\mathcal{T}$able net ($\mathcal{TT}$net)，这是一种新颖的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构，通过设计解决了可解释性、形式验证和逻辑门转换方面的开放性挑战。 $\mathcal{TT}$net 是使用 CNN 的过滤器构建的，这些过滤器相当于易于处理的真值表，我们称之为学习真值表 (LTT) 块。 LTT 块的双重形式允许通过梯度下降轻松训练真值表，并使这些 CNN 易于解释、验证和推断。具体来说，$\mathcal{TT}$net 是一个深度 CNN 模型，经过训练后转换后，可以自动表示为布尔决策树的总和，或析取/合取范式（DNF/CNF）公式的总和，或紧凑的布尔逻辑电路。我们在多个数据集上证明了 $\mathcal{TT}$net 的有效性和可扩展性，显示了与决策树相当的可解释性、快速完整/健全的形式验证以及可扩展的逻辑门表示，所有这些都与最先进的方法进行了比较。我们相信这项工作代表了使 CNN 对于现实世界的关键应用更加透明和可信的一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于真值表的可扩展、可解释、可验证且可微分的卷积神经网络架构TTnet，通过逻辑门转换解决CNN的可解释性难题。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN模型存在可解释性差、形式验证困难等问题，难以满足医疗、金融等关键领域的可信应用需求。
AI.method: 设计学习真值表（LTT）模块，将CNN卷积核与可 tractable 的真值表等价，通过梯度下降训练并支持后训练转换为布尔决策树/逻辑公式表示。
AI.result: 在多数据集上验证TTnet具有与决策树相当的可解释性，支持快速完备的形式验证，逻辑门表示规模优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: TTnet为构建透明可信的CNN模型提供了新范式，推动深度学习在关键领域的可靠应用。

search_text: A Scalable, Interpretable, Verifiable & Differentiable Logic Gate Convolutional Neural Network Architecture From Truth Tables 来自真值表的可扩展、可解释、可验证和可微分的逻辑门卷积神经网络架构 We propose $\mathcal{T}$ruth $\mathcal{T}$able net ($\mathcal{TT}$net), a novel Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) architecture that addresses, by design, the open challenges of interpretability, formal verification, and logic gate conversion. $\mathcal{TT}$net is built using CNNs' filters that are equivalent to tractable truth tables and that we call Learning Truth Table (LTT) blocks. The dual form of LTT blocks allows the truth tables to be easily trained with gradient descent and makes these CNNs easy to interpret, verify and infer. Specifically, $\mathcal{TT}$net is a deep CNN model that can be automatically represented, after post-training transformation, as a sum of Boolean decision trees, or as a sum of Disjunctive/Conjunctive Normal Form (DNF/CNF) formulas, or as a compact Boolean logic circuit. We demonstrate the effectiveness and scalability of $\mathcal{TT}$net on multiple datasets, showing comparable interpretability to decision trees, fast complete/sound formal verification, and scalable logic gate representation, all compared to state-of-the-art methods. We believe this work represents a step towards making CNNs more transparent and trustworthy for real-world critical applications. 我们提出了 $\mathcal{T}$ruth $\mathcal{T}$able net ($\mathcal{TT}$net)，这是一种新颖的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构，通过设计解决了可解释性、形式验证和逻辑门转换方面的开放性挑战。 $\mathcal{TT}$net 是使用 CNN 的过滤器构建的，这些过滤器相当于易于处理的真值表，我们称之为学习真值表 (LTT) 块。 LTT 块的双重形式允许通过梯度下降轻松训练真值表，并使这些 CNN 易于解释、验证和推断。具体来说，$\mathcal{TT}$net 是一个深度 CNN 模型，经过训练后转换后，可以自动表示为布尔决策树的总和，或析取/合取范式（DNF/CNF）公式的总和，或紧凑的布尔逻辑电路。我们在多个数据集上证明了 $\mathcal{TT}$net 的有效性和可扩展性，显示了与决策树相当的可解释性、快速完整/健全的形式验证以及可扩展的逻辑门表示，所有这些都与最先进的方法进行了比较。我们相信这项工作代表了使 CNN 对于现实世界的关键应用更加透明和可信的一步。 本文提出一种基于真值表的可扩展、可解释、可验证且可微分的卷积神经网络架构TTnet，通过逻辑门转换解决CNN的可解释性难题。 Adrien Benamira,Tristan Guérand,Thomas Peyrin,Trevor Yap,Bryan Hooi cs.AI,cs.FL,cs.LG,cs.SC

authors_text: Xiujun Shu,Wei Wen,Haoqian Wu,Keyu Chen,Yiran Song,Ruizhi Qiao,Bo Ren,Xiao Wang
title: See Finer, See More: Implicit Modality Alignment for Text-based Person Retrieval
title_zh: 查看更细，查看更多：基于文本的人物检索的隐式模态对齐
comment: Accepted at ECCV Workshop on Real-World Surveillance (RWS 2022)
comments: Accepted at ECCV Workshop on Real-World Surveillance (RWS 2022)
abstract: Text-based person retrieval aims to find the query person based on a textual description. The key is to learn a common latent space mapping between visual-textual modalities. To achieve this goal, existing works employ segmentation to obtain explicitly cross-modal alignments or utilize attention to explore salient alignments. These methods have two shortcomings: 1) Labeling cross-modal alignments are time-consuming. 2) Attention methods can explore salient cross-modal alignments but may ignore some subtle and valuable pairs. To relieve these issues, we introduce an Implicit Visual-Textual (IVT) framework for text-based person retrieval. Different from previous models, IVT utilizes a single network to learn representation for both modalities, which contributes to the visual-textual interaction. To explore the fine-grained alignment, we further propose two implicit semantic alignment paradigms: multi-level alignment (MLA) and bidirectional mask modeling (BMM). The MLA module explores finer matching at sentence, phrase, and word levels, while the BMM module aims to mine \textbf{more} semantic alignments between visual and textual modalities. Extensive experiments are carried out to evaluate the proposed IVT on public datasets, i.e., CUHK-PEDES, RSTPReID, and ICFG-PEDES. Even without explicit body part alignment, our approach still achieves state-of-the-art performance. Code is available at: https://github.com/TencentYoutuResearch/PersonRetrieval-IVT.
summary: Text-based person retrieval aims to find the query person based on a textual description. The key is to learn a common latent space mapping between visual-textual modalities. To achieve this goal, existing works employ segmentation to obtain explicitly cross-modal alignments or utilize attention to explore salient alignments. These methods have two shortcomings: 1) Labeling cross-modal alignments are time-consuming. 2) Attention methods can explore salient cross-modal alignments but may ignore some subtle and valuable pairs. To relieve these issues, we introduce an Implicit Visual-Textual (IVT) framework for text-based person retrieval. Different from previous models, IVT utilizes a single network to learn representation for both modalities, which contributes to the visual-textual interaction. To explore the fine-grained alignment, we further propose two implicit semantic alignment paradigms: multi-level alignment (MLA) and bidirectional mask modeling (BMM). The MLA module explores finer matching at sentence, phrase, and word levels, while the BMM module aims to mine \textbf{more} semantic alignments between visual and textual modalities. Extensive experiments are carried out to evaluate the proposed IVT on public datasets, i.e., CUHK-PEDES, RSTPReID, and ICFG-PEDES. Even without explicit body part alignment, our approach still achieves state-of-the-art performance. Code is available at: https://github.com/TencentYoutuResearch/PersonRetrieval-IVT.
abstract_zh: 基于文本的人物检索旨在根据文本描述找到查询的人物。关键是学习视觉文本模态之间的共同潜在空间映射。为了实现这一目标，现有的工作采用分割来获得明确的跨模式对齐或利用注意力来探索显着的对齐。这些方法有两个缺点：1）标记跨模式对齐非常耗时。 2）注意力方法可以探索显着的跨模式对齐，但可能会忽略一些微妙且有价值的对。为了缓解这些问题，我们引入了用于基于文本的人物检索的隐式视觉文本（IVT）框架。与以前的模型不同，IVT 利用单个网络来学习两种模式的表示，这有助于视觉文本交互。为了探索细粒度对齐，我们进一步提出了两种隐式语义对齐范例：多级对齐（MLA）和双向掩模建模（BMM）。 MLA 模块探索句子、短语和单词级别的更精细匹配，而 BMM 模块旨在挖掘视觉和文本模态之间的 \textbf{more} 语义对齐。我们在公共数据集（即 CUHK-PEDES、RSTPReID 和 ICFG-PEDES）上进行了大量实验来评估所提出的 IVT。即使没有明确的身体部位对齐，我们的方法仍然实现了最先进的性能。代码位于：https://github.com/TencentYoutuResearch/PersonRetrieval-IVT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于隐式模态对齐的文本描述人物检索方法IVT，通过多级对齐和双向掩码建模提升跨模态匹配效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖显式标注的跨模态对齐或注意力机制，存在标注成本高且忽略细微语义对齐的问题。
AI.method: 设计IVT框架使用单一网络学习视觉-文本表示，包含多级语义对齐模块（MLA）和双向掩码建模模块（BMM）。
AI.result: 在CUHK-PEDES等数据集上达到SOTA性能，且无需显式身体部位标注即可实现更精细的语义对齐。
AI.conclusion: 隐式模态对齐能有效捕捉跨模态细节关联，在文本描述人物检索任务中具有显著优势。

authors_text: Ran Gu,Jingyang Zhang,Guotai Wang,Wenhui Lei,Tao Song,Xiaofan Zhang,Kang Li,Shaoting Zhang
title: Contrastive Semi-supervised Learning for Domain Adaptive Segmentation Across Similar Anatomical Structures
title_zh: 跨相似解剖结构的域自适应分割的对比半监督学习
abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance for medical image segmentation, yet need plenty of manual annotations for training. Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL) methods are promising to reduce the requirement of annotations, but their performance is still limited when the dataset size and the number of annotated images are small. Leveraging existing annotated datasets with similar anatomical structures to assist training has a potential for improving the model's performance. However, it is further challenged by the cross-anatomy domain shift due to the different appearance and even imaging modalities from the target structure. To solve this problem, we propose Contrastive Semi-supervised learning for Cross Anatomy Domain Adaptation (CS-CADA) that adapts a model to segment similar structures in a target domain, which requires only limited annotations in the target domain by leveraging a set of existing annotated images of similar structures in a source domain. We use Domain-Specific Batch Normalization (DSBN) to individually normalize feature maps for the two anatomical domains, and propose a cross-domain contrastive learning strategy to encourage extracting domain invariant features. They are integrated into a Self-Ensembling Mean-Teacher (SE-MT) framework to exploit unlabeled target domain images with a prediction consistency constraint. Extensive experiments show that our CS-CADA is able to solve the challenging cross-anatomy domain shift problem, achieving accurate segmentation of coronary arteries in X-ray images with the help of retinal vessel images and cardiac MR images with the help of fundus images, respectively, given only a small number of annotations in the target domain.
summary: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance for medical image segmentation, yet need plenty of manual annotations for training. Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL) methods are promising to reduce the requirement of annotations, but their performance is still limited when the dataset size and the number of annotated images are small. Leveraging existing annotated datasets with similar anatomical structures to assist training has a potential for improving the model's performance. However, it is further challenged by the cross-anatomy domain shift due to the different appearance and even imaging modalities from the target structure. To solve this problem, we propose Contrastive Semi-supervised learning for Cross Anatomy Domain Adaptation (CS-CADA) that adapts a model to segment similar structures in a target domain, which requires only limited annotations in the target domain by leveraging a set of existing annotated images of similar structures in a source domain. We use Domain-Specific Batch Normalization (DSBN) to individually normalize feature maps for the two anatomical domains, and propose a cross-domain contrastive learning strategy to encourage extracting domain invariant features. They are integrated into a Self-Ensembling Mean-Teacher (SE-MT) framework to exploit unlabeled target domain images with a prediction consistency constraint. Extensive experiments show that our CS-CADA is able to solve the challenging cross-anatomy domain shift problem, achieving accurate segmentation of coronary arteries in X-ray images with the help of retinal vessel images and cardiac MR images with the help of fundus images, respectively, given only a small number of annotations in the target domain.
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 已在医学图像分割方面实现了最先进的性能，但需要大量的手动注释进行训练。半监督学习（SSL）方法有望减少注释的要求，但当数据集大小和注释图像数量较小时，其性能仍然受到限制。利用具有相似解剖结构的现有注释数据集来辅助训练有可能提高模型的性能。然而，由于目标结构的外观甚至成像方式不同，跨解剖领域的转变进一步挑战了这一点。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了跨解剖域适应的对比半监督学习（CS-CADA），它采用模型来分割目标域中的相似结构，通过利用源域中相似结构的一组现有注释图像，仅需要目标域中的有限注释。我们使用特定领域批量标准化（DSBN）来单独标准化两个解剖领域的特征图，并提出一种跨领域对比学习策略来鼓励提取领域不变特征。它们被集成到自集成均值教师 (SE-MT) 框架中，以利用具有预测一致性约束的未标记目标域图像。大量实验表明，我们的CS-CADA能够解决具有挑战性的跨解剖域转移问题，分别在视网膜血管图像的帮助下实现X射线图像中冠状动脉的精确分割，在眼底图像的帮助下实现心脏MR图像的精确分割，而仅在目标域中仅给出少量注释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种对比半监督学习方法（CS-CADA），用于解决跨相似解剖结构的领域自适应分割问题，通过利用源领域的标注数据和目标领域的少量标注数据提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管卷积神经网络在医学图像分割中表现优异，但需要大量人工标注数据。半监督学习虽能减少标注需求，但在数据量小和跨解剖结构领域差异大的情况下性能受限，因此需探索跨相似解剖结构的领域自适应方法。
AI.method: 提出CS-CADA框架，结合领域特定批量归一化（DSBN）处理不同解剖结构的特征差异，并设计跨领域对比学习策略以提取领域不变特征，集成到自集成均值教师（SE-MT）框架中，利用未标注目标数据的预测一致性约束进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，CS-CADA在目标领域仅有少量标注的情况下，成功实现了跨模态分割任务，例如利用视网膜血管图像辅助冠状动脉X光图像分割，以及利用眼底图像辅助心脏MRI图像分割。
AI.conclusion: CS-CADA有效解决了跨相似解剖结构的领域自适应问题，通过对比学习和领域自适应技术，在有限标注条件下实现了高精度的医学图像分割。

method: 提出CS-CADA框架，结合领域特定批量归一化（DSBN）处理不同解剖结构的特征差异，并设计跨领域对比学习策略以提取领域不变特征，集成到自集成均值教师（SE-MT）框架中，利用未标注目标数据的预测一致性约束进行训练。
result: 实验表明，CS-CADA在目标领域仅有少量标注的情况下，成功实现了跨模态分割任务，例如利用视网膜血管图像辅助冠状动脉X光图像分割，以及利用眼底图像辅助心脏MRI图像分割。
conclusion: CS-CADA有效解决了跨相似解剖结构的领域自适应问题，通过对比学习和领域自适应技术，在有限标注条件下实现了高精度的医学图像分割。
search_text: Contrastive Semi-supervised Learning for Domain Adaptive Segmentation Across Similar Anatomical Structures 跨相似解剖结构的域自适应分割的对比半监督学习 Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance for medical image segmentation, yet need plenty of manual annotations for training. Semi-Supervised Learning (SSL) methods are promising to reduce the requirement of annotations, but their performance is still limited when the dataset size and the number of annotated images are small. Leveraging existing annotated datasets with similar anatomical structures to assist training has a potential for improving the model's performance. However, it is further challenged by the cross-anatomy domain shift due to the different appearance and even imaging modalities from the target structure. To solve this problem, we propose Contrastive Semi-supervised learning for Cross Anatomy Domain Adaptation (CS-CADA) that adapts a model to segment similar structures in a target domain, which requires only limited annotations in the target domain by leveraging a set of existing annotated images of similar structures in a source domain. We use Domain-Specific Batch Normalization (DSBN) to individually normalize feature maps for the two anatomical domains, and propose a cross-domain contrastive learning strategy to encourage extracting domain invariant features. They are integrated into a Self-Ensembling Mean-Teacher (SE-MT) framework to exploit unlabeled target domain images with a prediction consistency constraint. Extensive experiments show that our CS-CADA is able to solve the challenging cross-anatomy domain shift problem, achieving accurate segmentation of coronary arteries in X-ray images with the help of retinal vessel images and cardiac MR images with the help of fundus images, respectively, given only a small number of annotations in the target domain. 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 已在医学图像分割方面实现了最先进的性能，但需要大量的手动注释进行训练。半监督学习（SSL）方法有望减少注释的要求，但当数据集大小和注释图像数量较小时，其性能仍然受到限制。利用具有相似解剖结构的现有注释数据集来辅助训练有可能提高模型的性能。然而，由于目标结构的外观甚至成像方式不同，跨解剖领域的转变进一步挑战了这一点。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了跨解剖域适应的对比半监督学习（CS-CADA），它采用模型来分割目标域中的相似结构，通过利用源域中相似结构的一组现有注释图像，仅需要目标域中的有限注释。我们使用特定领域批量标准化（DSBN）来单独标准化两个解剖领域的特征图，并提出一种跨领域对比学习策略来鼓励提取领域不变特征。它们被集成到自集成均值教师 (SE-MT) 框架中，以利用具有预测一致性约束的未标记目标域图像。大量实验表明，我们的CS-CADA能够解决具有挑战性的跨解剖域转移问题，分别在视网膜血管图像的帮助下实现X射线图像中冠状动脉的精确分割，在眼底图像的帮助下实现心脏MR图像的精确分割，而仅在目标域中仅给出少量注释。 本文提出了一种对比半监督学习方法（CS-CADA），用于解决跨相似解剖结构的领域自适应分割问题，通过利用源领域的标注数据和目标领域的少量标注数据提升分割性能。 Ran Gu,Jingyang Zhang,Guotai Wang,Wenhui Lei,Tao Song,Xiaofan Zhang,Kang Li,Shaoting Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Qiuliang Ye,Li-Wen Wang,Daniel Pak-Kong Lun
title: Towards Practical Single-shot Phase Retrieval with Physics-Driven Deep Neural Network
title_zh: 利用物理驱动的深度神经网络实现实用的单次相位检索
abstract: Phase retrieval (PR), a long-established challenge for recovering a complex-valued signal from its Fourier intensity-only measurements, has attracted considerable attention due to its widespread applications in digital imaging. Recently, deep learning-based approaches were developed that achieved some success in single-shot PR. These approaches require a single Fourier intensity measurement without the need to impose any additional constraints on the measured data. Nevertheless, vanilla deep neural networks (DNN) do not give good performance due to the substantial disparity between the input and output domains of the PR problems. Physics-informed approaches try to incorporate the Fourier intensity measurements into an iterative approach to increase the reconstruction accuracy. It, however, requires a lengthy computation process, and the accuracy still cannot be guaranteed. Besides, many of these approaches work on simulation data that ignore some common problems such as saturation and quantization errors in practical optical PR systems. In this paper, a novel physics-driven multi-scale DNN structure dubbed PPRNet is proposed. Similar to other deep learning-based PR methods, PPRNet requires only a single Fourier intensity measurement. It is physics-driven that the network is guided to follow the Fourier intensity measurement at different scales to enhance the reconstruction accuracy. PPRNet has a feedforward structure and can be end-to-end trained. Thus, it is much faster and more accurate than the traditional physics-driven PR approaches. Extensive simulations and experiments on a practical optical platform were conducted. The results demonstrate the superiority and practicality of the proposed PPRNet over the traditional learning-based PR methods.
summary: Phase retrieval (PR), a long-established challenge for recovering a complex-valued signal from its Fourier intensity-only measurements, has attracted considerable attention due to its widespread applications in digital imaging. Recently, deep learning-based approaches were developed that achieved some success in single-shot PR. These approaches require a single Fourier intensity measurement without the need to impose any additional constraints on the measured data. Nevertheless, vanilla deep neural networks (DNN) do not give good performance due to the substantial disparity between the input and output domains of the PR problems. Physics-informed approaches try to incorporate the Fourier intensity measurements into an iterative approach to increase the reconstruction accuracy. It, however, requires a lengthy computation process, and the accuracy still cannot be guaranteed. Besides, many of these approaches work on simulation data that ignore some common problems such as saturation and quantization errors in practical optical PR systems. In this paper, a novel physics-driven multi-scale DNN structure dubbed PPRNet is proposed. Similar to other deep learning-based PR methods, PPRNet requires only a single Fourier intensity measurement. It is physics-driven that the network is guided to follow the Fourier intensity measurement at different scales to enhance the reconstruction accuracy. PPRNet has a feedforward structure and can be end-to-end trained. Thus, it is much faster and more accurate than the traditional physics-driven PR approaches. Extensive simulations and experiments on a practical optical platform were conducted. The results demonstrate the superiority and practicality of the proposed PPRNet over the traditional learning-based PR methods.
abstract_zh: 相位检索（PR）是从仅傅里叶强度测量中恢复复值信号的长期挑战，由于其在数字成像中的广泛应用而引起了广泛的关注。最近，基于深度学习的方法被开发出来，在单次 PR 方面取得了一些成功。这些方法需要单个傅里叶强度测量，而不需要对测量数据施加任何额外的约束。然而，由于 PR 问题的输入域和输出域之间存在巨大差异，普通深度神经网络 (DNN) 无法提供良好的性能。基于物理的方法尝试将傅立叶强度测量合并到迭代方法中以​​提高重建精度。但其计算过程较长，且精度仍无法保证。此外，许多这些方法都基于模拟数据，忽略了实际光学 PR 系统中的一些常见问题，例如饱和度和量化误差。在本文中，提出了一种新颖的物理驱动的多尺度 DNN 结构，称为 PPRNet。与其他基于深度学习的 PR 方法类似，PPRNet 仅需要一次傅里叶强度测量。它是物理驱动的，引导网络遵循不同尺度的傅里叶强度测量，以提高重建精度。 PPRNet 具有前馈结构，可以进行端到端训练。因此，它比传统的物理驱动的 PR 方法更快、更准确。在实际光学平台上进行了广泛的模拟和实验。结果证明了所提出的 PPRNet 相对于传统的基于学习的 PR 方法的优越性和实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PPRNet的物理驱动多尺度深度神经网络结构，用于解决单次拍摄相位恢复问题，通过结合物理信息提升重建精度和效率。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法在单次相位恢复中存在输入输出域差异大、精度不足的问题，而物理方法计算复杂且忽略实际光学系统中的误差，需更高效准确的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计PPRNet网络，利用多尺度结构融合物理约束，通过单次傅里叶强度测量端到端训练，结合物理信息提升重建准确性并加速计算。
AI.result: 实验表明PPRNet在模拟数据和实际光学平台中均优于传统方法，具有更高的精度和更快的计算速度。
AI.conclusion: PPRNet通过物理驱动的多尺度网络有效解决了实际相位恢复中的挑战，验证了其在实用场景中的优越性。

These approaches require a single Fourier intensity measurement without the need to impose any additional constraints on the measured data. Nevertheless, vanilla deep neural networks (DNN) do not give good performance due to the substantial disparity between the input and output domains of the PR problems. It, however, requires a lengthy computation process, and the accuracy still cannot be guaranteed. Besides, many of these approaches work on simulation data that ignore some common problems such as saturation and quantization errors in practical optical PR systems. In this paper, a novel physics-driven multi-scale DNN structure dubbed PPRNet is proposed. Similar to other deep learning-based PR methods, PPRNet requires only a single Fourier intensity measurement. It is physics-driven that the network is guided to follow the Fourier intensity measurement at different scales to enhance the reconstruction accuracy. PPRNet has a feedforward structure and can be end-to-end trained. Thus, it is much faster and more accurate than the traditional physics-driven PR approaches. Extensive simulations and experiments on a practical optical platform were conducted. The results demonstrate the superiority and practicality of the proposed PPRNet over the traditional learning-based PR methods. 相位检索（PR）是从仅傅里叶强度测量中恢复复值信号的长期挑战，由于其在数字成像中的广泛应用而引起了广泛的关注。最近，基于深度学习的方法被开发出来，在单次 PR 方面取得了一些成功。这些方法需要单个傅里叶强度测量，而不需要对测量数据施加任何额外的约束。然而，由于 PR 问题的输入域和输出域之间存在巨大差异，普通深度神经网络 (DNN) 无法提供良好的性能。基于物理的方法尝试将傅立叶强度测量合并到迭代方法中以​​提高重建精度。但其计算过程较长，且精度仍无法保证。此外，许多这些方法都基于模拟数据，忽略了实际光学 PR 系统中的一些常见问题，例如饱和度和量化误差。在本文中，提出了一种新颖的物理驱动的多尺度 DNN 结构，称为 PPRNet。与其他基于深度学习的 PR 方法类似，PPRNet 仅需要一次傅里叶强度测量。它是物理驱动的，引导网络遵循不同尺度的傅里叶强度测量，以提高重建精度。 PPRNet 具有前馈结构，可以进行端到端训练。因此，它比传统的物理驱动的 PR 方法更快、更准确。在实际光学平台上进行了广泛的模拟和实验。结果证明了所提出的 PPRNet 相对于传统的基于学习的 PR 方法的优越性和实用性。 本文提出一种名为PPRNet的物理驱动多尺度深度神经网络结构，用于解决单次拍摄相位恢复问题，通过结合物理信息提升重建精度和效率。 Qiuliang Ye,Li-Wen Wang,Daniel Pak-Kong Lun eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV,physics.optics

authors_text: Lianyu Hu,Shenglan Liu,Wei Feng
title: Spatial Temporal Graph Attention Network for Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于基于骨架的动作识别的时空图注意网络
abstract: It's common for current methods in skeleton-based action recognition to mainly consider capturing long-term temporal dependencies as skeleton sequences are typically long (>128 frames), which forms a challenging problem for previous approaches. In such conditions, short-term dependencies are few formally considered, which are critical for classifying similar actions. Most current approaches are consisted of interleaving spatial-only modules and temporal-only modules, where direct information flow among joints in adjacent frames are hindered, thus inferior to capture short-term motion and distinguish similar action pairs. To handle this limitation, we propose a general framework, coined as STGAT, to model cross-spacetime information flow. It equips the spatial-only modules with spatial-temporal modeling for regional perception. While STGAT is theoretically effective for spatial-temporal modeling, we propose three simple modules to reduce local spatial-temporal feature redundancy and further release the potential of STGAT, which (1) narrow the scope of self-attention mechanism, (2) dynamically weight joints along temporal dimension, and (3) separate subtle motion from static features, respectively. As a robust feature extractor, STGAT generalizes better upon classifying similar actions than previous methods, witnessed by both qualitative and quantitative results. STGAT achieves state-of-the-art performance on three large-scale datasets: NTU RGB+D 60, NTU RGB+D 120, and Kinetics Skeleton 400. Code is released.
summary: It's common for current methods in skeleton-based action recognition to mainly consider capturing long-term temporal dependencies as skeleton sequences are typically long (>128 frames), which forms a challenging problem for previous approaches. In such conditions, short-term dependencies are few formally considered, which are critical for classifying similar actions. Most current approaches are consisted of interleaving spatial-only modules and temporal-only modules, where direct information flow among joints in adjacent frames are hindered, thus inferior to capture short-term motion and distinguish similar action pairs. To handle this limitation, we propose a general framework, coined as STGAT, to model cross-spacetime information flow. It equips the spatial-only modules with spatial-temporal modeling for regional perception. While STGAT is theoretically effective for spatial-temporal modeling, we propose three simple modules to reduce local spatial-temporal feature redundancy and further release the potential of STGAT, which (1) narrow the scope of self-attention mechanism, (2) dynamically weight joints along temporal dimension, and (3) separate subtle motion from static features, respectively. As a robust feature extractor, STGAT generalizes better upon classifying similar actions than previous methods, witnessed by both qualitative and quantitative results. STGAT achieves state-of-the-art performance on three large-scale datasets: NTU RGB+D 60, NTU RGB+D 120, and Kinetics Skeleton 400. Code is released.
abstract_zh: 当前基于骨架的动作识别中的方法通常主要考虑捕获长期时间依赖性，因为骨架序列通常很长（> 128 帧），这对以前的方法构成了一个具有挑战性的问题。在这种情况下，很少正式考虑短期依赖性，这对于对类似动作进行分类至关重要。当前大多数方法由交错的仅空间模块和仅时间模块组成，其中相邻帧中的关节之间的直接信息流受到阻碍，因此不如捕获短期运动和区分相似的动作对。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一个通用框架，称为 STGAT，来模拟跨时空信息流。它为纯空间模块配备了用于区域感知的时空建模。虽然 STGAT 理论上对于时空建模是有效的，但我们提出了三个简单的模块来减少局部时空特征冗余并进一步释放 STGAT 的潜力，分别是（1）缩小自注意力机制的范围，（2）沿时间维度动态权重关节，（3）将细微运动与静态特征分开。作为一个强大的特征提取器，STGAT 在对类似动作进行分类时比以前的方法具有更好的泛化能力，定性和定量结果都证明了这一点。 STGAT 在三个大型数据集上实现了最先进的性能：NTU RGB+D 60、NTU RGB+D 120 和 Kinetics Skeleton 400。代码已发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种空间-时间图注意力网络（STGAT），用于基于骨架的动作识别，通过建模跨时空信息流来提升对相似动作的分类能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理长序列骨架数据时主要关注长期时间依赖性，忽视了对区分相似动作至关重要的短期依赖性，导致信息流动受限且分类效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出STGAT框架，结合空间模块与时间模块建模区域感知，并引入三个模块减少冗余：1) 缩小自注意力范围，2) 时序动态加权关节，3) 分离细微运动与静态特征。
AI.result: STGAT在NTU RGB+D 60、NTU RGB+D 120和Kinetics Skeleton 400三个大规模数据集上均达到当时最优性能，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: STGAT通过有效建模时空信息流，显著提升了相似动作分类的准确性，验证了其在动作识别任务中的有效性与泛化能力。

tldr: 本文提出了一种空间-时间图注意力网络（STGAT），用于基于骨架的动作识别，通过建模跨时空信息流来提升对相似动作的分类能力。
motivation: 现有方法在处理长序列骨架数据时主要关注长期时间依赖性，忽视了对区分相似动作至关重要的短期依赖性，导致信息流动受限且分类效果不佳。
method: 提出STGAT框架，结合空间模块与时间模块建模区域感知，并引入三个模块减少冗余：1) 缩小自注意力范围，2) 时序动态加权关节，3) 分离细微运动与静态特征。
result: STGAT在NTU RGB+D 60、NTU RGB+D 120和Kinetics Skeleton 400三个大规模数据集上均达到当时最优性能，且代码已开源。
conclusion: STGAT通过有效建模时空信息流，显著提升了相似动作分类的准确性，验证了其在动作识别任务中的有效性与泛化能力。
search_text: Spatial Temporal Graph Attention Network for Skeleton-Based Action Recognition 用于基于骨架的动作识别的时空图注意网络 It's common for current methods in skeleton-based action recognition to mainly consider capturing long-term temporal dependencies as skeleton sequences are typically long (>128 frames), which forms a challenging problem for previous approaches. In such conditions, short-term dependencies are few formally considered, which are critical for classifying similar actions. Most current approaches are consisted of interleaving spatial-only modules and temporal-only modules, where direct information flow among joints in adjacent frames are hindered, thus inferior to capture short-term motion and distinguish similar action pairs. To handle this limitation, we propose a general framework, coined as STGAT, to model cross-spacetime information flow. It equips the spatial-only modules with spatial-temporal modeling for regional perception. While STGAT is theoretically effective for spatial-temporal modeling, we propose three simple modules to reduce local spatial-temporal feature redundancy and further release the potential of STGAT, which (1) narrow the scope of self-attention mechanism, (2) dynamically weight joints along temporal dimension, and (3) separate subtle motion from static features, respectively. As a robust feature extractor, STGAT generalizes better upon classifying similar actions than previous methods, witnessed by both qualitative and quantitative results. STGAT achieves state-of-the-art performance on three large-scale datasets: NTU RGB+D 60, NTU RGB+D 120, and Kinetics Skeleton 400. Code is released. 当前基于骨架的动作识别中的方法通常主要考虑捕获长期时间依赖性，因为骨架序列通常很长（> 128 帧），这对以前的方法构成了一个具有挑战性的问题。在这种情况下，很少正式考虑短期依赖性，这对于对类似动作进行分类至关重要。当前大多数方法由交错的仅空间模块和仅时间模块组成，其中相邻帧中的关节之间的直接信息流受到阻碍，因此不如捕获短期运动和区分相似的动作对。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一个通用框架，称为 STGAT，来模拟跨时空信息流。它为纯空间模块配备了用于区域感知的时空建模。虽然 STGAT 理论上对于时空建模是有效的，但我们提出了三个简单的模块来减少局部时空特征冗余并进一步释放 STGAT 的潜力，分别是（1）缩小自注意力机制的范围，（2）沿时间维度动态权重关节，（3）将细微运动与静态特征分开。作为一个强大的特征提取器，STGAT 在对类似动作进行分类时比以前的方法具有更好的泛化能力，定性和定量结果都证明了这一点。 STGAT 在三个大型数据集上实现了最先进的性能：NTU RGB+D 60、NTU RGB+D 120 和 Kinetics Skeleton 400。代码已发布。 本文提出了一种空间-时间图注意力网络（STGAT），用于基于骨架的动作识别，通过建模跨时空信息流来提升对相似动作的分类能力。 Lianyu Hu,Shenglan Liu,Wei Feng cs.CV

authors_text: Hongming Luo,Fei Zhou,Kin-man Lam,Guoping Qiu
title: Restoration of User Videos Shared on Social Media
title_zh: 恢复社交媒体上分享的用户视频
comment: This paper has been accepted by ACMMM2022
comments: This paper has been accepted by ACMMM2022
abstract: User videos shared on social media platforms usually suffer from degradations caused by unknown proprietary processing procedures, which means that their visual quality is poorer than that of the originals. This paper presents a new general video restoration framework for the restoration of user videos shared on social media platforms. In contrast to most deep learning-based video restoration methods that perform end-to-end mapping, where feature extraction is mostly treated as a black box, in the sense that what role a feature plays is often unknown, our new method, termed Video restOration through adapTive dEgradation Sensing (VOTES), introduces the concept of a degradation feature map (DFM) to explicitly guide the video restoration process. Specifically, for each video frame, we first adaptively estimate its DFM to extract features representing the difficulty of restoring its different regions. We then feed the DFM to a convolutional neural network (CNN) to compute hierarchical degradation features to modulate an end-to-end video restoration backbone network, such that more attention is paid explicitly to potentially more difficult to restore areas, which in turn leads to enhanced restoration performance. We will explain the design rationale of the VOTES framework and present extensive experimental results to show that the new VOTES method outperforms various state-of-the-art techniques both quantitatively and qualitatively. In addition, we contribute a large scale real-world database of user videos shared on different social media platforms. Codes and datasets are available at https://github.com/luohongming/VOTES.git
summary: User videos shared on social media platforms usually suffer from degradations caused by unknown proprietary processing procedures, which means that their visual quality is poorer than that of the originals. This paper presents a new general video restoration framework for the restoration of user videos shared on social media platforms. In contrast to most deep learning-based video restoration methods that perform end-to-end mapping, where feature extraction is mostly treated as a black box, in the sense that what role a feature plays is often unknown, our new method, termed Video restOration through adapTive dEgradation Sensing (VOTES), introduces the concept of a degradation feature map (DFM) to explicitly guide the video restoration process. Specifically, for each video frame, we first adaptively estimate its DFM to extract features representing the difficulty of restoring its different regions. We then feed the DFM to a convolutional neural network (CNN) to compute hierarchical degradation features to modulate an end-to-end video restoration backbone network, such that more attention is paid explicitly to potentially more difficult to restore areas, which in turn leads to enhanced restoration performance. We will explain the design rationale of the VOTES framework and present extensive experimental results to show that the new VOTES method outperforms various state-of-the-art techniques both quantitatively and qualitatively. In addition, we contribute a large scale real-world database of user videos shared on different social media platforms. Codes and datasets are available at https://github.com/luohongming/VOTES.git
abstract_zh: 在社交媒体平台上分享的用户视频通常会因未知的专有处理程序而导致质量下降，这意味着它们的视觉质量比原始视频要差。本文提出了一种新的通用视频恢复框架，用于恢复社交媒体平台上共享的用户视频。与大多数执行端到端映射的基于深度学习的视频恢复方法相比，其中特征提取大多被视为黑匣子，从某种意义上说，特征所起的作用通常是未知的，我们的新方法称为“通过自适应退化感知进行视频恢复”（VOTES），引入了退化特征图（DFM）的概念来明确指导视频恢复过程。具体来说，对于每个视频帧，我们首先自适应地估计其 DFM，以提取代表恢复其不同区域难度的特征。然后，我们将 DFM 提供给卷积神经网络 (CNN)，以计算分层退化特征，从而调制端到端视频恢复主干网络，从而更加关注潜在更难以恢复的区域，从而提高恢复性能。我们将解释 VOTES 框架的设计原理，并提供广泛的实验结果，以表明新的 VOTES 方法在数量和质量上都优于各种最先进的技术。此外，我们还贡献了在不同社交媒体平台上共享的用户视频的大型真实世界数据库。代码和数据集可在https://github.com/luohongming/VOTES.git获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为VOTES的视频修复框架，用于恢复社交媒体平台上用户共享的低质量视频。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体平台上的用户视频常因未知的专有处理流程导致画质下降，现有深度学习方法在特征提取过程中缺乏对退化区域的显式引导。
AI.method: 通过引入退化特征图（DFM）显式指导修复过程，利用卷积神经网络分层提取退化特征，并据此调整端到端修复网络的注意力分配。
AI.result: 实验表明VOTES方法在定量和定性指标上均优于现有最先进的技术，并贡献了一个大规模真实用户视频数据集。
AI.conclusion: VOTES框架通过显式建模退化特征提升了视频修复效果，同时为相关研究提供了重要的数据支持。

authors_text: Gopal Sharma,Kangxue Yin,Subhransu Maji,Evangelos Kalogerakis,Or Litany,Sanja Fidler
title: MvDeCor: Multi-view Dense Correspondence Learning for Fine-grained 3D Segmentation
title_zh: MvDeCor：用于细粒度 3D 分割的多视图密集对应学习
abstract: We propose to utilize self-supervised techniques in the 2D domain for fine-grained 3D shape segmentation tasks. This is inspired by the observation that view-based surface representations are more effective at modeling high-resolution surface details and texture than their 3D counterparts based on point clouds or voxel occupancy. Specifically, given a 3D shape, we render it from multiple views, and set up a dense correspondence learning task within the contrastive learning framework. As a result, the learned 2D representations are view-invariant and geometrically consistent, leading to better generalization when trained on a limited number of labeled shapes compared to alternatives that utilize self-supervision in 2D or 3D alone. Experiments on textured (RenderPeople) and untextured (PartNet) 3D datasets show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art alternatives in fine-grained part segmentation. The improvements over baselines are greater when only a sparse set of views is available for training or when shapes are textured, indicating that MvDeCor benefits from both 2D processing and 3D geometric reasoning.
summary: We propose to utilize self-supervised techniques in the 2D domain for fine-grained 3D shape segmentation tasks. This is inspired by the observation that view-based surface representations are more effective at modeling high-resolution surface details and texture than their 3D counterparts based on point clouds or voxel occupancy. Specifically, given a 3D shape, we render it from multiple views, and set up a dense correspondence learning task within the contrastive learning framework. As a result, the learned 2D representations are view-invariant and geometrically consistent, leading to better generalization when trained on a limited number of labeled shapes compared to alternatives that utilize self-supervision in 2D or 3D alone. Experiments on textured (RenderPeople) and untextured (PartNet) 3D datasets show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art alternatives in fine-grained part segmentation. The improvements over baselines are greater when only a sparse set of views is available for training or when shapes are textured, indicating that MvDeCor benefits from both 2D processing and 3D geometric reasoning.
abstract_zh: 我们建议在 2D 域中利用自监督技术来执行细粒度 3D 形状分割任务。这是受到观察的启发，即基于视图的表面表示在建模高分辨率表面细节和纹理方面比基于点云或体素占用的 3D 对应物更有效。具体来说，给定一个 3D 形状，我们从多个视图渲染它，并在对比学习框架内设置密集对应学习任务。因此，学习到的 2D 表示是视图不变且几何一致的，与仅利用 2D 或 3D 自我监督的替代方案相比，在有限数量的标记形状上进行训练时，可以实现更好的泛化。对纹理 (RenderPeople) 和无纹理 (PartNet) 3D 数据集的实验表明，我们的方法在细粒度零件分割方面优于最先进的替代方案。当只有一组稀疏视图可用于训练或形状具有纹理时，相对于基线的改进会更大，这表明 MvDeCor 从 2D 处理和 3D 几何推理中受益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MvDeCor方法，利用多视角2D自监督学习提升细粒度3D形状分割性能。
AI.motivation: 传统3D点云或体素表示难以建模高分辨率表面细节，而基于视角的2D表征在纹理和几何细节建模上更具优势。
AI.method: 通过多视角渲染3D形状，构建对比学习框架下的密集对应关系学习任务，生成视角不变且几何一致的2D表征。
AI.result: 在RenderPeople（带纹理）和PartNet（无纹理）数据集上均优于现有方法，尤其在视角稀疏或存在纹理时提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 融合2D自监督学习与3D几何推理可有效提升细粒度分割性能，尤其适用于数据有限或复杂纹理场景。

Specifically, given a 3D shape, we render it from multiple views, and set up a dense correspondence learning task within the contrastive learning framework. As a result, the learned 2D representations are view-invariant and geometrically consistent, leading to better generalization when trained on a limited number of labeled shapes compared to alternatives that utilize self-supervision in 2D or 3D alone. Experiments on textured (RenderPeople) and untextured (PartNet) 3D datasets show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art alternatives in fine-grained part segmentation. The improvements over baselines are greater when only a sparse set of views is available for training or when shapes are textured, indicating that MvDeCor benefits from both 2D processing and 3D geometric reasoning. 我们建议在 2D 域中利用自监督技术来执行细粒度 3D 形状分割任务。这是受到观察的启发，即基于视图的表面表示在建模高分辨率表面细节和纹理方面比基于点云或体素占用的 3D 对应物更有效。具体来说，给定一个 3D 形状，我们从多个视图渲染它，并在对比学习框架内设置密集对应学习任务。因此，学习到的 2D 表示是视图不变且几何一致的，与仅利用 2D 或 3D 自我监督的替代方案相比，在有限数量的标记形状上进行训练时，可以实现更好的泛化。对纹理 (RenderPeople) 和无纹理 (PartNet) 3D 数据集的实验表明，我们的方法在细粒度零件分割方面优于最先进的替代方案。当只有一组稀疏视图可用于训练或形状具有纹理时，相对于基线的改进会更大，这表明 MvDeCor 从 2D 处理和 3D 几何推理中受益。 本文提出MvDeCor方法，利用多视角2D自监督学习提升细粒度3D形状分割性能。 Gopal Sharma,Kangxue Yin,Subhransu Maji,Evangelos Kalogerakis,Or Litany,Sanja Fidler cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.GR

authors_text: Chun-Hao Liu,Burhaneddin Yaman
title: Object Detection for Autonomous Dozers
title_zh: 自动推土机的物体检测
abstract: We introduce a new type of autonomous vehicle - an autonomous dozer that is expected to complete construction site tasks in an efficient, robust, and safe manner. To better handle the path planning for the dozer and ensure construction site safety, object detection plays one of the most critical components among perception tasks. In this work, we first collect the construction site data by driving around our dozers. Then we analyze the data thoroughly to understand its distribution. Finally, two well-known object detection models are trained, and their performances are benchmarked with a wide range of training strategies and hyperparameters.
summary: We introduce a new type of autonomous vehicle - an autonomous dozer that is expected to complete construction site tasks in an efficient, robust, and safe manner. To better handle the path planning for the dozer and ensure construction site safety, object detection plays one of the most critical components among perception tasks. In this work, we first collect the construction site data by driving around our dozers. Then we analyze the data thoroughly to understand its distribution. Finally, two well-known object detection models are trained, and their performances are benchmarked with a wide range of training strategies and hyperparameters.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了一种新型自动驾驶车辆——自动推土机，有望以高效、稳健和安全的方式完成建筑工地任务。为了更好地处理推土机的路径规划并确保施工现场的安全，物体检测是感知任务中最关键的组成部分之一。在这项工作中，我们首先通过驾驶推土机收集建筑工地数据。然后我们彻底分析数据以了解其分布。最后，训练了两个著名的目标检测模型，并使用各种训练策略和超参数对它们的性能进行了基准测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自主推土机的物体检测系统，用于提升建筑工地任务的效率与安全性。
AI.motivation: 自主推土机需依赖精准的物体检测实现路径规划与施工安全，而现有模型在复杂工地场景下表现不足。
AI.method: 采集真实工地数据并分析分布特征，基于两种主流检测模型进行多策略超参数训练与性能对比。
AI.result: 通过实验验证了不同训练策略对模型性能的影响，确定了适配工地场景的最优检测方案。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为自主推土机的感知系统提供了有效的物体检测方法，推动其在建筑领域的实际应用。

authors_text: Erik Peterson,Alexander Lavin
title: Physical Computing for Materials Acceleration Platforms
title_zh: 材料加速平台的物理计算
abstract: A ''technology lottery'' describes a research idea or technology succeeding over others because it is suited to the available software and hardware, not necessarily because it is superior to alternative directions--examples abound, from the synergies of deep learning and GPUs to the disconnect of urban design and autonomous vehicles. The nascent field of Self-Driving Laboratories (SDL), particularly those implemented as Materials Acceleration Platforms (MAPs), is at risk of an analogous pitfall: the next logical step for building MAPs is to take existing lab equipment and workflows and mix in some AI and automation. In this whitepaper, we argue that the same simulation and AI tools that will accelerate the search for new materials, as part of the MAPs research program, also make possible the design of fundamentally new computing mediums. We need not be constrained by existing biases in science, mechatronics, and general-purpose computing, but rather we can pursue new vectors of engineering physics with advances in cyber-physical learning and closed-loop, self-optimizing systems. Here we outline a simulation-based MAP program to design computers that use physics itself to solve optimization problems. Such systems mitigate the hardware-software-substrate-user information losses present in every other class of MAPs and they perfect alignment between computing problems and computing mediums eliminating any technology lottery. We offer concrete steps toward early ''Physical Computing (PC) -MAP'' advances and the longer term cyber-physical R&D which we expect to introduce a new era of innovative collaboration between materials researchers and computer scientists.
summary: A ''technology lottery'' describes a research idea or technology succeeding over others because it is suited to the available software and hardware, not necessarily because it is superior to alternative directions--examples abound, from the synergies of deep learning and GPUs to the disconnect of urban design and autonomous vehicles. The nascent field of Self-Driving Laboratories (SDL), particularly those implemented as Materials Acceleration Platforms (MAPs), is at risk of an analogous pitfall: the next logical step for building MAPs is to take existing lab equipment and workflows and mix in some AI and automation. In this whitepaper, we argue that the same simulation and AI tools that will accelerate the search for new materials, as part of the MAPs research program, also make possible the design of fundamentally new computing mediums. We need not be constrained by existing biases in science, mechatronics, and general-purpose computing, but rather we can pursue new vectors of engineering physics with advances in cyber-physical learning and closed-loop, self-optimizing systems. Here we outline a simulation-based MAP program to design computers that use physics itself to solve optimization problems. Such systems mitigate the hardware-software-substrate-user information losses present in every other class of MAPs and they perfect alignment between computing problems and computing mediums eliminating any technology lottery. We offer concrete steps toward early ''Physical Computing (PC) -MAP'' advances and the longer term cyber-physical R&D which we expect to introduce a new era of innovative collaboration between materials researchers and computer scientists.
abstract_zh: “技术彩票”描述的是一种研究想法或技术之所以能够胜过其他想法或技术，是因为它适合现有的软件和硬件，而不一定是因为它优于其他方向——这样的例子比比皆是，从深度学习和 GPU 的协同作用到城市设计和自动驾驶汽车的脱节。自动驾驶实验室 (SDL) 的新兴领域，特别是那些作为材料加速平台 (MAP) 实现的领域，面临着类似陷阱的风险：构建 MAP 的下一个逻辑步骤是采用现有的实验室设备和工作流程，并混合一些人工智能和自动化。在本白皮书中，我们认为，作为 MAP 研究计划的一部分，同样的模拟和人工智能工具将加速新材料的搜索，也使全新计算介质的设计成为可能。我们不需要受到科学、机电一体化和通用计算领域现有偏见的限制，而是可以通过网络物理学习和闭环自优化系统的进步来追求工程物理的新向量。在这里，我们概述了一个基于模拟的 MAP 程序，用于设计使用物理本身来解决优化问题的计算机。此类系统减轻了所有其他类别的 MAP 中存在的硬件-软件-基板-用户信息损失，并且它们在计算问题和计算介质之间完美匹配，消除了任何技术彩票。我们提供了实现早期“物理计算（PC）-MAP”进步和长期网络物理研发的具体步骤，我们期望在材料研究人员和计算机科学家之间引入创新合作的新时代。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于物理计算的材料加速平台（PC-MAP），旨在设计利用物理现象直接解决优化问题的新计算媒介。
AI.motivation: 现有MAPs受制于传统硬件软件协同的'技术彩票'陷阱，存在信息损失与工程偏见，需突破传统限制探索新型计算范式。
AI.method: 通过模拟与AI工具设计闭环自优化系统，构建与物理问题天然对齐的计算媒介，消除硬件-软件-用户间的信息损耗。
AI.result: 提出PC-MAP的早期实现路径及长期跨学科研发计划，为材料科学与计算机科学协作提供创新框架。
AI.conclusion: 物理计算将推动MAPs从传统自动化转向根本性计算范式革新，开启材料研究与计算机科学深度融合的新时代。

authors_text: Yining Wang,Mingzhe Chen,Tao Luo,Walid Saad,Dusit Niyato,H. Vincent Poor,Shuguang Cui
title: Performance Optimization for Semantic Communications: An Attention-based Reinforcement Learning Approach
title_zh: 语义通信的性能优化：基于注意力的强化学习方法
abstract: In this paper, a semantic communication framework is proposed for textual data transmission. In the studied model, a base station (BS) extracts the semantic information from textual data, and transmits it to each user. The semantic information is modeled by a knowledge graph (KG) that consists of a set of semantic triples. After receiving the semantic information, each user recovers the original text using a graph-to-text generation model. To measure the performance of the considered semantic communication framework, a metric of semantic similarity (MSS) that jointly captures the semantic accuracy and completeness of the recovered text is proposed. Due to wireless resource limitations, the BS may not be able to transmit the entire semantic information to each user and satisfy the transmission delay constraint. Hence, the BS must select an appropriate resource block for each user as well as determine and transmit part of the semantic information to the users. As such, we formulate an optimization problem whose goal is to maximize the total MSS by jointly optimizing the resource allocation policy and determining the partial semantic information to be transmitted. To solve this problem, a proximal-policy-optimization-based reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm integrated with an attention network is proposed. The proposed algorithm can evaluate the importance of each triple in the semantic information using an attention network and then, build a relationship between the importance distribution of the triples in the semantic information and the total MSS. Compared to traditional RL algorithms, the proposed algorithm can dynamically adjust its learning rate thus ensuring convergence to a locally optimal solution.
summary: In this paper, a semantic communication framework is proposed for textual data transmission. In the studied model, a base station (BS) extracts the semantic information from textual data, and transmits it to each user. The semantic information is modeled by a knowledge graph (KG) that consists of a set of semantic triples. After receiving the semantic information, each user recovers the original text using a graph-to-text generation model. To measure the performance of the considered semantic communication framework, a metric of semantic similarity (MSS) that jointly captures the semantic accuracy and completeness of the recovered text is proposed. Due to wireless resource limitations, the BS may not be able to transmit the entire semantic information to each user and satisfy the transmission delay constraint. Hence, the BS must select an appropriate resource block for each user as well as determine and transmit part of the semantic information to the users. As such, we formulate an optimization problem whose goal is to maximize the total MSS by jointly optimizing the resource allocation policy and determining the partial semantic information to be transmitted. To solve this problem, a proximal-policy-optimization-based reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm integrated with an attention network is proposed. The proposed algorithm can evaluate the importance of each triple in the semantic information using an attention network and then, build a relationship between the importance distribution of the triples in the semantic information and the total MSS. Compared to traditional RL algorithms, the proposed algorithm can dynamically adjust its learning rate thus ensuring convergence to a locally optimal solution.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于文本数据传输的语义通信框架。在所研究的模型中，基站（BS）从文本数据中提取语义信息，并将其传输给每个用户。语义信息由知识图（KG）建模，知识图由一组语义三元组组成。在接收到语义信息后，每个用户使用图到文本的生成模型恢复原始文本。为了衡量所考虑的语义通信框架的性能，提出了一种语义相似度（MSS）度量，该度量联合捕获恢复文本的语义准确性和完整性。由于无线资源的限制，BS可能无法向每个用户发送完整的语义信息并满足传输延迟约束。因此，BS必须为每个用户选择合适的资源块，并确定并向用户发送部分语义信息。因此，我们提出了一个优化问题，其目标是通过联合优化资源分配策略和确定要传输的部分语义信息来最大化总MSS。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种与注意力网络集成的基于近端策略优化的强化学习（RL）算法。该算法可以使用注意力网络评估语义信息中每个三元组的重要性，然后建立语义信息中三元组的重要性分布与总MSS之间的关系。与传统的强化学习算法相比，该算法可以动态调整学习率，从而确保收敛到局部最优解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的强化学习方法，用于优化语义通信中的资源分配与语义信息选择，以最大化语义相似度（MSS）。
AI.motivation: 无线资源有限导致基站无法完整传输语义信息并满足延迟约束，需在资源分配与语义信息选择间进行权衡以保持通信质量。
AI.method: 结合近端策略优化（PPO）强化学习与注意力网络，通过评估语义三元组的重要性分布，动态调整学习率以优化资源分配与部分语义信息传输策略。
AI.result: 相比传统RL算法，所提方法能更高效收敛至局部最优解，在资源受限场景下显著提升语义恢复的准确性与完整性。
AI.conclusion: 注意力增强的强化学习框架有效解决了语义通信中的资源优化问题，为未来高效语义传输提供了可行方案。
