search_text: Performance Optimization for Semantic Communications: An Attention-based Reinforcement Learning Approach 语义通信的性能优化：基于注意力的强化学习方法 In this paper, a semantic communication framework is proposed for textual data transmission. In the studied model, a base station (BS) extracts the semantic information from textual data, and transmits it to each user. The semantic information is modeled by a knowledge graph (KG) that consists of a set of semantic triples. After receiving the semantic information, each user recovers the original text using a graph-to-text generation model. To measure the performance of the considered semantic communication framework, a metric of semantic similarity (MSS) that jointly captures the semantic accuracy and completeness of the recovered text is proposed. Due to wireless resource limitations, the BS may not be able to transmit the entire semantic information to each user and satisfy the transmission delay constraint. Hence, the BS must select an appropriate resource block for each user as well as determine and transmit part of the semantic information to the users. As such, we formulate an optimization problem whose goal is to maximize the total MSS by jointly optimizing the resource allocation policy and determining the partial semantic information to be transmitted. To solve this problem, a proximal-policy-optimization-based reinforcement learning (RL) algorithm integrated with an attention network is proposed. The proposed algorithm can evaluate the importance of each triple in the semantic information using an attention network and then, build a relationship between the importance distribution of the triples in the semantic information and the total MSS. Compared to traditional RL algorithms, the proposed algorithm can dynamically adjust its learning rate thus ensuring convergence to a locally optimal solution. 本文提出了一种用于文本数据传输的语义通信框架。在所研究的模型中，基站（BS）从文本数据中提取语义信息，并将其传输给每个用户。语义信息由知识图（KG）建模，知识图由一组语义三元组组成。在接收到语义信息后，每个用户使用图到文本的生成模型恢复原始文本。为了衡量所考虑的语义通信框架的性能，提出了一种语义相似度（MSS）度量，该度量联合捕获恢复文本的语义准确性和完整性。由于无线资源的限制，BS可能无法向每个用户发送完整的语义信息并满足传输延迟约束。因此，BS必须为每个用户选择合适的资源块，并确定并向用户发送部分语义信息。因此，我们提出了一个优化问题，其目标是通过联合优化资源分配策略和确定要传输的部分语义信息来最大化总MSS。为了解决这个问题，提出了一种与注意力网络集成的基于近端策略优化的强化学习（RL）算法。该算法可以使用注意力网络评估语义信息中每个三元组的重要性，然后建立语义信息中三元组的重要性分布与总MSS之间的关系。与传统的强化学习算法相比，该算法可以动态调整学习率，从而确保收敛到局部最优解。 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的强化学习方法，用于优化语义通信中的资源分配与语义信息选择，以最大化语义相似度（MSS）。 Yining Wang,Mingzhe Chen,Tao Luo,Walid Saad,Dusit Niyato,H. Vincent Poor,Shuguang Cui cs.IT,cs.AI

authors_text: John Molloy,John McDermid
title: Safety Assessment for Autonomous Systems' Perception Capabilities
title_zh: 自主系统感知能力的安全评估
abstract: Autonomous Systems (AS) are increasingly proposed, or used, in Safety Critical (SC) applications. Many such systems make use of sophisticated sensor suites and processing to provide scene understanding which informs the AS' decision-making. The sensor processing typically makes use of Machine Learning (ML) and has to work in challenging environments, further the ML-algorithms have known limitations,e.g., the possibility of false-negatives or false-positives in object classification. The well-established safety-analysis methods developed for conventional SC systems are not well-matched to AS, ML, or the sensing systems used by AS. This paper proposes an adaptation of well-established safety-analysis methods to address the specifics of perception-systems for AS, including addressing environmental effects and the potential failure-modes of ML, and provides a rationale for choosing particular sets of guidewords, or prompts, for safety-analysis. It goes on to show how the results of the analysis can be used to inform the design and verification of the AS and illustrates the new method by presenting a partial analysis of a road vehicle. Illustrations in the paper are primarily based on optical sensing, however the paper discusses the applicability of the method to other sensing modalities and its role in a wider safety process addressing the overall capabilities of AS.
summary: Autonomous Systems (AS) are increasingly proposed, or used, in Safety Critical (SC) applications. Many such systems make use of sophisticated sensor suites and processing to provide scene understanding which informs the AS' decision-making. The sensor processing typically makes use of Machine Learning (ML) and has to work in challenging environments, further the ML-algorithms have known limitations,e.g., the possibility of false-negatives or false-positives in object classification. The well-established safety-analysis methods developed for conventional SC systems are not well-matched to AS, ML, or the sensing systems used by AS. This paper proposes an adaptation of well-established safety-analysis methods to address the specifics of perception-systems for AS, including addressing environmental effects and the potential failure-modes of ML, and provides a rationale for choosing particular sets of guidewords, or prompts, for safety-analysis. It goes on to show how the results of the analysis can be used to inform the design and verification of the AS and illustrates the new method by presenting a partial analysis of a road vehicle. Illustrations in the paper are primarily based on optical sensing, however the paper discusses the applicability of the method to other sensing modalities and its role in a wider safety process addressing the overall capabilities of AS.
abstract_zh: 自主系统 (AS) 越来越多地在安全关键 (SC) 应用中被提出或使用。许多此类系统利用复杂的传感器套件和处理来提供场景理解，从而为 AS 的决策提供信息。传感器处理通常利用机器学习 (ML)，并且必须在具有挑战性的环境中工作，此外，ML 算法具有已知的局限性，例如，对象分类中可能出现误报或误报。为传统 SC 系统开发的成熟安全分析方法与 AS、ML 或 AS 使用的传感系统不太匹配。本文提出了一种采用完善的安全分析方法来解决 AS 感知系统的具体问题，包括解决环境影响和机器学习的潜在故障模式，并为选择特定的引导词或提示集进行安全分析提供了基本原理。它还展示了如何使用分析结果来指导 AS 的设计和验证，并通过对道路车辆的部分分析来说明新方法。本文中的插图主要基于光学传感，但本文讨论了该方法对其他传感方式的适用性及其在解决 AS 整体功能的更广泛安全过程中的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在将传统安全分析方法适应于自主系统（AS）的感知能力，解决环境影响及机器学习算法的潜在故障模式。
AI.motivation: 现有安全分析方法难以应对自主系统中机器学习算法的局限性及复杂环境挑战，需针对性改进以确保安全关键应用的可靠性。
AI.method: 通过调整传统安全分析方法，结合环境因素与机器学习故障模式，选择特定关键词进行分析，并以道路车辆为例验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 提出的方法可指导自主系统设计与验证，通过部分道路车辆分析展示了其可行性，并讨论了方法对多传感器模态的适用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自主系统感知能力的安全评估提供了新框架，适用于多种传感模态，是整体安全流程的重要组成部分。

authors_text: Swaroop Mishra,Elnaz Nouri
title: HELP ME THINK: A Simple Prompting Strategy for Non-experts to Create Customized Content with Models
title_zh: 帮助我思考：非专家使用模型创建定制内容的简单提示策略
abstract: Controlling the text generated by language models and customizing the content has been a long-standing challenge. Existing prompting techniques proposed in pursuit of providing control are task-specific and lack generality; this provides overwhelming choices for non-expert users to find a suitable method for their task. The effort associated with those techniques, such as in writing examples, explanations, instructions, etc. further limits their adoption among non-expert users. In this paper, we propose a simple prompting strategy HELP ME THINK where we encourage GPT3 to help non-expert users by asking a set of relevant questions and leveraging user answers to execute the task. We demonstrate the efficacy of our technique HELP ME THINK on a variety of tasks. Specifically, we focus on tasks that are hard for average humans and require significant thinking to perform. We hope our work will encourage the development of unconventional ways to harness the power of large language models.
summary: Controlling the text generated by language models and customizing the content has been a long-standing challenge. Existing prompting techniques proposed in pursuit of providing control are task-specific and lack generality; this provides overwhelming choices for non-expert users to find a suitable method for their task. The effort associated with those techniques, such as in writing examples, explanations, instructions, etc. further limits their adoption among non-expert users. In this paper, we propose a simple prompting strategy HELP ME THINK where we encourage GPT3 to help non-expert users by asking a set of relevant questions and leveraging user answers to execute the task. We demonstrate the efficacy of our technique HELP ME THINK on a variety of tasks. Specifically, we focus on tasks that are hard for average humans and require significant thinking to perform. We hope our work will encourage the development of unconventional ways to harness the power of large language models.
abstract_zh: 控制语言模型生成的文本并定制内容一直是​​一个长期存在的挑战。现有的为追求提供控制而提出的提示技术是特定于任务的并且缺乏通用性；这为非专家用户提供了多种选择，以找到适合其任务的方法。与这些技术相关的工作，例如编写示例、解释、说明等，进一步限制了它们在非专家用户中的采用。在本文中，我们提出了一个简单的提示策略“HELP ME THINK”，我们鼓励 GPT3 通过提出一组相关问题并利用用户答案来执行任务来帮助非专家用户。我们展示了我们的技术“帮助我思考”对各种任务的有效性。具体来说，我们专注于对普通人来说困难且需要大量思考才能执行的任务。我们希望我们的工作能够鼓励开发非常规方法来利用大型语言模型的力量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为HELP ME THINK的简单提示策略，帮助非专家用户通过让模型提问并利用用户回答来定制生成内容。
AI.motivation: 现有提示技术任务特定且复杂，非专家用户难以选择和应用，需更简单通用的方法实现内容控制。
AI.method: 通过让GPT3主动向用户提问相关问题，结合用户回答动态调整生成内容，降低非专家用户的使用门槛。
AI.result: 在多种需要深度思考的任务中验证了该方法的有效性，证明其能帮助用户生成符合需求的定制化内容。
AI.conclusion: 该策略为非专家用户提供了一种新颖的模型使用方式，有望推动大语言模型在非传统场景中的应用创新。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为HELP ME THINK的简单提示策略，帮助非专家用户通过让模型提问并利用用户回答来定制生成内容。
ai_content.motivation: 现有提示技术任务特定且复杂，非专家用户难以选择和应用，需更简单通用的方法实现内容控制。
ai_content.method: 通过让GPT3主动向用户提问相关问题，结合用户回答动态调整生成内容，降低非专家用户的使用门槛。

search_text: HELP ME THINK: A Simple Prompting Strategy for Non-experts to Create Customized Content with Models 帮助我思考：非专家使用模型创建定制内容的简单提示策略 Controlling the text generated by language models and customizing the content has been a long-standing challenge. Existing prompting techniques proposed in pursuit of providing control are task-specific and lack generality; this provides overwhelming choices for non-expert users to find a suitable method for their task. The effort associated with those techniques, such as in writing examples, explanations, instructions, etc. further limits their adoption among non-expert users. In this paper, we propose a simple prompting strategy HELP ME THINK where we encourage GPT3 to help non-expert users by asking a set of relevant questions and leveraging user answers to execute the task. We demonstrate the efficacy of our technique HELP ME THINK on a variety of tasks. Specifically, we focus on tasks that are hard for average humans and require significant thinking to perform. We hope our work will encourage the development of unconventional ways to harness the power of large language models. 控制语言模型生成的文本并定制内容一直是​​一个长期存在的挑战。现有的为追求提供控制而提出的提示技术是特定于任务的并且缺乏通用性；这为非专家用户提供了多种选择，以找到适合其任务的方法。与这些技术相关的工作，例如编写示例、解释、说明等，进一步限制了它们在非专家用户中的采用。在本文中，我们提出了一个简单的提示策略“HELP ME THINK”，我们鼓励 GPT3 通过提出一组相关问题并利用用户答案来执行任务来帮助非专家用户。我们展示了我们的技术“帮助我思考”对各种任务的有效性。具体来说，我们专注于对普通人来说困难且需要大量思考才能执行的任务。我们希望我们的工作能够鼓励开发非常规方法来利用大型语言模型的力量。 本文提出一种名为HELP ME THINK的简单提示策略，帮助非专家用户通过让模型提问并利用用户回答来定制生成内容。 Swaroop Mishra,Elnaz Nouri cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Peidi Xu,Faezeh Moshfeghifar,Torkan Gholamalizadeh,Michael Bachmann Nielsen,Kenny Erleben,Sune Darkner
title: Auto-segmentation of Hip Joints using MultiPlanar UNet with Transfer learning
title_zh: 使用 MultiPlanar UNet 和迁移学习自动分割髋关节
comment: Accepted at Medical Image Learning with Limited & Noisy Data (MILLanD), a workshop hosted with the conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Interventions (MICCAI) 2022
comments: Accepted at Medical Image Learning with Limited & Noisy Data (MILLanD), a workshop hosted with the conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Interventions (MICCAI) 2022
abstract: Accurate geometry representation is essential in developing finite element models. Although generally good, deep-learning segmentation approaches with only few data have difficulties in accurately segmenting fine features, e.g., gaps and thin structures. Subsequently, segmented geometries need labor-intensive manual modifications to reach a quality where they can be used for simulation purposes. We propose a strategy that uses transfer learning to reuse datasets with poor segmentation combined with an interactive learning step where fine-tuning of the data results in anatomically accurate segmentations suitable for simulations. We use a modified MultiPlanar UNet that is pre-trained using inferior hip joint segmentation combined with a dedicated loss function to learn the gap regions and post-processing to correct tiny inaccuracies on symmetric classes due to rotational invariance. We demonstrate this robust yet conceptually simple approach applied with clinically validated results on publicly available computed tomography scans of hip joints. Code and resulting 3D models are available at: https://github.com/MICCAI2022-155/AuToSeg}
summary: Accurate geometry representation is essential in developing finite element models. Although generally good, deep-learning segmentation approaches with only few data have difficulties in accurately segmenting fine features, e.g., gaps and thin structures. Subsequently, segmented geometries need labor-intensive manual modifications to reach a quality where they can be used for simulation purposes. We propose a strategy that uses transfer learning to reuse datasets with poor segmentation combined with an interactive learning step where fine-tuning of the data results in anatomically accurate segmentations suitable for simulations. We use a modified MultiPlanar UNet that is pre-trained using inferior hip joint segmentation combined with a dedicated loss function to learn the gap regions and post-processing to correct tiny inaccuracies on symmetric classes due to rotational invariance. We demonstrate this robust yet conceptually simple approach applied with clinically validated results on publicly available computed tomography scans of hip joints. Code and resulting 3D models are available at: https://github.com/MICCAI2022-155/AuToSeg}
abstract_zh: 准确的几何表示对于开发有限元模型至关重要。尽管总体上不错，但只有少量数据的深度学习分割方法在准确分割精细特征（例如间隙和薄结构）方面存在困难。随后，分段几何形状需要进行劳动密集型的手动修改才能达到可用于模拟目的的质量。我们提出了一种策略，使用迁移学习来重用分割不良的数据集，并结合交互式学习步骤，其中数据的微调可以产生适合模拟的解剖学上准确的分割。我们使用改进的 MultiPlanar UNet，该网络使用下髋关节分割与专用损失函数相结合进行预训练，以学习间隙区域和后处理，以纠正由于旋转不变性而导致的对称类的微小误差。我们展示了这种稳健但概念上简单的方法，并将其应用于公开的髋关节计算机断层扫描的临床验证结果。代码和生成的 3D 模型可在以下位置获取：https://github.com/MICCAI2022-155/AuToSeg}

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合迁移学习和改进的多平面UNet网络的自动髋关节分割方法，以提高有限元建模中的几何精度。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习分割方法在数据有限时难以准确分割髋关节的细微结构（如间隙和薄组织），需大量人工修正，效率低下且成本高。
AI.method: 采用预训练于劣质髋关节分割数据的改进多平面UNet网络，结合专用损失函数学习间隙区域，并通过后处理修正对称类别的旋转不变性误差，引入交互式微调步骤提升分割精度。
AI.result: 该方法在公开的髋关节CT数据集上实现了临床验证的分割结果，代码和生成的3D模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过迁移学习与交互式优化有效提升了髋关节分割精度，为有限元仿真提供了高质量几何模型，具有概念简单且鲁棒性强的优势。

authors_text: Muhammad Muzammel,Mohd Zuki Yusoff,Mohamad Naufal Mohamad Saad,Faryal Sheikh,Muhammad Ahsan Awais
title: Blind-Spot Collision Detection System for Commercial Vehicles Using Multi Deep CNN Architecture
title_zh: 使用多重深度 CNN 架构的商用车盲点碰撞检测系统
abstract: Buses and heavy vehicles have more blind spots compared to cars and other road vehicles due to their large sizes. Therefore, accidents caused by these heavy vehicles are more fatal and result in severe injuries to other road users. These possible blind-spot collisions can be identified early using vision-based object detection approaches. Yet, the existing state-of-the-art vision-based object detection models rely heavily on a single feature descriptor for making decisions. In this research, the design of two convolutional neural networks (CNNs) based on high-level feature descriptors and their integration with faster R-CNN is proposed to detect blind-spot collisions for heavy vehicles. Moreover, a fusion approach is proposed to integrate two pre-trained networks (i.e., Resnet 50 and Resnet 101) for extracting high level features for blind-spot vehicle detection. The fusion of features significantly improves the performance of faster R-CNN and outperformed the existing state-of-the-art methods. Both approaches are validated on a self-recorded blind-spot vehicle detection dataset for buses and an online LISA dataset for vehicle detection. For both proposed approaches, a false detection rate (FDR) of 3.05% and 3.49% are obtained for the self recorded dataset, making these approaches suitable for real time applications.
summary: Buses and heavy vehicles have more blind spots compared to cars and other road vehicles due to their large sizes. Therefore, accidents caused by these heavy vehicles are more fatal and result in severe injuries to other road users. These possible blind-spot collisions can be identified early using vision-based object detection approaches. Yet, the existing state-of-the-art vision-based object detection models rely heavily on a single feature descriptor for making decisions. In this research, the design of two convolutional neural networks (CNNs) based on high-level feature descriptors and their integration with faster R-CNN is proposed to detect blind-spot collisions for heavy vehicles. Moreover, a fusion approach is proposed to integrate two pre-trained networks (i.e., Resnet 50 and Resnet 101) for extracting high level features for blind-spot vehicle detection. The fusion of features significantly improves the performance of faster R-CNN and outperformed the existing state-of-the-art methods. Both approaches are validated on a self-recorded blind-spot vehicle detection dataset for buses and an online LISA dataset for vehicle detection. For both proposed approaches, a false detection rate (FDR) of 3.05% and 3.49% are obtained for the self recorded dataset, making these approaches suitable for real time applications.
abstract_zh: 与汽车和其他道路车辆相比，公共汽车和重型车辆由于尺寸较大，因此具有更多盲点。因此，这些重型车辆造成的事故更加致命，并对其他道路使用者造成严重伤害。使用基于视觉的物体检测方法可以及早识别这些可能的盲点碰撞。然而，现有最先进的基于视觉的目标检测模型在很大程度上依赖于单个特征描述符来做出决策。在这项研究中，提出了两个基于高级特征描述符的卷积神经网络（CNN）的设计及其与更快的 R-CNN 的集成，以检测重型车辆的盲点碰撞。此外，还提出了一种融合方法来集成两个预训练网络（即 Resnet 50 和 Resnet 101），以提取盲点车辆检测的高级特征。特征融合显着提高了 Faster R-CNN 的性能，并且优于现有的最先进方法。这两种方法都在自记录的公交车盲点车辆检测数据集和用于车辆检测的在线 LISA 数据集上进行了验证。对于两种提出的方​​法，自记录数据集的错误检测率 (FDR) 分别为 3.05% 和 3.49%，使得这些方法适合实时应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多深度CNN架构的商用车辆盲区碰撞检测系统，通过融合高阶特征提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 大型车辆因盲区多易引发严重事故，现有视觉检测方法依赖单一特征描述符存在局限性，需改进以提高检测准确性。
AI.method: 设计两种基于高阶特征描述符的CNN并集成至faster R-CNN框架，融合Resnet50与Resnet101预训练网络提取特征。
AI.result: 在自建公交盲区数据集和LISA数据集上实现3.05%和3.49%的误检率，验证了方法在实时应用中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 特征融合策略显著提升检测性能，证明所提方法在盲区碰撞检测任务中的可行性与优越性。

The fusion of features significantly improves the performance of faster R-CNN and outperformed the existing state-of-the-art methods. Both approaches are validated on a self-recorded blind-spot vehicle detection dataset for buses and an online LISA dataset for vehicle detection. For both proposed approaches, a false detection rate (FDR) of 3.05% and 3.49% are obtained for the self recorded dataset, making these approaches suitable for real time applications. 与汽车和其他道路车辆相比，公共汽车和重型车辆由于尺寸较大，因此具有更多盲点。因此，这些重型车辆造成的事故更加致命，并对其他道路使用者造成严重伤害。使用基于视觉的物体检测方法可以及早识别这些可能的盲点碰撞。然而，现有最先进的基于视觉的目标检测模型在很大程度上依赖于单个特征描述符来做出决策。在这项研究中，提出了两个基于高级特征描述符的卷积神经网络（CNN）的设计及其与更快的 R-CNN 的集成，以检测重型车辆的盲点碰撞。此外，还提出了一种融合方法来集成两个预训练网络（即 Resnet 50 和 Resnet 101），以提取盲点车辆检测的高级特征。特征融合显着提高了 Faster R-CNN 的性能，并且优于现有的最先进方法。这两种方法都在自记录的公交车盲点车辆检测数据集和用于车辆检测的在线 LISA 数据集上进行了验证。对于两种提出的方​​法，自记录数据集的错误检测率 (FDR) 分别为 3.05% 和 3.49%，使得这些方法适合实时应用。 本文提出一种基于多深度CNN架构的商用车辆盲区碰撞检测系统，通过融合高阶特征提升检测性能。 Muhammad Muzammel,Mohd Zuki Yusoff,Mohamad Naufal Mohamad Saad,Faryal Sheikh,Muhammad Ahsan Awais cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Tung-Lam Duong,Van-Duc Le,Tien-Cuong Bui,Hai-Thien To
title: Towards an Error-free Deep Occupancy Detector for Smart Camera Parking System
title_zh: 为智能摄像头停车系统打造无差错深度占用检测器
comment: Paper got accepted to Oral ECCV workshop (CVCIE)
comments: Paper got accepted to Oral ECCV workshop (CVCIE)
abstract: Although the smart camera parking system concept has existed for decades, a few approaches have fully addressed the system's scalability and reliability. As the cornerstone of a smart parking system is the ability to detect occupancy, traditional methods use the classification backbone to predict spots from a manual labeled grid. This is time-consuming and loses the system's scalability. Additionally, most of the approaches use deep learning models, making them not error-free and not reliable at scale. Thus, we propose an end-to-end smart camera parking system where we provide an autonomous detecting occupancy by an object detector called OcpDet. Our detector also provides meaningful information from contrastive modules: training and spatial knowledge, which avert false detections during inference. We benchmark OcpDet on the existing PKLot dataset and reach competitive results compared to traditional classification solutions. We also introduce an additional SNU-SPS dataset, in which we estimate the system performance from various views and conduct system evaluation in parking assignment tasks. The result from our dataset shows that our system is promising for real-world applications.
summary: Although the smart camera parking system concept has existed for decades, a few approaches have fully addressed the system's scalability and reliability. As the cornerstone of a smart parking system is the ability to detect occupancy, traditional methods use the classification backbone to predict spots from a manual labeled grid. This is time-consuming and loses the system's scalability. Additionally, most of the approaches use deep learning models, making them not error-free and not reliable at scale. Thus, we propose an end-to-end smart camera parking system where we provide an autonomous detecting occupancy by an object detector called OcpDet. Our detector also provides meaningful information from contrastive modules: training and spatial knowledge, which avert false detections during inference. We benchmark OcpDet on the existing PKLot dataset and reach competitive results compared to traditional classification solutions. We also introduce an additional SNU-SPS dataset, in which we estimate the system performance from various views and conduct system evaluation in parking assignment tasks. The result from our dataset shows that our system is promising for real-world applications.
abstract_zh: 尽管智能摄像头停车系统概念已经存在了几十年，但有一些方法已经完全解决了系统的可扩展性和可靠性问题。由于智能停车系统的基石是检测占用的能力，因此传统方法使用分类主干从手动标记的网格中预测停车位。这是非常耗时的并且会失去系统的可扩展性。此外，大多数方法都使用深度学习模型，这使得它们并非没有错误且在规模上不可靠。因此，我们提出了一种端到端智能摄像头停车系统，通过名为 OcpDet 的物体检测器提供自主检测占用情况。我们的检测器还提供来自对比模块的有意义的信息：训练和空间知识，这可以避免推理过程中的错误检测。我们在现有的 PKLot 数据集上对 OcpDet 进行了基准测试，并与传统的分类解决方案相比取得了有竞争力的结果。我们还引入了一个额外的 SNU-SPS 数据集，在其中我们从各种角度估计系统性能，并在停车分配任务中进行系统评估。我们的数据集的结果表明我们的系统在实际应用中很有前景。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的智能摄像头停车系统，通过自主检测车位占用情况以提高系统可扩展性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖手动标注网格导致效率低且缺乏可扩展性，现有深度学习模型存在误检问题，难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 设计名为OcpDet的目标检测器，结合对比模块中的训练与空间知识以减少误检，并在PKLot和新构建的SNU-SPS数据集上进行验证。
AI.result: OcpDet在PKLot数据集上表现与传统分类方法相当，在SNU-SPS数据集的多视角测试中验证了系统在实际停车分配任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过改进检测机制和数据集验证，为智能停车系统的实际应用提供了可靠的技术方案。

authors_text: Jin Huang,Bosong Huang,Weihao Yu,Jing Xiao,Ruzhong Xie,Ke Ruan
title: ODformer: Spatial-Temporal Transformers for Long Sequence Origin-Destination Matrix Forecasting Against Cross Application Scenario
title_zh: ODformer：针对跨应用场景的长序列起点-终点矩阵预测的时空变换器
abstract: Origin-Destination (OD) matrices record directional flow data between pairs of OD regions. The intricate spatiotemporal dependency in the matrices makes the OD matrix forecasting (ODMF) problem not only intractable but also non-trivial. However, most of the related methods are designed for very short sequence time series forecasting in specific application scenarios, which cannot meet the requirements of the variation in scenarios and forecasting length of practical applications. To address these issues, we propose a Transformer-like model named ODformer, with two salient characteristics: (i) the novel OD Attention mechanism, which captures special spatial dependencies between OD pairs of the same origin (destination), greatly improves the ability of the model to predict cross-application scenarios after combining with 2D-GCN that captures spatial dependencies between OD regions. (ii) a PeriodSparse Self-attention that effectively forecasts long sequence OD matrix series while adapting to the periodic differences in different scenarios. Generous experiments in three application backgrounds (i.e., transportation traffic, IP backbone network traffic, crowd flow) show our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Origin-Destination (OD) matrices record directional flow data between pairs of OD regions. The intricate spatiotemporal dependency in the matrices makes the OD matrix forecasting (ODMF) problem not only intractable but also non-trivial. However, most of the related methods are designed for very short sequence time series forecasting in specific application scenarios, which cannot meet the requirements of the variation in scenarios and forecasting length of practical applications. To address these issues, we propose a Transformer-like model named ODformer, with two salient characteristics: (i) the novel OD Attention mechanism, which captures special spatial dependencies between OD pairs of the same origin (destination), greatly improves the ability of the model to predict cross-application scenarios after combining with 2D-GCN that captures spatial dependencies between OD regions. (ii) a PeriodSparse Self-attention that effectively forecasts long sequence OD matrix series while adapting to the periodic differences in different scenarios. Generous experiments in three application backgrounds (i.e., transportation traffic, IP backbone network traffic, crowd flow) show our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 起点-终点 (OD) 矩阵记录 OD 区域对之间的方向流数据。矩阵中复杂的时空依赖性使得 OD 矩阵预测 (ODMF) 问题不仅难以处理，而且非常重要。然而，相关方法大多是针对特定应用场景下的极短序列时间序列预测而设计的，无法满足实际应用中场景变化和预测长度的要求。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种名为 ODformer 的类似 Transformer 的模型，它具有两个显着特征：（i）新颖的 OD Attention 机制，捕获同一起点（目的地）的 OD 对之间的特殊空间依赖关系，与捕获 OD 区域之间的空间依赖关系的 2D-GCN 结合后，大大提高了模型预测跨应用场景的能力。 (ii)PeriodSparse Self-attention，有效预测长序列 OD 矩阵系列，同时适应不同场景的周期性差异。在三个应用背景（即交通流量、IP骨干网络流量、人群流量）中进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ODformer模型，用于跨应用场景的长序列OD矩阵预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多针对特定场景的短序列预测，难以满足实际应用中场景变化和长序列预测的需求。
AI.method: 设计OD注意力机制结合2D-GCN捕捉空间依赖，并引入周期稀疏自注意力机制适应不同场景的周期性差异。
AI.result: 在交通流量、IP骨干网流量和人群流动三个场景的实验中，该方法优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: ODformer通过空间-时间变换器有效解决了跨应用场景的长序列OD矩阵预测问题。

authors_text: Quentin Leroy,Olivier Buisson,Alexis Joly
title: How does the degree of novelty impacts semi-supervised representation learning for novel class retrieval?
title_zh: 新颖程度如何影响小说类别检索的半监督表示学习？
abstract: Supervised representation learning with deep networks tends to overfit the training classes and the generalization to novel classes is a challenging question. It is common to evaluate a learned embedding on held-out images of the same training classes. In real applications however, data comes from new sources and novel classes are likely to arise. We hypothesize that incorporating unlabelled images of novel classes in the training set in a semi-supervised fashion would be beneficial for the efficient retrieval of novel-class images compared to a vanilla supervised representation. To verify this hypothesis in a comprehensive way, we propose an original evaluation methodology that varies the degree of novelty of novel classes by partitioning the dataset category-wise either randomly, or semantically, i.e. by minimizing the shared semantics between base and novel classes. This evaluation procedure allows to train a representation blindly to any novel-class labels and evaluate the frozen representation on the retrieval of base or novel classes. We find that a vanilla supervised representation falls short on the retrieval of novel classes even more so when the semantics gap is higher. Semi-supervised algorithms allow to partially bridge this performance gap but there is still much room for improvement.
summary: Supervised representation learning with deep networks tends to overfit the training classes and the generalization to novel classes is a challenging question. It is common to evaluate a learned embedding on held-out images of the same training classes. In real applications however, data comes from new sources and novel classes are likely to arise. We hypothesize that incorporating unlabelled images of novel classes in the training set in a semi-supervised fashion would be beneficial for the efficient retrieval of novel-class images compared to a vanilla supervised representation. To verify this hypothesis in a comprehensive way, we propose an original evaluation methodology that varies the degree of novelty of novel classes by partitioning the dataset category-wise either randomly, or semantically, i.e. by minimizing the shared semantics between base and novel classes. This evaluation procedure allows to train a representation blindly to any novel-class labels and evaluate the frozen representation on the retrieval of base or novel classes. We find that a vanilla supervised representation falls short on the retrieval of novel classes even more so when the semantics gap is higher. Semi-supervised algorithms allow to partially bridge this performance gap but there is still much room for improvement.
abstract_zh: 使用深度网络的监督表示学习往往会过度拟合训练类，并且泛化到新类是一个具有挑战性的问题。在相同训练类的保留图像上评估学习嵌入是很常见的。然而，在实际应用中，数据来自新的来源，并且可能会出现新的类。我们假设，与普通的监督表示相比，以半监督方式将新类的未标记图像合并到训练集中将有利于新类图像的有效检索。为了全面验证这一假设，我们提出了一种原始的评估方法，通过随机或语义地按数据集类别划分来改变新颖类的新颖程度，即通过最小化基础类和新颖类之间的共享语义。该评估过程允许对任何新颖类标签盲目地训练表示，并在检索基本类或新颖类时评估冻结表示。我们发现，普通的监督表示在检索新颖类方面存在不足，当语义差距较大时更是如此。半监督算法可以部分弥补这种性能差距，但仍有很大的改进空间。

AI.tldr: 本文研究新颖性程度对半监督表示学习在新类别检索中的影响，提出了一种评估方法以分析不同新颖性水平下的模型表现。
AI.motivation: 监督表示学习容易过拟合训练类别，难以推广到新类别。实际应用中常遇到新来源数据和新类别，需探索半监督方法是否能提升新类别检索效果。
AI.method: 通过按类别随机或语义划分数据集，控制新旧类别间语义重叠程度，构建评估框架，在无标签新类别数据下训练模型并测试其检索能力。
AI.result: 纯监督方法在语义差距较大时新类别检索性能显著下降，半监督算法部分弥补了差距，但仍有较大提升空间。
AI.conclusion: 半监督学习能有效缓解新类别检索难题，但需进一步优化以应对更高语义差异场景。

search_text: How does the degree of novelty impacts semi-supervised representation learning for novel class retrieval? 新颖程度如何影响小说类别检索的半监督表示学习？ Supervised representation learning with deep networks tends to overfit the training classes and the generalization to novel classes is a challenging question. It is common to evaluate a learned embedding on held-out images of the same training classes. In real applications however, data comes from new sources and novel classes are likely to arise. We hypothesize that incorporating unlabelled images of novel classes in the training set in a semi-supervised fashion would be beneficial for the efficient retrieval of novel-class images compared to a vanilla supervised representation. To verify this hypothesis in a comprehensive way, we propose an original evaluation methodology that varies the degree of novelty of novel classes by partitioning the dataset category-wise either randomly, or semantically, i.e. by minimizing the shared semantics between base and novel classes. This evaluation procedure allows to train a representation blindly to any novel-class labels and evaluate the frozen representation on the retrieval of base or novel classes. We find that a vanilla supervised representation falls short on the retrieval of novel classes even more so when the semantics gap is higher. Semi-supervised algorithms allow to partially bridge this performance gap but there is still much room for improvement. 使用深度网络的监督表示学习往往会过度拟合训练类，并且泛化到新类是一个具有挑战性的问题。在相同训练类的保留图像上评估学习嵌入是很常见的。然而，在实际应用中，数据来自新的来源，并且可能会出现新的类。我们假设，与普通的监督表示相比，以半监督方式将新类的未标记图像合并到训练集中将有利于新类图像的有效检索。为了全面验证这一假设，我们提出了一种原始的评估方法，通过随机或语义地按数据集类别划分来改变新颖类的新颖程度，即通过最小化基础类和新颖类之间的共享语义。该评估过程允许对任何新颖类标签盲目地训练表示，并在检索基本类或新颖类时评估冻结表示。我们发现，普通的监督表示在检索新颖类方面存在不足，当语义差距较大时更是如此。半监督算法可以部分弥补这种性能差距，但仍有很大的改进空间。 本文研究新颖性程度对半监督表示学习在新类别检索中的影响，提出了一种评估方法以分析不同新颖性水平下的模型表现。 Quentin Leroy,Olivier Buisson,Alexis Joly cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Woohyeon Moon,Bumgeun Park,Sarvar Hussain Nengroo,Taeyoung Kim,Dongsoo Har
title: Path Planning of Cleaning Robot with Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 强化学习的清洁机器人路径规划
abstract: Recently, as the demand for cleaning robots has steadily increased, therefore household electricity consumption is also increasing. To solve this electricity consumption issue, the problem of efficient path planning for cleaning robot has become important and many studies have been conducted. However, most of them are about moving along a simple path segment, not about the whole path to clean all places. As the emerging deep learning technique, reinforcement learning (RL) has been adopted for cleaning robot. However, the models for RL operate only in a specific cleaning environment, not the various cleaning environment. The problem is that the models have to retrain whenever the cleaning environment changes. To solve this problem, the proximal policy optimization (PPO) algorithm is combined with an efficient path planning that operates in various cleaning environments, using transfer learning (TL), detection nearest cleaned tile, reward shaping, and making elite set methods. The proposed method is validated with an ablation study and comparison with conventional methods such as random and zigzag. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves improved training performance and increased convergence speed over the original PPO. And it also demonstrates that this proposed method is better performance than conventional methods (random, zigzag).
summary: Recently, as the demand for cleaning robots has steadily increased, therefore household electricity consumption is also increasing. To solve this electricity consumption issue, the problem of efficient path planning for cleaning robot has become important and many studies have been conducted. However, most of them are about moving along a simple path segment, not about the whole path to clean all places. As the emerging deep learning technique, reinforcement learning (RL) has been adopted for cleaning robot. However, the models for RL operate only in a specific cleaning environment, not the various cleaning environment. The problem is that the models have to retrain whenever the cleaning environment changes. To solve this problem, the proximal policy optimization (PPO) algorithm is combined with an efficient path planning that operates in various cleaning environments, using transfer learning (TL), detection nearest cleaned tile, reward shaping, and making elite set methods. The proposed method is validated with an ablation study and comparison with conventional methods such as random and zigzag. The experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves improved training performance and increased convergence speed over the original PPO. And it also demonstrates that this proposed method is better performance than conventional methods (random, zigzag).
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着清洁机器人的需求量不断增加，家庭用电量也随之增加。为了解决这个电力消耗问题，清洁机器人的有效路径规划问题变得很重要，并且已经进行了许多研究。然而，大多数都是沿着简单的路径段移动，而不是清洁整个路径以清洁所有地方。作为新兴的深度学习技术，强化学习（RL）已被应用于清洁机器人。然而，RL 模型仅在特定的清洁环境中运行，而不是在各种清洁环境中运行。问题在于，只要清洁环境发生变化，模型就必须重新训练。为了解决这个问题，近端策略优化（PPO）算法与在各种清洁环境中运行的高效路径规划相结合，使用迁移学习（TL）、检测最近清洁的瓷砖、奖励整形和制定精英集方法。通过消融研究并与随机和锯齿等传统方法进行比较，对所提出的方法进行了验证。实验结果表明，与原始 PPO 相比，该方法提高了训练性能并提高了收敛速度。它还表明该方法比传统方法（随机、之字形）具有更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的清洁机器人路径规划方法，旨在提高清洁效率并适应多种环境。
AI.motivation: 现有清洁机器人路径规划方法在复杂或变化环境中效率低下，需频繁重新训练模型以适应新环境，导致能耗和时间成本增加。
AI.method: 结合近端策略优化（PPO）算法与迁移学习（TL），采用最近清洁瓷砖检测、奖励塑造及精英集方法，实现跨环境的高效路径规划。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法相比原始PPO算法训练性能提升、收敛速度加快，且优于传统随机和之字形路径规划方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合方法有效解决了清洁机器人在多变环境中的路径规划问题，提升了适应性与清洁效率。

authors_text: Marcel Grimmer,Haoyu Zhang,Raghavendra Ramachandra,Kiran Raja,Christoph Busch
title: Time flies by: Analyzing the Impact of Face Ageing on the Recognition Performance with Synthetic Data
title_zh: 时光飞逝：利用综合数据分析人脸老化对识别性能的影响
abstract: The vast progress in synthetic image synthesis enables the generation of facial images in high resolution and photorealism. In biometric applications, the main motivation for using synthetic data is to solve the shortage of publicly-available biometric data while reducing privacy risks when processing such sensitive information. These advantages are exploited in this work by simulating human face ageing with recent face age modification algorithms to generate mated samples, thereby studying the impact of ageing on the performance of an open-source biometric recognition system. Further, a real dataset is used to evaluate the effects of short-term ageing, comparing the biometric performance to the synthetic domain. The main findings indicate that short-term ageing in the range of 1-5 years has only minor effects on the general recognition performance. However, the correct verification of mated faces with long-term age differences beyond 20 years poses still a significant challenge and requires further investigation.
summary: The vast progress in synthetic image synthesis enables the generation of facial images in high resolution and photorealism. In biometric applications, the main motivation for using synthetic data is to solve the shortage of publicly-available biometric data while reducing privacy risks when processing such sensitive information. These advantages are exploited in this work by simulating human face ageing with recent face age modification algorithms to generate mated samples, thereby studying the impact of ageing on the performance of an open-source biometric recognition system. Further, a real dataset is used to evaluate the effects of short-term ageing, comparing the biometric performance to the synthetic domain. The main findings indicate that short-term ageing in the range of 1-5 years has only minor effects on the general recognition performance. However, the correct verification of mated faces with long-term age differences beyond 20 years poses still a significant challenge and requires further investigation.
abstract_zh: 合成图像合成的巨大进步使得能够生成高分辨率和真实感的面部图像。在生物识别应用中，使用合成数据的主要动机是解决公开可用的生物识别数据的短缺，同时减少处理此类敏感信息时的隐私风险。这项工作利用了这些优势，通过使用最新的人脸年龄修改算法来模拟人脸衰老来生成配对样本，从而研究衰老对开源生物特征识别系统性能的影响。此外，使用真实数据集来评估短期老化的影响，将生物识别性能与合成域进行比较。主要研究结果表明，1-5 年范围内的短期老化对一般识别性能的影响很小。然而，正确验证长期年龄差异超过 20 岁的交配面孔仍然是一个重大挑战，需要进一步研究。

AI.tldr: 本文通过合成数据研究面部老化对开放源代码生物识别系统性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 利用合成图像解决生物特征数据不足及隐私风险，通过模拟面部老化生成配对样本以分析年龄差异对识别的影响。
AI.method: 采用近期面部年龄修改算法生成合成老化样本，并与真实数据集对比，评估短期（1-5年）和长期（超20年）年龄差异的影响。
AI.result: 短期年龄差异（1-5年）对识别性能影响较小，但长期年龄差异（超20年）仍显著影响配对人脸的正确验证率。
AI.conclusion: 短期面部老化对生物识别影响有限，但长期年龄差异需进一步研究以提升系统鲁棒性。

ai_content_json.method: 采用近期面部年龄修改算法生成合成老化样本，并与真实数据集对比，评估短期（1-5年）和长期（超20年）年龄差异的影响。
ai_content_json.result: 短期年龄差异（1-5年）对识别性能影响较小，但长期年龄差异（超20年）仍显著影响配对人脸的正确验证率。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 短期面部老化对生物识别影响有限，但长期年龄差异需进一步研究以提升系统鲁棒性。

search_text: Time flies by: Analyzing the Impact of Face Ageing on the Recognition Performance with Synthetic Data 时光飞逝：利用综合数据分析人脸老化对识别性能的影响 The vast progress in synthetic image synthesis enables the generation of facial images in high resolution and photorealism. In biometric applications, the main motivation for using synthetic data is to solve the shortage of publicly-available biometric data while reducing privacy risks when processing such sensitive information. These advantages are exploited in this work by simulating human face ageing with recent face age modification algorithms to generate mated samples, thereby studying the impact of ageing on the performance of an open-source biometric recognition system. Further, a real dataset is used to evaluate the effects of short-term ageing, comparing the biometric performance to the synthetic domain. The main findings indicate that short-term ageing in the range of 1-5 years has only minor effects on the general recognition performance. However, the correct verification of mated faces with long-term age differences beyond 20 years poses still a significant challenge and requires further investigation. 合成图像合成的巨大进步使得能够生成高分辨率和真实感的面部图像。在生物识别应用中，使用合成数据的主要动机是解决公开可用的生物识别数据的短缺，同时减少处理此类敏感信息时的隐私风险。这项工作利用了这些优势，通过使用最新的人脸年龄修改算法来模拟人脸衰老来生成配对样本，从而研究衰老对开源生物特征识别系统性能的影响。此外，使用真实数据集来评估短期老化的影响，将生物识别性能与合成域进行比较。主要研究结果表明，1-5 年范围内的短期老化对一般识别性能的影响很小。然而，正确验证长期年龄差异超过 20 岁的交配面孔仍然是一个重大挑战，需要进一步研究。 本文通过合成数据研究面部老化对开放源代码生物识别系统性能的影响。 Marcel Grimmer,Haoyu Zhang,Raghavendra Ramachandra,Kiran Raja,Christoph Busch cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Fetullah Atas,Grzegorz Cielniak,Lars Grimstad
title: Elevation State-Space: Surfel-Based Navigation in Uneven Environments for Mobile Robots
title_zh: 高程状态空间：移动机器人不平坦环境中基于面元的导航
abstract: This paper introduces a new method for robot motion planning and navigation in uneven environments through a surfel representation of underlying point clouds. The proposed method addresses the shortcomings of state-of-the-art navigation methods by incorporating both kinematic and physical constraints of a robot with standard motion planning algorithms (e.g., those from the Open Motion Planning Library), thus enabling efficient sampling-based planners for challenging uneven terrain navigation on raw point cloud maps. Unlike techniques based on Digital Elevation Maps (DEMs), our novel surfel-based state-space formulation and implementation are based on raw point cloud maps, allowing for the modeling of overlapping surfaces such as bridges, piers, and tunnels. Experimental results demonstrate the robustness of the proposed method for robot navigation in real and simulated unstructured environments. The proposed approach also optimizes planners' performances by boosting their success rates up to 5x for challenging unstructured terrain planning and navigation, thanks to our surfel-based approach's robot constraint-aware sampling strategy. Finally, we provide an open-source implementation of the proposed method to benefit the robotics community.
summary: This paper introduces a new method for robot motion planning and navigation in uneven environments through a surfel representation of underlying point clouds. The proposed method addresses the shortcomings of state-of-the-art navigation methods by incorporating both kinematic and physical constraints of a robot with standard motion planning algorithms (e.g., those from the Open Motion Planning Library), thus enabling efficient sampling-based planners for challenging uneven terrain navigation on raw point cloud maps. Unlike techniques based on Digital Elevation Maps (DEMs), our novel surfel-based state-space formulation and implementation are based on raw point cloud maps, allowing for the modeling of overlapping surfaces such as bridges, piers, and tunnels. Experimental results demonstrate the robustness of the proposed method for robot navigation in real and simulated unstructured environments. The proposed approach also optimizes planners' performances by boosting their success rates up to 5x for challenging unstructured terrain planning and navigation, thanks to our surfel-based approach's robot constraint-aware sampling strategy. Finally, we provide an open-source implementation of the proposed method to benefit the robotics community.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种通过底层点云的面元表示在不平坦环境中进行机器人运动规划和导航的新方法。所提出的方法通过将机器人的运动学和物理约束与标准运动规划算法（例如，来自开放运动规划库的算法）结合起来，解决了最先进的导航方法的缺点，从而使基于采样的规划器能够高效地应对原始点云地图上的不平坦地形导航。与基于数字高程图 (DEM) 的技术不同，我们新颖的基于面元的状态空间公式和实现基于原始点云图，允许对桥梁、码头和隧道等重叠表面进行建模。实验结果证明了所提出的机器人导航方法在真实和模拟非结构化环境中的鲁棒性。得益于我们基于面元的方法的机器人约束感知采样策略，所提出的方法还优化了规划人员的性能，将具有挑战性的非结构化地形规划和导航的成功率提高了 5 倍。最后，我们提供了所提出方法的开源实现，以使机器人社区受益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于surfel表示的移动机器人导航方法，用于解决复杂不平地形中的运动规划问题。
AI.motivation: 现有导航方法在处理重叠表面（如桥梁、隧道）和复杂地形时存在不足，且未充分结合机器人物理约束。
AI.method: 通过原始点云构建surfel状态空间，融合机器人运动学与物理约束，改进采样策略并与Open Motion Planning Library算法结合。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在真实/模拟非结构化地形中成功率提升5倍，且能有效处理复杂表面结构。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升机器人导航性能，开源实现有助于推动相关研究发展。

authors_text: Hai Pham,Guoxin Wang,Yijuan Lu,Dinei Florencio,Cha Zhang
title: Understanding Long Documents with Different Position-Aware Attentions
title_zh: 理解具有不同位置感知注意力的长文档
abstract: Despite several successes in document understanding, the practical task for long document understanding is largely under-explored due to several challenges in computation and how to efficiently absorb long multimodal input. Most current transformer-based approaches only deal with short documents and employ solely textual information for attention due to its prohibitive computation and memory limit. To address those issues in long document understanding, we explore different approaches in handling 1D and new 2D position-aware attention with essentially shortened context. Experimental results show that our proposed models have advantages for this task based on various evaluation metrics. Furthermore, our model makes changes only to the attention and thus can be easily adapted to any transformer-based architecture.
summary: Despite several successes in document understanding, the practical task for long document understanding is largely under-explored due to several challenges in computation and how to efficiently absorb long multimodal input. Most current transformer-based approaches only deal with short documents and employ solely textual information for attention due to its prohibitive computation and memory limit. To address those issues in long document understanding, we explore different approaches in handling 1D and new 2D position-aware attention with essentially shortened context. Experimental results show that our proposed models have advantages for this task based on various evaluation metrics. Furthermore, our model makes changes only to the attention and thus can be easily adapted to any transformer-based architecture.
abstract_zh: 尽管在文档理解方面取得了一些成功，但由于计算以及如何有效吸收长多模态输入方面的一些挑战，长文档理解的实际任务在很大程度上尚未得到充分探索。大多数基于电流互感器的方法仅处理短文档，并且由于其令人望而却步的计算和内存限制而仅使用文本信息来引起注意。为了解决长文档理解中的这些问题，我们探索了在本质上缩短上下文的情况下处理 1D 和新的 2D 位置感知注意力的不同方法。实验结果表明，基于各种评估指标，我们提出的模型在这项任务中具有优势。此外，我们的模型仅对注意力进行更改，因此可以轻松适应任何基于变压器的架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于不同位置感知注意力机制的方法，用于解决长文档理解中的计算和内存限制问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer方法在处理长文档时面临计算和内存瓶颈，且主要依赖文本信息，难以高效处理长多模态输入。
AI.method: 探索1D和新型2D位置感知注意力机制，通过缩短上下文长度优化模型结构。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提模型在多项评估指标上优于现有方法，且能无缝适配任意Transformer架构。
AI.conclusion: 位置感知注意力机制有效提升了长文档理解性能，具有良好的模型兼容性与扩展性。

authors_text: Nandita Pattnaik,Shujun Li,Jason R. C. Nurse
title: A Survey of User Perspectives on Security and Privacy in a Home Networking Environment
title_zh: 家庭网络环境中用户对安全和隐私的看法调查
comment: 35 pages, Published in ACM Computing Surveys
comments: 35 pages, Published in ACM Computing Surveys
abstract: The security and privacy of smart home systems, particularly from a home user's perspective, have been a very active research area in recent years. However, via a meta-review of 52 review papers covering related topics (published between 2000 and 2021), this paper shows a lack of a more recent literature review on user perspectives of smart home security and privacy since the 2010s. This identified gap motivated us to conduct a systematic literature review (SLR) covering 126 relevant research papers published from 2010 to 2021. Our SLR led to the discovery of a number of important areas where further research is needed; these include holistic methods that consider a more diverse and heterogeneous range of home devices, interactions between multiple home users, complicated data flow between multiple home devices and home users, some less-studied demographic factors, and advanced conceptual frameworks. Based on these findings, we recommended key future research directions, e.g., research for a better understanding of security and privacy aspects in different multi-device and multi-user contexts, and a more comprehensive ontology on the security and privacy of the smart home covering varying types of home devices and behaviors of different types of home users.
summary: The security and privacy of smart home systems, particularly from a home user's perspective, have been a very active research area in recent years. However, via a meta-review of 52 review papers covering related topics (published between 2000 and 2021), this paper shows a lack of a more recent literature review on user perspectives of smart home security and privacy since the 2010s. This identified gap motivated us to conduct a systematic literature review (SLR) covering 126 relevant research papers published from 2010 to 2021. Our SLR led to the discovery of a number of important areas where further research is needed; these include holistic methods that consider a more diverse and heterogeneous range of home devices, interactions between multiple home users, complicated data flow between multiple home devices and home users, some less-studied demographic factors, and advanced conceptual frameworks. Based on these findings, we recommended key future research directions, e.g., research for a better understanding of security and privacy aspects in different multi-device and multi-user contexts, and a more comprehensive ontology on the security and privacy of the smart home covering varying types of home devices and behaviors of different types of home users.
abstract_zh: 智能家居系统的安全和隐私，特别是从家庭用户的角度来看，近年来一直是一个非常活跃的研究领域。然而，通过对涵盖相关主题的 52 篇评论论文（2000 年至 2021 年发表）进行元审查，本文显示自 2010 年代以来缺乏关于智能家居安全和隐私的用户观点的更新文献综述。这一发现的差距促使我们进行了系统文献综述 (SLR)，涵盖 2010 年至 2021 年发表的 126 篇相关研究论文。我们的 SLR 发现了一些需要进一步研究的重要领域；其中包括考虑更加多样化和异构的家庭设备、多个家庭用户之间的交互、多个家庭设备和家庭用户之间的复杂数据流、一些研究较少的人口统计因素以及先进的概念框架的整体方法。基于这些发现，我们推荐了未来的关键研究方向，例如，更好地理解不同多设备和多用户环境中的安全和隐私方面的研究，以及涵盖不同类型的家庭设备和不同类型家庭用户行为的智能家居安全和隐私的更全面的本体论。

AI.tldr: 系统综述家庭网络环境中用户对安全和隐私的视角，识别研究空白并提出未来方向
AI.motivation: 现有综述未涵盖2010年后最新研究，需更新文献综述以识别新研究方向
AI.method: 通过元回顾52篇综述论文，进行系统文献综述（SLR）分析126篇相关论文
AI.result: 发现需研究多设备多用户环境、复杂数据流、未被研究的人口因素及高级概念框架

search_text: A Survey of User Perspectives on Security and Privacy in a Home Networking Environment 家庭网络环境中用户对安全和隐私的看法调查 The security and privacy of smart home systems, particularly from a home user's perspective, have been a very active research area in recent years. However, via a meta-review of 52 review papers covering related topics (published between 2000 and 2021), this paper shows a lack of a more recent literature review on user perspectives of smart home security and privacy since the 2010s. This identified gap motivated us to conduct a systematic literature review (SLR) covering 126 relevant research papers published from 2010 to 2021. Our SLR led to the discovery of a number of important areas where further research is needed; these include holistic methods that consider a more diverse and heterogeneous range of home devices, interactions between multiple home users, complicated data flow between multiple home devices and home users, some less-studied demographic factors, and advanced conceptual frameworks. Based on these findings, we recommended key future research directions, e.g., research for a better understanding of security and privacy aspects in different multi-device and multi-user contexts, and a more comprehensive ontology on the security and privacy of the smart home covering varying types of home devices and behaviors of different types of home users. 智能家居系统的安全和隐私，特别是从家庭用户的角度来看，近年来一直是一个非常活跃的研究领域。然而，通过对涵盖相关主题的 52 篇评论论文（2000 年至 2021 年发表）进行元审查，本文显示自 2010 年代以来缺乏关于智能家居安全和隐私的用户观点的更新文献综述。这一发现的差距促使我们进行了系统文献综述 (SLR)，涵盖 2010 年至 2021 年发表的 126 篇相关研究论文。我们的 SLR 发现了一些需要进一步研究的重要领域；其中包括考虑更加多样化和异构的家庭设备、多个家庭用户之间的交互、多个家庭设备和家庭用户之间的复杂数据流、一些研究较少的人口统计因素以及先进的概念框架的整体方法。基于这些发现，我们推荐了未来的关键研究方向，例如，更好地理解不同多设备和多用户环境中的安全和隐私方面的研究，以及涵盖不同类型的家庭设备和不同类型家庭用户行为的智能家居安全和隐私的更全面的本体论。 系统综述家庭网络环境中用户对安全和隐私的视角，识别研究空白并提出未来方向 Nandita Pattnaik,Shujun Li,Jason R. C. Nurse cs.HC,cs.CR

authors_text: Dan Navon,Alex M. Bronstein
title: Transformer Vs. MLP-Mixer: Exponential Expressive Gap For NLP Problems
title_zh: 变压器对比。 MLP-Mixer：NLP 问题的指数表达差距
abstract: Vision-Transformers are widely used in various vision tasks. Meanwhile, there is another line of works starting with the MLP-mixer trying to achieve similar performance using mlp-based architectures. Interestingly, until now those mlp-based architectures have not been adapted for NLP tasks. Additionally, until now, mlp-based architectures have failed to achieve state-of-the-art performance in vision tasks. In this paper, we analyze the expressive power of mlp-based architectures in modeling dependencies between multiple different inputs simultaneously, and show an exponential gap between the attention and the mlp-based mechanisms. Our results suggest a theoretical explanation for the mlp inability to compete with attention-based mechanisms in NLP problems, they also suggest that the performance gap in vision tasks may be due to the mlp relative weakness in modeling dependencies between multiple different locations, and that combining smart input permutations with mlp architectures may not be enough to close the performance gap alone.
summary: Vision-Transformers are widely used in various vision tasks. Meanwhile, there is another line of works starting with the MLP-mixer trying to achieve similar performance using mlp-based architectures. Interestingly, until now those mlp-based architectures have not been adapted for NLP tasks. Additionally, until now, mlp-based architectures have failed to achieve state-of-the-art performance in vision tasks. In this paper, we analyze the expressive power of mlp-based architectures in modeling dependencies between multiple different inputs simultaneously, and show an exponential gap between the attention and the mlp-based mechanisms. Our results suggest a theoretical explanation for the mlp inability to compete with attention-based mechanisms in NLP problems, they also suggest that the performance gap in vision tasks may be due to the mlp relative weakness in modeling dependencies between multiple different locations, and that combining smart input permutations with mlp architectures may not be enough to close the performance gap alone.
abstract_zh: Vision-Transformers 广泛应用于各种视觉任务。与此同时，还有另一系列工作从 MLP 混合器开始，试图使用基于 MLP 的架构来实现类似的性能。有趣的是，到目前为止，那些基于 mlp 的架构尚未适用于 NLP 任务。此外，到目前为止，基于 MLP 的架构未能在视觉任务中实现最先进的性能。在本文中，我们分析了基于 mlp 的架构在同时建模多个不同输入之间的依赖关系方面的表达能力，并显示了注意力机制和基于 mlp 的机制之间的指数差距。我们的结果为 MLP 无法在 NLP 问题中与基于注意力的机制竞争提供了理论解释，他们还表明视觉任务中的性能差距可能是由于 MLP 在建模多个不同位置之间的依赖关系方面相对较弱，并且将智能输入排列与 MLP 架构相结合可能不足以单独缩小性能差距。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了Transformer与MLP-Mixer在NLP任务中的表现，揭示了二者在表达能力上的指数级差距。
AI.motivation: 现有MLP架构在视觉和NLP任务中未能达到SOTA，需探究其在建模多输入依赖上的局限性。
AI.method: 通过理论分析比较注意力机制与MLP在建模多输入依赖时的表达能力，证明其指数级差距。
AI.result: 发现注意力机制与MLP存在指数级表达能力差距，MLP在建模多位置依赖上较弱。
AI.conclusion: MLP架构在表达能力上难以匹敌Transformer，单纯优化输入排列不足以缩小性能差距。

authors_text: Gabriel Van Zandycke,Vladimir Somers,Maxime Istasse,Carlo Del Don,Davide Zambrano
title: DeepSportradar-v1: Computer Vision Dataset for Sports Understanding with High Quality Annotations
title_zh: DeepSportradar-v1：用于运动理解的计算机视觉数据集，具有高质量注释
abstract: With the recent development of Deep Learning applied to Computer Vision, sport video understanding has gained a lot of attention, providing much richer information for both sport consumers and leagues. This paper introduces DeepSportradar-v1, a suite of computer vision tasks, datasets and benchmarks for automated sport understanding. The main purpose of this framework is to close the gap between academic research and real world settings. To this end, the datasets provide high-resolution raw images, camera parameters and high quality annotations. DeepSportradar currently supports four challenging tasks related to basketball: ball 3D localization, camera calibration, player instance segmentation and player re-identification. For each of the four tasks, a detailed description of the dataset, objective, performance metrics, and the proposed baseline method are provided. To encourage further research on advanced methods for sport understanding, a competition is organized as part of the MMSports workshop from the ACM Multimedia 2022 conference, where participants have to develop state-of-the-art methods to solve the above tasks. The four datasets, development kits and baselines are publicly available.
summary: With the recent development of Deep Learning applied to Computer Vision, sport video understanding has gained a lot of attention, providing much richer information for both sport consumers and leagues. This paper introduces DeepSportradar-v1, a suite of computer vision tasks, datasets and benchmarks for automated sport understanding. The main purpose of this framework is to close the gap between academic research and real world settings. To this end, the datasets provide high-resolution raw images, camera parameters and high quality annotations. DeepSportradar currently supports four challenging tasks related to basketball: ball 3D localization, camera calibration, player instance segmentation and player re-identification. For each of the four tasks, a detailed description of the dataset, objective, performance metrics, and the proposed baseline method are provided. To encourage further research on advanced methods for sport understanding, a competition is organized as part of the MMSports workshop from the ACM Multimedia 2022 conference, where participants have to develop state-of-the-art methods to solve the above tasks. The four datasets, development kits and baselines are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习应用于计算机视觉的最新发展，体育视频理解受到了广泛关注，为体育消费者和联盟提供了更丰富的信息。本文介绍了 DeepSportradar-v1，这是一套用于自动理解运动的计算机视觉任务、数据集和基准。该框架的主要目的是缩小学术研究与现实世界环境之间的差距。为此，数据集提供高分辨率原始图像、相机参数和高质量注释。 DeepSportradar 目前支持与篮球相关的四项具有挑战性的任务：球 3D 定位、相机校准、球员实例分割和球员重新识别。对于这四个任务中的每一个，都提供了数据集、目标、性能指标和建议的基线方法的详细描述。为了鼓励对运动理解的先进方法进行进一步研究，作为 ACM 多媒体 2022 会议 MMSports 研讨会的一部分，组织了一场竞赛，参与者必须开发最先进的方法来解决上述任务。这四个数据集、开发套件和基线都是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepSportradar-v1数据集，包含篮球相关的四个计算机视觉任务及高质量标注，旨在推动体育视频理解研究。
AI.motivation: 为弥合学术研究与实际应用间的差距，提供高分辨率图像、相机参数和精细标注的数据资源以支持体育场景的自动化理解。
AI.method: 构建包含高分辨率原始图像、相机参数及高质量标注的多任务数据集，涵盖球3D定位、相机校准、球员分割与重识别，并提供基线方法与开发工具包。
AI.result: 公开四个数据集及基线方法，举办MMSports竞赛鼓励算法创新，推动体育理解领域技术发展。
AI.conclusion: DeepSportradar-v1为体育计算机视觉研究提供标准化基准，促进学术界与工业界在运动分析领域的协作与技术突破。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出DeepSportradar-v1数据集，包含篮球相关的四个计算机视觉任务及高质量标注，旨在推动体育视频理解研究。

title: Deep Learning-Based Discrete Calibrated Survival Prediction

abstract: Deep neural networks for survival prediction outper-form classical approaches in discrimination, which is the ordering of patients according to their time-of-event. Conversely, classical approaches like the Cox Proportional Hazards model display much better calibration, the correct temporal prediction of events of the underlying distribution. Especially in the medical domain, where it is critical to predict the survival of a single patient, both discrimination and calibration are important performance metrics. Here we present Discrete Calibrated Survival (DCS), a novel deep neural network for discriminated and calibrated survival prediction that outperforms competing survival models in discrimination on three medical datasets, while achieving best calibration among all discrete time models. The enhanced performance of DCS can be attributed to two novel features, the variable temporal output node spacing and the novel loss term that optimizes the use of uncensored and censored patient data. We believe that DCS is an important step towards clinical application of deep-learning-based survival prediction with state-of-the-art discrimination and good calibration.
summary: Deep neural networks for survival prediction outper-form classical approaches in discrimination, which is the ordering of patients according to their time-of-event. Conversely, classical approaches like the Cox Proportional Hazards model display much better calibration, the correct temporal prediction of events of the underlying distribution. Especially in the medical domain, where it is critical to predict the survival of a single patient, both discrimination and calibration are important performance metrics. Here we present Discrete Calibrated Survival (DCS), a novel deep neural network for discriminated and calibrated survival prediction that outperforms competing survival models in discrimination on three medical datasets, while achieving best calibration among all discrete time models. The enhanced performance of DCS can be attributed to two novel features, the variable temporal output node spacing and the novel loss term that optimizes the use of uncensored and censored patient data. We believe that DCS is an important step towards clinical application of deep-learning-based survival prediction with state-of-the-art discrimination and good calibration.
abstract_zh: 用于生存预测的深度神经网络在区分方面优于经典方法，即根据患者的事件时间对患者进行排序。相反，像考克斯比例风险模型这样的经典方法显示出更好的校准，即对基础分布事件的正确时间预测。特别是在医疗领域，预测单个患者的生存至关重要，区分和校准都是重要的性能指标。在这里，我们提出了离散校准生存（DCS），这是一种用于区分和校准生存预测的新型深度神经网络，它在三个医学数据集的区分方面优于竞争生存模型，同时在所有离散时间模型中实现了最佳校准。 DCS 性能的增强可归因于两个新功能，即可变时间输出节点间距和优化未经审查和审查患者数据的使用的新损失项。我们相信，DCS 是基于深度学习的生存预测临床应用的重要一步，具有最先进的判别能力和良好的校准能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的离散校准生存预测模型DCS，旨在同时提升生存预测的判别性与校准性。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习模型在生存预测的判别性上表现优异但校准性不足，而经典模型如Cox模型虽校准性好却判别性较差，医疗领域需兼顾两者以准确预测个体生存情况。
AI.method: 设计变量时间输出节点间距以适应不同时间间隔需求，并引入新型损失项优化对删失数据和未删失数据的利用。
AI.result: 在三个医疗数据集中，DCS在判别性指标上优于竞争模型，且在离散时间模型中校准性表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: DCS通过创新结构与损失函数设计，实现了判别性与校准性的平衡，为深度学习在临床生存预测中的应用提供了重要进展。

Conversely, classical approaches like the Cox Proportional Hazards model display much better calibration, the correct temporal prediction of events of the underlying distribution. Especially in the medical domain, where it is critical to predict the survival of a single patient, both discrimination and calibration are important performance metrics. Here we present Discrete Calibrated Survival (DCS), a novel deep neural network for discriminated and calibrated survival prediction that outperforms competing survival models in discrimination on three medical datasets, while achieving best calibration among all discrete time models. The enhanced performance of DCS can be attributed to two novel features, the variable temporal output node spacing and the novel loss term that optimizes the use of uncensored and censored patient data. authors_text: Rita Sevastjanova,Eren Cakmak,Shauli Ravfogel,Ryan Cotterell,Mennatallah El-Assady
title: Visual Comparison of Language Model Adaptation
title_zh: 语言模型适配的视觉比较
abstract: Neural language models are widely used; however, their model parameters often need to be adapted to the specific domains and tasks of an application, which is time- and resource-consuming. Thus, adapters have recently been introduced as a lightweight alternative for model adaptation. They consist of a small set of task-specific parameters with a reduced training time and simple parameter composition. The simplicity of adapter training and composition comes along with new challenges, such as maintaining an overview of adapter properties and effectively comparing their produced embedding spaces. To help developers overcome these challenges, we provide a twofold contribution. First, in close collaboration with NLP researchers, we conducted a requirement analysis for an approach supporting adapter evaluation and detected, among others, the need for both intrinsic (i.e., embedding similarity-based) and extrinsic (i.e., prediction-based) explanation methods. Second, motivated by the gathered requirements, we designed a flexible visual analytics workspace that enables the comparison of adapter properties. In this paper, we discuss several design iterations and alternatives for interactive, comparative visual explanation methods. Our comparative visualizations show the differences in the adapted embedding vectors and prediction outcomes for diverse human-interpretable concepts (e.g., person names, human qualities). We evaluate our workspace through case studies and show that, for instance, an adapter trained on the language debiasing task according to context-0 (decontextualized) embeddings introduces a new type of bias where words (even gender-independent words such as countries) become more similar to female than male pronouns. We demonstrate that these are artifacts of context-0 embeddings.
summary: Neural language models are widely used; however, their model parameters often need to be adapted to the specific domains and tasks of an application, which is time- and resource-consuming. Thus, adapters have recently been introduced as a lightweight alternative for model adaptation. They consist of a small set of task-specific parameters with a reduced training time and simple parameter composition. The simplicity of adapter training and composition comes along with new challenges, such as maintaining an overview of adapter properties and effectively comparing their produced embedding spaces. To help developers overcome these challenges, we provide a twofold contribution. First, in close collaboration with NLP researchers, we conducted a requirement analysis for an approach supporting adapter evaluation and detected, among others, the need for both intrinsic (i.e., embedding similarity-based) and extrinsic (i.e., prediction-based) explanation methods. Second, motivated by the gathered requirements, we designed a flexible visual analytics workspace that enables the comparison of adapter properties. In this paper, we discuss several design iterations and alternatives for interactive, comparative visual explanation methods. Our comparative visualizations show the differences in the adapted embedding vectors and prediction outcomes for diverse human-interpretable concepts (e.g., person names, human qualities). We evaluate our workspace through case studies and show that, for instance, an adapter trained on the language debiasing task according to context-0 (decontextualized) embeddings introduces a new type of bias where words (even gender-independent words such as countries) become more similar to female than male pronouns. We demonstrate that these are artifacts of context-0 embeddings.
abstract_zh: 神经语言模型应用广泛；然而，它们的模型参数通常需要适应应用程序的特定领域和任务，这非常耗时和资源消耗。因此，适配器最近被引入作为模型适应的轻量级替代方案。它们由一小组特定于任务的参数组成，具有减少的训练时间和简单的参数组成。适配器训练和组合的简单性伴随着新的挑战，例如维护适配器属性的概述并有效比较其生成的嵌入空间。为了帮助开发人员克服这些挑战，我们提供了双重贡献。首先，我们与 NLP 研究人员密切合作，对支持适配器评估的方法进行了需求分析，并检测到对内在（即基于嵌入相似性）和外在（即基于预测）解释方法的需求。其次，在收集的需求的推动下，我们设计了一个灵活的可视化分析工作区，可以比较适配器属性。在本文中，我们讨论了交互式、比较视觉解释方法的几种设计迭代和替代方案。我们的比较可视化显示了不同的人类可解释概念（例如，人名、人类品质）的适应嵌入向量和预测结果的差异。我们通过案例研究评估了我们的工作空间，并表明，例如，根据上下文 0（去上下文化）嵌入接受语言去偏见任务训练的适配器引入了一种新型偏见，其中单词（甚至是与性别无关的单词，如国家）变得与女性代词比男性代词更相似。我们证明这些是 context-0 嵌入的产物。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可视化分析工具，用于比较语言模型适配器的属性差异，解决适配器训练与评估中的挑战。
AI.motivation: 神经语言模型参数适配耗时且资源密集，适配器虽轻量但缺乏有效比较其嵌入空间和预测结果的方法，需开发可视化工具辅助分析。
AI.method: 联合NLP研究者分析需求，设计支持内在（嵌入相似性）和外在（预测结果）评估的可视化分析框架，通过迭代设计实现交互式对比可视化。
AI.result: 案例研究表明，基于context-0嵌入的去偏适配器会引入新偏差（如国家名更接近女性代词），验证了工具在检测嵌入空间异常中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 可视化分析工具能揭示适配器嵌入空间的隐藏偏差，为模型适配提供可解释性支持，强调了嵌入空间分析在适配器评估中的重要性。

authors_text: Dan Navon,Alex M. Bronstein
title: Random Search Hyper-Parameter Tuning: Expected Improvement Estimation and the Corresponding Lower Bound
title_zh: 随机搜索超参数调优：预期改进估计和相应的下界
abstract: Hyperparameter tuning is a common technique for improving the performance of neural networks. Most techniques for hyperparameter search involve an iterated process where the model is retrained at every iteration. However, the expected accuracy improvement from every additional search iteration, is still unknown. Calculating the expected improvement can help create stopping rules for hyperparameter tuning and allow for a wiser allocation of a project's computational budget. In this paper, we establish an empirical estimate for the expected accuracy improvement from an additional iteration of hyperparameter search. Our results hold for any hyperparameter tuning method which is based on random search \cite{bergstra2012random} and samples hyperparameters from a fixed distribution. We bound our estimate with an error of $O\left(\sqrt{\frac{\log k}{k}}\right)$ w.h.p. where $k$ is the current number of iterations. To the best of our knowledge this is the first bound on the expected gain from an additional iteration of hyperparameter search. Finally, we demonstrate that the optimal estimate for the expected accuracy will still have an error of $\frac{1}{k}$.
summary: Hyperparameter tuning is a common technique for improving the performance of neural networks. Most techniques for hyperparameter search involve an iterated process where the model is retrained at every iteration. However, the expected accuracy improvement from every additional search iteration, is still unknown. Calculating the expected improvement can help create stopping rules for hyperparameter tuning and allow for a wiser allocation of a project's computational budget. In this paper, we establish an empirical estimate for the expected accuracy improvement from an additional iteration of hyperparameter search. Our results hold for any hyperparameter tuning method which is based on random search \cite{bergstra2012random} and samples hyperparameters from a fixed distribution. We bound our estimate with an error of $O\left(\sqrt{\frac{\log k}{k}}\right)$ w.h.p. where $k$ is the current number of iterations. To the best of our knowledge this is the first bound on the expected gain from an additional iteration of hyperparameter search. Finally, we demonstrate that the optimal estimate for the expected accuracy will still have an error of $\frac{1}{k}$.
abstract_zh: 超参数调整是提高神经网络性能的常用技术。大多数超参数搜索技术都涉及迭代过程，其中模型在每次迭代时都会重新训练。然而，每次额外的搜索迭代所带来的预期精度提升仍然未知。计算预期的改进可以帮助创建超参数调整的停止规则，并允许更明智地分配项目的计算预算。在本文中，我们对超参数搜索的额外迭代的预期精度改进进行了经验估计。我们的结果适用于任何基于随机搜索\cite{bergstra2012random}并从固定分布中采样超参数的超参数调整方法。我们的估计误差为 $O\left(\sqrt{\frac{\log k}{k}}\right)$ w.h.p。其中 $k$ 是当前的迭代次数。据我们所知，这是超参数搜索额外迭代的预期增益的第一个界限。最后，我们证明了预期精度的最佳估计仍然会有 $\frac{1}{k}$ 的误差。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为基于随机搜索的超参数调优方法提供预期准确率提升的估计及其下界分析。
AI.motivation: 超参数调优需消耗大量计算资源，但现有方法缺乏对每次迭代预期性能提升的量化评估，导致难以制定有效的停止规则和资源分配策略。
AI.method: 通过经验估计方法，针对固定分布下随机搜索的超参数调优过程，推导出预期准确率提升的估计值，并建立误差界为$O\\left(\\sqrt{\ rac{\\log k}{k}}\ight)$的置信区间。
AI.result: 首次提出超参数搜索迭代的预期收益理论界，证明最优估计的误差项为$\ rac{1}{k}$，并验证了该估计在随机搜索框架下的普适性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为超参数调优提供了理论保障，支持基于预期收益的动态停止策略，优化计算资源使用效率。

search_text: Random Search Hyper-Parameter Tuning: Expected Improvement Estimation and the Corresponding Lower Bound 随机搜索超参数调优：预期改进估计和相应的下界 Hyperparameter tuning is a common technique for improving the performance of neural networks. Most techniques for hyperparameter search involve an iterated process where the model is retrained at every iteration. However, the expected accuracy improvement from every additional search iteration, is still unknown. Calculating the expected improvement can help create stopping rules for hyperparameter tuning and allow for a wiser allocation of a project's computational budget. In this paper, we establish an empirical estimate for the expected accuracy improvement from an additional iteration of hyperparameter search. Our results hold for any hyperparameter tuning method which is based on random search \cite{bergstra2012random} and samples hyperparameters from a fixed distribution. We bound our estimate with an error of $O\left(\sqrt{\frac{\log k}{k}}\right)$ w.h.p. where $k$ is the current number of iterations. To the best of our knowledge this is the first bound on the expected gain from an additional iteration of hyperparameter search. Finally, we demonstrate that the optimal estimate for the expected accuracy will still have an error of $\frac{1}{k}$. 超参数调整是提高神经网络性能的常用技术。大多数超参数搜索技术都涉及迭代过程，其中模型在每次迭代时都会重新训练。然而，每次额外的搜索迭代所带来的预期精度提升仍然未知。计算预期的改进可以帮助创建超参数调整的停止规则，并允许更明智地分配项目的计算预算。在本文中，我们对超参数搜索的额外迭代的预期精度改进进行了经验估计。我们的结果适用于任何基于随机搜索\cite{bergstra2012random}并从固定分布中采样超参数的超参数调整方法。我们的估计误差为 $O\left(\sqrt{\frac{\log k}{k}}\right)$ w.h.p。其中 $k$ 是当前的迭代次数。据我们所知，这是超参数搜索额外迭代的预期增益的第一个界限。最后，我们证明了预期精度的最佳估计仍然会有 $\frac{1}{k}$ 的误差。 本文旨在为基于随机搜索的超参数调优方法提供预期准确率提升的估计及其下界分析。 Dan Navon,Alex M. Bronstein cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Finn Behrendt,Debayan Bhattacharya,Julia Krüger,Roland Opfer,Alexander Schlaefer
title: Data-Efficient Vision Transformers for Multi-Label Disease Classification on Chest Radiographs
title_zh: 用于胸部 X 光片多标签疾病分类的数据高效视觉转换器
abstract: Radiographs are a versatile diagnostic tool for the detection and assessment of pathologies, for treatment planning or for navigation and localization purposes in clinical interventions. However, their interpretation and assessment by radiologists can be tedious and error-prone. Thus, a wide variety of deep learning methods have been proposed to support radiologists interpreting radiographs. Mostly, these approaches rely on convolutional neural networks (CNN) to extract features from images. Especially for the multi-label classification of pathologies on chest radiographs (Chest X-Rays, CXR), CNNs have proven to be well suited. On the Contrary, Vision Transformers (ViTs) have not been applied to this task despite their high classification performance on generic images and interpretable local saliency maps which could add value to clinical interventions. ViTs do not rely on convolutions but on patch-based self-attention and in contrast to CNNs, no prior knowledge of local connectivity is present. While this leads to increased capacity, ViTs typically require an excessive amount of training data which represents a hurdle in the medical domain as high costs are associated with collecting large medical data sets. In this work, we systematically compare the classification performance of ViTs and CNNs for different data set sizes and evaluate more data-efficient ViT variants (DeiT). Our results show that while the performance between ViTs and CNNs is on par with a small benefit for ViTs, DeiTs outperform the former if a reasonably large data set is available for training.
summary: Radiographs are a versatile diagnostic tool for the detection and assessment of pathologies, for treatment planning or for navigation and localization purposes in clinical interventions. However, their interpretation and assessment by radiologists can be tedious and error-prone. Thus, a wide variety of deep learning methods have been proposed to support radiologists interpreting radiographs. Mostly, these approaches rely on convolutional neural networks (CNN) to extract features from images. Especially for the multi-label classification of pathologies on chest radiographs (Chest X-Rays, CXR), CNNs have proven to be well suited. On the Contrary, Vision Transformers (ViTs) have not been applied to this task despite their high classification performance on generic images and interpretable local saliency maps which could add value to clinical interventions. ViTs do not rely on convolutions but on patch-based self-attention and in contrast to CNNs, no prior knowledge of local connectivity is present. While this leads to increased capacity, ViTs typically require an excessive amount of training data which represents a hurdle in the medical domain as high costs are associated with collecting large medical data sets. In this work, we systematically compare the classification performance of ViTs and CNNs for different data set sizes and evaluate more data-efficient ViT variants (DeiT). Our results show that while the performance between ViTs and CNNs is on par with a small benefit for ViTs, DeiTs outperform the former if a reasonably large data set is available for training.
abstract_zh: 放射线照片是一种多功能诊断工具，用于检测和评估病理、用于治疗计划或临床干预中的导航和定位目的。然而，放射科医生对它们的解释和评估可能很乏味且容易出错。因此，人们提出了各种各样的深度学习方法来支持放射科医生解读射线照片。大多数情况下，这些方法依赖于卷积神经网络（CNN）从图像中提取特征。特别是对于胸部 X 光片（胸部 X 光、CXR）病理的多标签分类，CNN 已被证明非常适合。相反，视觉变换器（ViTs）尚未应用于这项任务，尽管它们在通用图像和可解释的局部显着图上具有很高的分类性能，可以为临床干预增加价值。 ViT 不依赖于卷积，而是依赖于基于块的自注意力，并且与 CNN 相比，不存在局部连接的先验知识。虽然这会增加容量，但 ViT 通常需要过量的训练数据，这在医疗领域构成了障碍，因为收集大型医疗数据集的成本很高。在这项工作中，我们系统地比较了 ViT 和 CNN 对于不同数据集大小的分类性能，并评估了更具数据效率的 ViT 变体（DeiT）。我们的结果表明，虽然 ViT 和 CNN 之间的性能相当，ViT 略有优势，但如果有相当大的数据集可用于训练，DeiT 的性能优于前者。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了视觉Transformer（ViT）在胸部X光片多标签疾病分类中的应用，并与卷积神经网络（CNN）进行比较。
AI.motivation: 尽管ViT在通用图像分类中表现优异，但其在医学影像领域因需要大量训练数据而面临挑战，而CNN在该任务中已被广泛使用。
AI.method: 系统比较了不同数据集规模下ViT与CNN的分类性能，并评估了更高效的数据ViT变体（DeiT）。
AI.result: ViT与CNN性能相当且略有优势，但若训练数据充足，DeiT的表现优于传统ViT。
AI.conclusion: DeiT在医学影像分类中具有潜力，但数据效率仍是ViT应用的主要障碍。
