However, their interpretation and assessment by radiologists can be tedious and error-prone. Thus, a wide variety of deep learning methods have been proposed to support radiologists interpreting radiographs. Mostly, these approaches rely on convolutional neural networks (CNN) to extract features from images. Especially for the multi-label classification of pathologies on chest radiographs (Chest X-Rays, CXR), CNNs have proven to be well suited. On the Contrary, Vision Transformers (ViTs) have not been applied to this task despite their high classification performance on generic images and interpretable local saliency maps which could add value to clinical interventions. ViTs do not rely on convolutions but on patch-based self-attention and in contrast to CNNs, no prior knowledge of local connectivity is present. While this leads to increased capacity, ViTs typically require an excessive amount of training data which represents a hurdle in the medical domain as high costs are associated with collecting large medical data sets. In this work, we systematically compare the classification performance of ViTs and CNNs for different data set sizes and evaluate more data-efficient ViT variants (DeiT). Our results show that while the performance between ViTs and CNNs is on par with a small benefit for ViTs, DeiTs outperform the former if a reasonably large data set is available for training. 放射线照片是一种多功能诊断工具，用于检测和评估病理、用于治疗计划或临床干预中的导航和定位目的。然而，放射科医生对它们的解释和评估可能很乏味且容易出错。因此，人们提出了各种各样的深度学习方法来支持放射科医生解读射线照片。大多数情况下，这些方法依赖于卷积神经网络（CNN）从图像中提取特征。特别是对于胸部 X 光片（胸部 X 光、CXR）病理的多标签分类，CNN 已被证明非常适合。相反，视觉变换器（ViTs）尚未应用于这项任务，尽管它们在通用图像和可解释的局部显着图上具有很高的分类性能，可以为临床干预增加价值。 ViT 不依赖于卷积，而是依赖于基于块的自注意力，并且与 CNN 相比，不存在局部连接的先验知识。虽然这会增加容量，但 ViT 通常需要过量的训练数据，这在医疗领域构成了障碍，因为收集大型医疗数据集的成本很高。在这项工作中，我们系统地比较了 ViT 和 CNN 对于不同数据集大小的分类性能，并评估了更具数据效率的 ViT 变体（DeiT）。我们的结果表明，虽然 ViT 和 CNN 之间的性能相当，ViT 略有优势，但如果有相当大的数据集可用于训练，DeiT 的性能优于前者。 本文研究了视觉Transformer（ViT）在胸部X光片多标签疾病分类中的应用，并与卷积神经网络（CNN）进行比较。 Finn Behrendt,Debayan Bhattacharya,Julia Krüger,Roland Opfer,Alexander Schlaefer cs.CV

authors_text: Tao He,Lianli Gao,Jingkuan Song,Yuan-Fang Li
title: Towards Open-vocabulary Scene Graph Generation with Prompt-based Finetuning
title_zh: 通过基于提示的微调实现开放词汇场景图生成
abstract: Scene graph generation (SGG) is a fundamental task aimed at detecting visual relations between objects in an image. The prevailing SGG methods require all object classes to be given in the training set. Such a closed setting limits the practical application of SGG. In this paper, we introduce open-vocabulary scene graph generation, a novel, realistic and challenging setting in which a model is trained on a set of base object classes but is required to infer relations for unseen target object classes. To this end, we propose a two-step method that firstly pre-trains on large amounts of coarse-grained region-caption data and then leverages two prompt-based techniques to finetune the pre-trained model without updating its parameters. Moreover, our method can support inference over completely unseen object classes, which existing methods are incapable of handling. On extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets, Visual Genome, GQA, and Open-Image, our method significantly outperforms recent, strong SGG methods on the setting of Ov-SGG, as well as on the conventional closed SGG.
summary: Scene graph generation (SGG) is a fundamental task aimed at detecting visual relations between objects in an image. The prevailing SGG methods require all object classes to be given in the training set. Such a closed setting limits the practical application of SGG. In this paper, we introduce open-vocabulary scene graph generation, a novel, realistic and challenging setting in which a model is trained on a set of base object classes but is required to infer relations for unseen target object classes. To this end, we propose a two-step method that firstly pre-trains on large amounts of coarse-grained region-caption data and then leverages two prompt-based techniques to finetune the pre-trained model without updating its parameters. Moreover, our method can support inference over completely unseen object classes, which existing methods are incapable of handling. On extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets, Visual Genome, GQA, and Open-Image, our method significantly outperforms recent, strong SGG methods on the setting of Ov-SGG, as well as on the conventional closed SGG.
abstract_zh: 场景图生成（SGG）是一项基本任务，旨在检测图像中对象之间的视觉关系。流行的 SGG 方法要求在训练集中给出所有对象类。这种封闭的设置限制了SGG的实际应用。在本文中，我们介绍了开放词汇场景图生成，这是一种新颖、现实且具有挑战性的设置，其中模型在一组基本对象类上进行训练，但需要推断未见过的目标对象类的关系。为此，我们提出了一种两步方法，首先对大量粗粒度区域标题数据进行预训练，然后利用两种基于提示的技术来微调预训练模型而不更新其参数。此外，我们的方法可以支持对完全不可见的对象类进行推理，这是现有方法无法处理的。在视觉基因组、GQA 和 Open-Image 三个基准数据集上进行的广泛实验中，我们的方法在 Ov-SGG 的设置以及传统的封闭 SGG 上显着优于最近强大的 SGG 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于提示微调的开放词汇场景图生成方法，使模型能处理训练中未见过的对象类别。
AI.motivation: 现有场景图生成方法依赖封闭词汇表，无法处理未见过的对象类别，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 采用两步法：首先在粗粒度区域-字幕数据上预训练，再通过两种基于提示的微调技术进行参数冻结的推理优化。
AI.result: 在Visual Genome、GQA和Open-Image三个数据集上，开放词汇场景图生成任务表现显著优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了封闭词汇限制，为实际场景中的开放词汇关系推理提供了有效解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于提示微调的开放词汇场景图生成方法，使模型能处理训练中未见过的对象类别。

ai_content.result: 在Visual Genome、GQA和Open-Image三个数据集上，开放词汇场景图生成任务表现显著优于现有先进方法。

search_text: Towards Open-vocabulary Scene Graph Generation with Prompt-based Finetuning 通过基于提示的微调实现开放词汇场景图生成 Scene graph generation (SGG) is a fundamental task aimed at detecting visual relations between objects in an image. The prevailing SGG methods require all object classes to be given in the training set. Such a closed setting limits the practical application of SGG. In this paper, we introduce open-vocabulary scene graph generation, a novel, realistic and challenging setting in which a model is trained on a set of base object classes but is required to infer relations for unseen target object classes. To this end, we propose a two-step method that firstly pre-trains on large amounts of coarse-grained region-caption data and then leverages two prompt-based techniques to finetune the pre-trained model without updating its parameters. Moreover, our method can support inference over completely unseen object classes, which existing methods are incapable of handling. On extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets, Visual Genome, GQA, and Open-Image, our method significantly outperforms recent, strong SGG methods on the setting of Ov-SGG, as well as on the conventional closed SGG. 场景图生成（SGG）是一项基本任务，旨在检测图像中对象之间的视觉关系。流行的 SGG 方法要求在训练集中给出所有对象类。这种封闭的设置限制了SGG的实际应用。在本文中，我们介绍了开放词汇场景图生成，这是一种新颖、现实且具有挑战性的设置，其中模型在一组基本对象类上进行训练，但需要推断未见过的目标对象类的关系。为此，我们提出了一种两步方法，首先对大量粗粒度区域标题数据进行预训练，然后利用两种基于提示的技术来微调预训练模型而不更新其参数。此外，我们的方法可以支持对完全不可见的对象类进行推理，这是现有方法无法处理的。在视觉基因组、GQA 和 Open-Image 三个基准数据集上进行的广泛实验中，我们的方法在 Ov-SGG 的设置以及传统的封闭 SGG 上显着优于最近强大的 SGG 方法。 本文提出一种基于提示微调的开放词汇场景图生成方法，使模型能处理训练中未见过的对象类别。 Tao He,Lianli Gao,Jingkuan Song,Yuan-Fang Li cs.CV

authors_text: Dongyang Kuang,Craig Michoski
title: KAM -- a Kernel Attention Module for Emotion Classification with EEG Data
title_zh: KAM——利用脑电图数据进行情绪分类的内核注意力模块
comment: This preprint has not undergone peer review. The updated version is accepted by MICCAI2022 workshop: iMIMIC - Interpretability of Machine Intelligence in Medical Image Computing
comments: This preprint has not undergone peer review. The updated version is accepted by MICCAI2022 workshop: iMIMIC - Interpretability of Machine Intelligence in Medical Image Computing
abstract: In this work, a kernel attention module is presented for the task of EEG-based emotion classification with neural networks. The proposed module utilizes a self-attention mechanism by performing a kernel trick, demanding significantly fewer trainable parameters and computations than standard attention modules. The design also provides a scalar for quantitatively examining the amount of attention assigned during deep feature refinement, hence help better interpret a trained model. Using EEGNet as the backbone model, extensive experiments are conducted on the SEED dataset to assess the module's performance on within-subject classification tasks compared to other SOTA attention modules. Requiring only one extra parameter, the inserted module is shown to boost the base model's mean prediction accuracy up to more than 1\% across 15 subjects. A key component of the method is the interpretability of solutions, which is addressed using several different techniques, and is included throughout as part of the dependency analysis.
summary: In this work, a kernel attention module is presented for the task of EEG-based emotion classification with neural networks. The proposed module utilizes a self-attention mechanism by performing a kernel trick, demanding significantly fewer trainable parameters and computations than standard attention modules. The design also provides a scalar for quantitatively examining the amount of attention assigned during deep feature refinement, hence help better interpret a trained model. Using EEGNet as the backbone model, extensive experiments are conducted on the SEED dataset to assess the module's performance on within-subject classification tasks compared to other SOTA attention modules. Requiring only one extra parameter, the inserted module is shown to boost the base model's mean prediction accuracy up to more than 1\% across 15 subjects. A key component of the method is the interpretability of solutions, which is addressed using several different techniques, and is included throughout as part of the dependency analysis.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，提出了一个内核注意力模块，用于通过神经网络进行基于脑电图的情绪分类任务。所提出的模块通过执行内核技巧来利用自注意力机制，与标准注意力模块相比，所需的可训练参数和计算量明显减少。该设计还提供了一个标量，用于定量检查深度特征细化期间分配的注意力量，从而有助于更好地解释经过训练的模型。使用 EEGNet 作为骨干模型，在 SEED 数据集上进行了大量实验，以评估该模块与其他 SOTA 注意力模块相比在受试者内分类任务上的性能。只需一个额外参数，插入的模块就可以将 15 个受试者的基本模型的平均预测精度提高到 1% 以上。该方法的一个关键组成部分是解决方案的可解释性，它可以使用几种不同的技术来解决，并且作为依赖性分析的一部分包含在全文中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于脑电图（EEG）数据情绪分类的核注意力模块（KAM），旨在提升模型性能并增强可解释性。
AI.motivation: 传统注意力机制在EEG情绪分类中存在参数多、计算量大且可解释性不足的问题，需设计更高效且可解释的模块。
AI.method: 通过核技巧实现自注意力机制，减少可训练参数和计算量，并引入标量量化注意力分配，结合EEGNet框架在SEED数据集进行实验。
AI.result: 在15名受试者的组内分类任务中，KAM使基模型的平均预测准确率提升超过1%，且显著增强模型可解释性。
AI.conclusion: KAM在保持高效性的同时提升了EEG情绪分类的准确性，其可解释性分析为模型依赖性提供了有效支持。

authors_text: Luke Thorburn,Maria Polukarov,Carmine Ventre
title: Error in the Euclidean Preference Model
title_zh: 欧几里得偏好模型中的错误
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures. Accepted as an extended abstract to AAMAS 2023, full paper IJCAI 2023
comments: 11 pages, 5 figures. Accepted as an extended abstract to AAMAS 2023, full paper IJCAI 2023
abstract: Spatial models of preference, in the form of vector embeddings, are learned by many deep learning and multiagent systems, including recommender systems. Often these models are assumed to approximate a Euclidean structure, where an individual prefers alternatives positioned closer to their "ideal point", as measured by the Euclidean metric. However, Bogomolnaia and Laslier (2007) showed that there exist ordinal preference profiles that cannot be represented with this structure if the Euclidean space has two fewer dimensions than there are individuals or alternatives. We extend this result, showing that there are situations in which almost all preference profiles cannot be represented with the Euclidean model, and derive a theoretical lower bound on the expected error when using the Euclidean model to approximate non-Euclidean preference profiles. Our results have implications for the interpretation and use of vector embeddings, because in some cases close approximation of arbitrary, true ordinal relationships can be expected only if the dimensionality of the embeddings is a substantial fraction of the number of entities represented.
summary: Spatial models of preference, in the form of vector embeddings, are learned by many deep learning and multiagent systems, including recommender systems. Often these models are assumed to approximate a Euclidean structure, where an individual prefers alternatives positioned closer to their "ideal point", as measured by the Euclidean metric. However, Bogomolnaia and Laslier (2007) showed that there exist ordinal preference profiles that cannot be represented with this structure if the Euclidean space has two fewer dimensions than there are individuals or alternatives. We extend this result, showing that there are situations in which almost all preference profiles cannot be represented with the Euclidean model, and derive a theoretical lower bound on the expected error when using the Euclidean model to approximate non-Euclidean preference profiles. Our results have implications for the interpretation and use of vector embeddings, because in some cases close approximation of arbitrary, true ordinal relationships can be expected only if the dimensionality of the embeddings is a substantial fraction of the number of entities represented.
abstract_zh: 许多深度学习和多智能体系统（包括推荐系统）可以学习向量嵌入形式的偏好空间模型。通常，这些模型被假设为近似欧几里德结构，其中个人更喜欢更接近其“理想点”的替代方案，如欧几里德度量所测量的。然而，Bogomolnaia 和 Laslier (2007) 表明，如果欧几里得空间的维度比个体或替代品的维度少两个，则存在无法用这种结构表示的序数偏好分布。我们扩展了这个结果，表明在某些情况下几乎所有偏好配置文件都无法用欧几里得模型表示，并推导出使用欧几里得模型近似非欧几里得偏好配置文件时预期误差的理论下界。我们的结果对向量嵌入的解释和使用具有影响，因为在某些情况下，只有当嵌入的维数是所表示的实体数量的很大一部分时，才能预期任意的、真实的序数关系的近似。

AI.tldr: 本文研究欧几里得偏好模型在近似非欧几里得偏好配置时的误差问题，并推导了理论误差下限。
AI.motivation: 现有模型假设偏好可由欧几里得空间中的理想点距离近似，但低维空间无法表示所有偏好配置，需量化误差范围。
AI.method: 扩展Bogomolnaia和Laslier的结论，证明高维情况下几乎所有偏好无法被欧几里得模型表示，并推导误差下界。
AI.result: 发现当实体数量远大于嵌入维度时，欧几里得模型近似误差显著，且存在理论误差下限。
AI.conclusion: 向量嵌入需保证足够维度才能有效近似真实偏好关系，否则模型误差不可忽略。

authors_text: Yonghwan Kim,Masahiro Shibata,Yuichi Sudo,Junya Nakamura,Yoshiaki Katayama,Toshimitsu Masuzawa
title: Gathering Despite Defected View
title_zh: 尽管观点有缺陷，仍聚集在一起
comment: 18 pages, 11 figures, will be published as a brief announcement (short version) in DISC2022
comments: 18 pages, 11 figures, will be published as a brief announcement (short version) in DISC2022
abstract: An autonomous mobile robot system consisting of many mobile computational entities (called robots) attracts much attention of researchers, and to clarify the relation between the capabilities of robots and solvability of the problems is an emerging issue for a recent couple of decades. Generally, each robot can observe all other robots as long as there are no restrictions for visibility range or obstructions, regardless of the number of robots. In this paper, we provide a new perspective on the observation by robots; a robot cannot necessarily observe all other robots regardless of distances to them. We call this new computational model defected view model. Under this model, in this paper, we consider the gathering problem that requires all the robots to gather at the same point and propose two algorithms to solve the gathering problem in the adversarial ($N$,$N-2$)-defected model for $N \geq 5$ (where each robot observes at most $N-2$ robots chosen adversarially) and the distance-based (4,2)-defected model (where each robot observes at most 2 closest robots to itself) respectively, where $N$ is the number of robots. Moreover, we present an impossibility result showing that there is no (deterministic) gathering algorithm in the adversarial or distance-based (3,1)-defected model. Moreover, we show an impossibility result for the gathering in a relaxed ($N$, $N-2$)-defected model.
summary: An autonomous mobile robot system consisting of many mobile computational entities (called robots) attracts much attention of researchers, and to clarify the relation between the capabilities of robots and solvability of the problems is an emerging issue for a recent couple of decades. Generally, each robot can observe all other robots as long as there are no restrictions for visibility range or obstructions, regardless of the number of robots. In this paper, we provide a new perspective on the observation by robots; a robot cannot necessarily observe all other robots regardless of distances to them. We call this new computational model defected view model. Under this model, in this paper, we consider the gathering problem that requires all the robots to gather at the same point and propose two algorithms to solve the gathering problem in the adversarial ($N$,$N-2$)-defected model for $N \geq 5$ (where each robot observes at most $N-2$ robots chosen adversarially) and the distance-based (4,2)-defected model (where each robot observes at most 2 closest robots to itself) respectively, where $N$ is the number of robots. Moreover, we present an impossibility result showing that there is no (deterministic) gathering algorithm in the adversarial or distance-based (3,1)-defected model. Moreover, we show an impossibility result for the gathering in a relaxed ($N$, $N-2$)-defected model.
abstract_zh: 由许多移动计算实体（称为机器人）组成的自主移动机器人系统引起了研究人员的广泛关注，而阐明机器人的能力与问题的可解决性之间的关系是近几十年来的一个新兴问题。一般来说，只要没有可见范围或障碍物的限制，每个机器人都可以观察到所有其他机器人，无论机器人的数量有多少。在本文中，我们提供了机器人观察的新视角；一个机器人不一定能观察到所有其他机器人，无论它们之间的距离有多远。我们将这种新的计算模型称为缺陷视图模型。在该模型下，本文考虑了要求所有机器人在同一点聚集的聚集问题，并提出了两种算法来分别解决 $N \geq 5$ 的对抗性 ($N$,$N-2$) 缺陷模型（每个机器人最多观察到对抗性选择的 $N-2$ 个机器人）和基于距离的 (4,2) 缺陷模型（每个机器人最多观察到 2 个距离自己最近的机器人）中的聚集问题，其中$N$ 是机器人的数量。此外，我们提出了一个不可能的结果，表明在对抗性或基于距离的 (3,1) 缺陷模型中不存在（确定性）收集算法。此外，我们展示了在宽松的 ($N$, $N-2$) 缺陷模型中聚集的不可能性结果。

AI.tldr: 研究在机器人视野存在缺陷的情况下，如何实现所有机器人聚集到同一点的问题，并提出相应的算法。
AI.motivation: 传统模型假设机器人可观察所有其他机器人，但实际存在视野限制，因此研究缺陷视野下的聚集问题具有现实意义。
AI.method: 提出两种算法解决对抗性(N, N-2)和基于距离的(4,2)缺陷模型下的聚集问题，并证明在(3,1)缺陷模型下无法实现聚集。
AI.result: 在对抗性(N, N-2)和距离基于(4,2)模型下提出有效算法，并证明在(3,1)模型下聚集不可行。
AI.conclusion: 缺陷视野显著增加聚集问题的难度，未来需进一步研究其他模型或条件下的解决方案。

search_text: Gathering Despite Defected View 尽管观点有缺陷，仍聚集在一起 An autonomous mobile robot system consisting of many mobile computational entities (called robots) attracts much attention of researchers, and to clarify the relation between the capabilities of robots and solvability of the problems is an emerging issue for a recent couple of decades. Generally, each robot can observe all other robots as long as there are no restrictions for visibility range or obstructions, regardless of the number of robots. In this paper, we provide a new perspective on the observation by robots; a robot cannot necessarily observe all other robots regardless of distances to them. We call this new computational model defected view model. Under this model, in this paper, we consider the gathering problem that requires all the robots to gather at the same point and propose two algorithms to solve the gathering problem in the adversarial ($N$,$N-2$)-defected model for $N \geq 5$ (where each robot observes at most $N-2$ robots chosen adversarially) and the distance-based (4,2)-defected model (where each robot observes at most 2 closest robots to itself) respectively, where $N$ is the number of robots. Moreover, we present an impossibility result showing that there is no (deterministic) gathering algorithm in the adversarial or distance-based (3,1)-defected model. Moreover, we show an impossibility result for the gathering in a relaxed ($N$, $N-2$)-defected model. 由许多移动计算实体（称为机器人）组成的自主移动机器人系统引起了研究人员的广泛关注，而阐明机器人的能力与问题的可解决性之间的关系是近几十年来的一个新兴问题。一般来说，只要没有可见范围或障碍物的限制，每个机器人都可以观察到所有其他机器人，无论机器人的数量有多少。在本文中，我们提供了机器人观察的新视角；一个机器人不一定能观察到所有其他机器人，无论它们之间的距离有多远。我们将这种新的计算模型称为缺陷视图模型。在该模型下，本文考虑了要求所有机器人在同一点聚集的聚集问题，并提出了两种算法来分别解决 $N \geq 5$ 的对抗性 ($N$,$N-2$) 缺陷模型（每个机器人最多观察到对抗性选择的 $N-2$ 个机器人）和基于距离的 (4,2) 缺陷模型（每个机器人最多观察到 2 个距离自己最近的机器人）中的聚集问题，其中$N$ 是机器人的数量。此外，我们提出了一个不可能的结果，表明在对抗性或基于距离的 (3,1) 缺陷模型中不存在（确定性）收集算法。此外，我们展示了在宽松的 ($N$, $N-2$) 缺陷模型中聚集的不可能性结果。 研究在机器人视野存在缺陷的情况下，如何实现所有机器人聚集到同一点的问题，并提出相应的算法。 Yonghwan Kim,Masahiro Shibata,Yuichi Sudo,Junya Nakamura,Yoshiaki Katayama,Toshimitsu Masuzawa cs.DC,cs.RO

authors_text: Andre Thevapalan,Gabriele Kern-Isberner
title: On Establishing Robust Consistency in Answer Set Programs
title_zh: 关于在答案集程序中建立鲁棒一致性
comment: Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP)
comments: Under consideration in Theory and Practice of Logic Programming (TPLP)
abstract: Answer set programs used in real-world applications often require that the program is usable with different input data. This, however, can often lead to contradictory statements and consequently to an inconsistent program. Causes for potential contradictions in a program are conflicting rules. In this paper, we show how to ensure that a program $\mathcal{P}$ remains non-contradictory given any allowed set of such input data. For that, we introduce the notion of conflict-resolving $λ$- extensions. A conflict-resolving $λ$-extension for a conflicting rule $r$ is a set $λ$ of (default) literals such that extending the body of $r$ by $λ$ resolves all conflicts of $r$ at once. We investigate the properties that suitable $λ$-extensions should possess and building on that, we develop a strategy to compute all such conflict-resolving $λ$-extensions for each conflicting rule in $\mathcal{P}$. We show that by implementing a conflict resolution process that successively resolves conflicts using $λ$-extensions eventually yields a program that remains non-contradictory given any allowed set of input data.
summary: Answer set programs used in real-world applications often require that the program is usable with different input data. This, however, can often lead to contradictory statements and consequently to an inconsistent program. Causes for potential contradictions in a program are conflicting rules. In this paper, we show how to ensure that a program $\mathcal{P}$ remains non-contradictory given any allowed set of such input data. For that, we introduce the notion of conflict-resolving $λ$- extensions. A conflict-resolving $λ$-extension for a conflicting rule $r$ is a set $λ$ of (default) literals such that extending the body of $r$ by $λ$ resolves all conflicts of $r$ at once. We investigate the properties that suitable $λ$-extensions should possess and building on that, we develop a strategy to compute all such conflict-resolving $λ$-extensions for each conflicting rule in $\mathcal{P}$. We show that by implementing a conflict resolution process that successively resolves conflicts using $λ$-extensions eventually yields a program that remains non-contradictory given any allowed set of input data.
abstract_zh: 实际应用中使用的答案集程序通常要求该程序可用于不同的输入数据。然而，这通常会导致矛盾的陈述，从而导致程序不一致。程序中潜在矛盾的原因是规则冲突。在本文中，我们展示了如何确保程序 $\mathcal{P}$ 在给定任何允许的此类输入数据集的情况下保持不矛盾。为此，我们引入了冲突解决 $λ$- 扩展的概念。冲突规则 $r$ 的冲突解决 $λ$ 扩展是一组（默认）文字的 $λ$，这样通过 $λ$ 扩展 $r$ 的主体就可以立即解决 $r$ 的所有冲突。我们研究了合适的 $λ$ 扩展应具有的属性，并在此基础上，我们开发了一种策略来计算 $\mathcal{P}$ 中每个冲突规则的所有此类冲突解决 $λ$ 扩展。我们表明，通过实现使用 $λ$ 扩展连续解决冲突的冲突解决过程，最终产生一个在给定任何允许的输入数据集的情况下保持不矛盾的程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过引入冲突解决λ-扩展来确保答案集程序在不同输入数据下保持非矛盾的方法。
AI.motivation: 现实中的答案集程序需要处理不同输入数据，但冲突规则可能导致程序不一致，需解决这一问题以保证程序的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 定义冲突解决λ-扩展，通过扩展规则体中的默认文字集来一次性消除冲突，并提出计算所有有效λ-扩展的策略。
AI.result: 开发出一种逐步应用λ-扩展解决冲突的策略，最终使程序在任意允许的输入数据下保持非矛盾。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过系统化处理冲突规则，确保答案集程序在动态输入场景下的逻辑一致性。

authors_text: Dongyang Kuang,Craig Michoski,Wenting Li,Rui Guo
title: A Monotonicity Constrained Attention Module for Emotion Classification with Limited EEG Data
title_zh: 用于有限脑电数据的情绪分类的单调性约束注意模块
comment: A Preprint for the accepted work by MICCAI 2022 workshop: Medical Image Learning with Noisy and Limited Data
comments: A Preprint for the accepted work by MICCAI 2022 workshop: Medical Image Learning with Noisy and Limited Data
abstract: In this work, a parameter-efficient attention module is presented for emotion classification using a limited, or relatively small, number of electroencephalogram (EEG) signals. This module is called the Monotonicity Constrained Attention Module (MCAM) due to its capability of incorporating priors on the monotonicity when converting features' Gram matrices into attention matrices for better feature refinement. Our experiments have shown that MCAM's effectiveness is comparable to state-of-the-art attention modules in boosting the backbone network's performance in prediction while requiring less parameters. Several accompanying sensitivity analyses on trained models' prediction concerning different attacks are also performed. These attacks include various frequency domain filtering levels and gradually morphing between samples associated with multiple labels. Our results can help better understand different modules' behaviour in prediction and can provide guidance in applications where data is limited and are with noises.
summary: In this work, a parameter-efficient attention module is presented for emotion classification using a limited, or relatively small, number of electroencephalogram (EEG) signals. This module is called the Monotonicity Constrained Attention Module (MCAM) due to its capability of incorporating priors on the monotonicity when converting features' Gram matrices into attention matrices for better feature refinement. Our experiments have shown that MCAM's effectiveness is comparable to state-of-the-art attention modules in boosting the backbone network's performance in prediction while requiring less parameters. Several accompanying sensitivity analyses on trained models' prediction concerning different attacks are also performed. These attacks include various frequency domain filtering levels and gradually morphing between samples associated with multiple labels. Our results can help better understand different modules' behaviour in prediction and can provide guidance in applications where data is limited and are with noises.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，提出了一种参数有效的注意力模块，用于使用有限或相对少量的脑电图（EEG）信号进行情绪分类。该模块被称为单调性约束注意模块（MCAM），因为它能够在将特征的 Gram 矩阵转换为注意矩阵时结合单调性先验，以实现更好的特征细化。我们的实验表明，MCAM 的有效性与最先进的注意力模块相当，可以提高骨干网络的预测性能，同时需要更少的参数。还对经过训练的模型对不同攻击的预测进行了一些附带的敏感性分析。这些攻击包括各种频域过滤级别以及与多个标签相关的样本之间的逐渐变形。我们的结果可以帮助更好地理解不同模块在预测中的行为，并可以为数据有限且存在噪声的应用提供指导。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种参数高效的单调性约束注意力模块（MCAM），用于在有限的脑电（EEG）数据下进行情绪分类。
AI.motivation: 在EEG数据有限且存在噪声的场景下，传统注意力模块参数冗余且难以有效利用先验信息，需设计更高效且鲁棒的模型。
AI.method: 设计MCAM模块，通过引入单调性约束将特征Gram矩阵转化为注意力矩阵，优化特征细化过程，并进行频域攻击和样本渐变的敏感性分析。
AI.result: MCAM在参数量更少的情况下性能接近最先进方法，敏感性分析揭示了模块对噪声和数据变化的鲁棒性，为实际应用提供指导。
AI.conclusion: MCAM在有限EEG数据场景下有效，兼顾参数效率与鲁棒性，其分析结果可帮助理解模型行为并优化实际部署策略。

search_text: A Monotonicity Constrained Attention Module for Emotion Classification with Limited EEG Data 用于有限脑电数据的情绪分类的单调性约束注意模块 In this work, a parameter-efficient attention module is presented for emotion classification using a limited, or relatively small, number of electroencephalogram (EEG) signals. This module is called the Monotonicity Constrained Attention Module (MCAM) due to its capability of incorporating priors on the monotonicity when converting features' Gram matrices into attention matrices for better feature refinement. Our experiments have shown that MCAM's effectiveness is comparable to state-of-the-art attention modules in boosting the backbone network's performance in prediction while requiring less parameters. Several accompanying sensitivity analyses on trained models' prediction concerning different attacks are also performed. These attacks include various frequency domain filtering levels and gradually morphing between samples associated with multiple labels. Our results can help better understand different modules' behaviour in prediction and can provide guidance in applications where data is limited and are with noises. 在这项工作中，提出了一种参数有效的注意力模块，用于使用有限或相对少量的脑电图（EEG）信号进行情绪分类。该模块被称为单调性约束注意模块（MCAM），因为它能够在将特征的 Gram 矩阵转换为注意矩阵时结合单调性先验，以实现更好的特征细化。我们的实验表明，MCAM 的有效性与最先进的注意力模块相当，可以提高骨干网络的预测性能，同时需要更少的参数。还对经过训练的模型对不同攻击的预测进行了一些附带的敏感性分析。这些攻击包括各种频域过滤级别以及与多个标签相关的样本之间的逐渐变形。我们的结果可以帮助更好地理解不同模块在预测中的行为，并可以为数据有限且存在噪声的应用提供指导。 本文提出一种参数高效的单调性约束注意力模块（MCAM），用于在有限的脑电（EEG）数据下进行情绪分类。 Dongyang Kuang,Craig Michoski,Wenting Li,Rui Guo eess.SP,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Haixiao Chi,Dawei Wang,Gaojie Cui,Feng Mao,Beishui Liao
title: A Concept and Argumentation based Interpretable Model in High Risk Domains
title_zh: 高风险领域中基于概念和论证的可解释模型
abstract: Interpretability has become an essential topic for artificial intelligence in some high-risk domains such as healthcare, bank and security. For commonly-used tabular data, traditional methods trained end-to-end machine learning models with numerical and categorical data only, and did not leverage human understandable knowledge such as data descriptions. Yet mining human-level knowledge from tabular data and using it for prediction remain a challenge. Therefore, we propose a concept and argumentation based model (CAM) that includes the following two components: a novel concept mining method to obtain human understandable concepts and their relations from both descriptions of features and the underlying data, and a quantitative argumentation-based method to do knowledge representation and reasoning. As a result of it, CAM provides decisions that are based on human-level knowledge and the reasoning process is intrinsically interpretable. Finally, to visualize the purposed interpretable model, we provide a dialogical explanation that contain dominated reasoning path within CAM. Experimental results on both open source benchmark dataset and real-word business dataset show that (1) CAM is transparent and interpretable, and the knowledge inside the CAM is coherent with human understanding; (2) Our interpretable approach can reach competitive results comparing with other state-of-art models.
summary: Interpretability has become an essential topic for artificial intelligence in some high-risk domains such as healthcare, bank and security. For commonly-used tabular data, traditional methods trained end-to-end machine learning models with numerical and categorical data only, and did not leverage human understandable knowledge such as data descriptions. Yet mining human-level knowledge from tabular data and using it for prediction remain a challenge. Therefore, we propose a concept and argumentation based model (CAM) that includes the following two components: a novel concept mining method to obtain human understandable concepts and their relations from both descriptions of features and the underlying data, and a quantitative argumentation-based method to do knowledge representation and reasoning. As a result of it, CAM provides decisions that are based on human-level knowledge and the reasoning process is intrinsically interpretable. Finally, to visualize the purposed interpretable model, we provide a dialogical explanation that contain dominated reasoning path within CAM. Experimental results on both open source benchmark dataset and real-word business dataset show that (1) CAM is transparent and interpretable, and the knowledge inside the CAM is coherent with human understanding; (2) Our interpretable approach can reach competitive results comparing with other state-of-art models.
abstract_zh: 可解释性已成为人工智能在医疗、银行和安全等一些高风险领域的重要课题。对于常用的表格数据，传统方法仅使用数值和分类数据训练端到端机器学习模型，而没有利用数据描述等人类可理解的知识。然而，从表格数据中挖掘人类水平的知识并将其用于预测仍然是一个挑战。因此，我们提出了一种基于概念和论证的模型（CAM），它包括以下两个部分：一种新颖的概念挖掘方法，用于从特征描述和底层数据中获取人类可理解的概念及其关系；以及一种基于定量论证的方法，用于进行知识表示和推理。因此，CAM 提供基于人类知识的决策，并且推理过程本质上是可解释的。最后，为了可视化有目的的可解释模型，我们提供了一个对话解释，其中包含 CAM 内的主导推理路径。在开源基准数据集和真实商业数据集上的实验结果表明：（1）CAM是透明的、可解释的，CAM内部的知识与人类的理解是一致的； （2）与其他最先进的模型相比，我们的可解释方法可以达到有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于概念与论证的可解释模型（CAM），用于高风险领域中的表格数据分析，通过挖掘人类可理解的概念和推理过程提升模型透明度。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型在处理医疗、金融等高风险领域数据时缺乏可解释性，难以利用人类可理解的知识进行决策，导致信任度不足。
AI.method: CAM包含两部分：1）从特征描述和数据中挖掘人类可理解的概念及其关系；2）基于量化论证的知识表示与推理方法，并通过对话式解释可视化推理路径。
AI.result: 在开源数据集和实际业务数据集上验证，CAM模型具有透明性且知识与人类认知一致，性能与先进模型相当。
AI.conclusion: CAM通过融合人类知识与论证推理，为高风险领域提供了兼具可解释性与竞争力的解决方案。

authors_text: Hua Li,Junyan Liang,Ruiqi Wu,Runmin Cong,Junhui Wu,Sam Tak Wu Kwong
title: Stereo Superpixel Segmentation Via Decoupled Dynamic Spatial-Embedding Fusion Network
title_zh: 通过解耦动态空间嵌入融合网络进行立体超像素分割
abstract: Stereo superpixel segmentation aims at grouping the discretizing pixels into perceptual regions through left and right views more collaboratively and efficiently. Existing superpixel segmentation algorithms mostly utilize color and spatial features as input, which may impose strong constraints on spatial information while utilizing the disparity information in terms of stereo image pairs. To alleviate this issue, we propose a stereo superpixel segmentation method with a decoupling mechanism of spatial information in this work. To decouple stereo disparity information and spatial information, the spatial information is temporarily removed before fusing the features of stereo image pairs, and a decoupled stereo fusion module (DSFM) is proposed to handle the stereo features alignment as well as occlusion problems. Moreover, since the spatial information is vital to superpixel segmentation, we further design a dynamic spatiality embedding module (DSEM) to re-add spatial information, and the weights of spatial information will be adaptively adjusted through the dynamic fusion (DF) mechanism in DSEM for achieving a finer segmentation. Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate that our method can achieve the state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI2015 and Cityscapes datasets, and also verify the efficiency when applied in salient object detection on NJU2K dataset. The source code will be available publicly after paper is accepted.
summary: Stereo superpixel segmentation aims at grouping the discretizing pixels into perceptual regions through left and right views more collaboratively and efficiently. Existing superpixel segmentation algorithms mostly utilize color and spatial features as input, which may impose strong constraints on spatial information while utilizing the disparity information in terms of stereo image pairs. To alleviate this issue, we propose a stereo superpixel segmentation method with a decoupling mechanism of spatial information in this work. To decouple stereo disparity information and spatial information, the spatial information is temporarily removed before fusing the features of stereo image pairs, and a decoupled stereo fusion module (DSFM) is proposed to handle the stereo features alignment as well as occlusion problems. Moreover, since the spatial information is vital to superpixel segmentation, we further design a dynamic spatiality embedding module (DSEM) to re-add spatial information, and the weights of spatial information will be adaptively adjusted through the dynamic fusion (DF) mechanism in DSEM for achieving a finer segmentation. Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate that our method can achieve the state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI2015 and Cityscapes datasets, and also verify the efficiency when applied in salient object detection on NJU2K dataset. The source code will be available publicly after paper is accepted.
abstract_zh: 立体超像素分割旨在通过左视图和右视图更加协作和高效地将离散像素分组到感知区域。现有的超像素分割算法大多利用颜色和空间特征作为输入，这在利用立体图像对的视差信息的同时可能对空间信息施加强烈的约束。为了缓解这个问题，我们在这项工作中提出了一种具有空间信息解耦机制的立体超像素分割方法。为了解耦立体视差信息和空间信息，在融合立体图像对的特征之前暂时去除空间信息，并提出解耦立体融合模块（DSFM）来处理立体特征对齐和遮挡问题。此外，由于空间信息对于超像素分割至关重要，因此我们进一步设计了动态空间嵌入模块（DSEM）来重新添加空间信息，并且通过DSEM中的动态融合（DF）机制自适应调整空间信息的权重，以实现更精细的分割。综合实验结果表明，我们的方法可以在 KITTI2015 和 Cityscapes 数据集上实现最先进的性能，并且还验证了应用于 NJU2K 数据集上的显着目标检测时的效率。论文被接受后，源代码将公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于解耦动态空间嵌入融合网络的立体超像素分割方法，旨在通过更高效协作利用左右视图信息实现像素分组。
AI.motivation: 现有超像素分割算法过度依赖颜色和空间特征，限制了立体图像对视差信息的有效利用，导致空间信息约束过强。
AI.method: 设计解耦立体融合模块（DSFM）分离视差与空间信息，并通过动态空间性嵌入模块（DSEM）结合动态融合机制自适应调整空间权重。
AI.result: 在KITTI2015和Cityscapes数据集上达到SOTA性能，在NJU2K数据集的显著物体检测中验证了方法效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦融合机制与动态权重调整，有效提升了立体超像素分割的精度与鲁棒性。

Comprehensive experimental results demonstrate that our method can achieve the state-of-the-art performance on the KITTI2015 and Cityscapes datasets, and also verify the efficiency when applied in salient object detection on NJU2K dataset. The source code will be available publicly after paper is accepted. 立体超像素分割旨在通过左视图和右视图更加协作和高效地将离散像素分组到感知区域。现有的超像素分割算法大多利用颜色和空间特征作为输入，这在利用立体图像对的视差信息的同时可能对空间信息施加强烈的约束。为了缓解这个问题，我们在这项工作中提出了一种具有空间信息解耦机制的立体超像素分割方法。为了解耦立体视差信息和空间信息，在融合立体图像对的特征之前暂时去除空间信息，并提出解耦立体融合模块（DSFM）来处理立体特征对齐和遮挡问题。此外，由于空间信息对于超像素分割至关重要，因此我们进一步设计了动态空间嵌入模块（DSEM）来重新添加空间信息，并且通过DSEM中的动态融合（DF）机制自适应调整空间信息的权重，以实现更精细的分割。综合实验结果表明，我们的方法可以在 KITTI2015 和 Cityscapes 数据集上实现最先进的性能，并且还验证了应用于 NJU2K 数据集上的显着目标检测时的效率。论文被接受后，源代码将公开提供。 本文提出一种基于解耦动态空间嵌入融合网络的立体超像素分割方法，旨在通过更高效协作利用左右视图信息实现像素分组。 Hua Li,Junyan Liang,Ruiqi Wu,Runmin Cong,Junhui Wu,Sam Tak Wu Kwong cs.CV

authors_text: Bo Liu,Yihao Feng,Qiang Liu,Peter Stone
title: Metric Residual Networks for Sample Efficient Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 用于样本高效目标条件强化学习的度量残差网络
comment: Goal-conditioned reinforcement learning, neural architecture design
comments: Goal-conditioned reinforcement learning, neural architecture design
abstract: Goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (GCRL) has a wide range of potential real-world applications, including manipulation and navigation problems in robotics. Especially in such robotics tasks, sample efficiency is of the utmost importance for GCRL since, by default, the agent is only rewarded when it reaches its goal. While several methods have been proposed to improve the sample efficiency of GCRL, one relatively under-studied approach is the design of neural architectures to support sample efficiency. In this work, we introduce a novel neural architecture for GCRL that achieves significantly better sample efficiency than the commonly-used monolithic network architecture. The key insight is that the optimal action-value function Q^*(s, a, g) must satisfy the triangle inequality in a specific sense. Furthermore, we introduce the metric residual network (MRN) that deliberately decomposes the action-value function Q(s,a,g) into the negated summation of a metric plus a residual asymmetric component. MRN provably approximates any optimal action-value function Q^*(s,a,g), thus making it a fitting neural architecture for GCRL. We conduct comprehensive experiments across 12 standard benchmark environments in GCRL. The empirical results demonstrate that MRN uniformly outperforms other state-of-the-art GCRL neural architectures in terms of sample efficiency.
summary: Goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (GCRL) has a wide range of potential real-world applications, including manipulation and navigation problems in robotics. Especially in such robotics tasks, sample efficiency is of the utmost importance for GCRL since, by default, the agent is only rewarded when it reaches its goal. While several methods have been proposed to improve the sample efficiency of GCRL, one relatively under-studied approach is the design of neural architectures to support sample efficiency. In this work, we introduce a novel neural architecture for GCRL that achieves significantly better sample efficiency than the commonly-used monolithic network architecture. The key insight is that the optimal action-value function Q^*(s, a, g) must satisfy the triangle inequality in a specific sense. Furthermore, we introduce the metric residual network (MRN) that deliberately decomposes the action-value function Q(s,a,g) into the negated summation of a metric plus a residual asymmetric component. MRN provably approximates any optimal action-value function Q^*(s,a,g), thus making it a fitting neural architecture for GCRL. We conduct comprehensive experiments across 12 standard benchmark environments in GCRL. The empirical results demonstrate that MRN uniformly outperforms other state-of-the-art GCRL neural architectures in terms of sample efficiency.
abstract_zh: 目标条件强化学习（GCRL）在现实世界中具有广泛的潜在应用，包括机器人技术中的操纵和导航问题。特别是在此类机器人任务中，样本效率对于 GCRL 至关重要，因为默认情况下，智能体只有在达到目标时才会获得奖励。虽然已经提出了几种方法来提高 GCRL 的样本效率，但一种相对未被充分研究的方法是设计支持样本效率的神经架构。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的 GCRL 神经架构，它比常用的整体网络架构具有显着更好的样本效率。关键的见解是，最优动作价值函数 Q^*(s, a, g) 必须满足特定意义上的三角不等式。此外，我们引入了度量残差网络（MRN），它故意将动作价值函数 Q(s,a,g) 分解为度量加上残差不对称分量的负和。 MRN 可证明逼近任何最佳动作价值函数 Q^*(s,a,g)，从而使其成为 GCRL 的合适神经架构。我们在 GCRL 的 12 个标准基准测试环境中进行了全面的实验。实证结果表明，MRN 在样本效率方面均优于其他最先进的 GCRL 神经架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为度量残差网络（MRN）的新神经网络架构，用于提高目标条件强化学习（GCRL）的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 在机器人等实际应用中，目标条件强化学习的样本效率至关重要，但现有方法对神经网络结构的设计研究不足，因此需要探索更高效的架构设计。
AI.method: 通过将动作价值函数分解为度量项与残差不对称项的负和，设计满足三角不等式的MRN架构，理论上可逼近任意最优Q函数。
AI.result: 在12个标准GCRL基准环境中，MRN在样本效率上全面优于现有最先进架构。
AI.conclusion: MRN通过函数分解设计有效提升了GCRL的样本效率，为该领域提供了新的神经网络架构范式。

Especially in such robotics tasks, sample efficiency is of the utmost importance for GCRL since, by default, the agent is only rewarded when it reaches its goal. While several methods have been proposed to improve the sample efficiency of GCRL, one relatively under-studied approach is the design of neural architectures to support sample efficiency. In this work, we introduce a novel neural architecture for GCRL that achieves significantly better sample efficiency than the commonly-used monolithic network architecture. The key insight is that the optimal action-value function Q^*(s, a, g) must satisfy the triangle inequality in a specific sense. Furthermore, we introduce the metric residual network (MRN) that deliberately decomposes the action-value function Q(s,a,g) into the negated summation of a metric plus a residual asymmetric component. MRN provably approximates any optimal action-value function Q^*(s,a,g), thus making it a fitting neural architecture for GCRL. We conduct comprehensive experiments across 12 standard benchmark environments in GCRL. The empirical results demonstrate that MRN uniformly outperforms other state-of-the-art GCRL neural architectures in terms of sample efficiency. 目标条件强化学习（GCRL）在现实世界中具有广泛的潜在应用，包括机器人技术中的操纵和导航问题。特别是在此类机器人任务中，样本效率对于 GCRL 至关重要，因为默认情况下，智能体只有在达到目标时才会获得奖励。虽然已经提出了几种方法来提高 GCRL 的样本效率，但一种相对未被充分研究的方法是设计支持样本效率的神经架构。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种新颖的 GCRL 神经架构，它比常用的整体网络架构具有显着更好的样本效率。关键的见解是，最优动作价值函数 Q^*(s, a, g) 必须满足特定意义上的三角不等式。此外，我们引入了度量残差网络（MRN），它故意将动作价值函数 Q(s,a,g) 分解为度量加上残差不对称分量的负和。 MRN 可证明逼近任何最佳动作价值函数 Q^*(s,a,g)，从而使其成为 GCRL 的合适神经架构。我们在 GCRL 的 12 个标准基准测试环境中进行了全面的实验。实证结果表明，MRN 在样本效率方面均优于其他最先进的 GCRL 神经架构。 本文提出了一种名为度量残差网络（MRN）的新神经网络架构，用于提高目标条件强化学习（GCRL）的样本效率。 Bo Liu,Yihao Feng,Qiang Liu,Peter Stone cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Dung Anh Hoang,Cuong Nguyen,Belagiannis Vasileios,Thanh-Toan Do,Gustavo Carneiro
title: Maximising the Utility of Validation Sets for Imbalanced Noisy-label Meta-learning
title_zh: 最大化不平衡噪声标签元学习验证集的效用
abstract: Meta-learning is an effective method to handle imbalanced and noisy-label learning, but it depends on a validation set containing randomly selected, manually labelled and balanced distributed samples. The random selection and manual labelling and balancing of this validation set is not only sub-optimal for meta-learning, but it also scales poorly with the number of classes. Hence, recent meta-learning papers have proposed ad-hoc heuristics to automatically build and label this validation set, but these heuristics are still sub-optimal for meta-learning. In this paper, we analyse the meta-learning algorithm and propose new criteria to characterise the utility of the validation set, based on: 1) the informativeness of the validation set; 2) the class distribution balance of the set; and 3) the correctness of the labels of the set. Furthermore, we propose a new imbalanced noisy-label meta-learning (INOLML) algorithm that automatically builds a validation set by maximising its utility using the criteria above. Our method shows significant improvements over previous meta-learning approaches and sets the new state-of-the-art on several benchmarks.
summary: Meta-learning is an effective method to handle imbalanced and noisy-label learning, but it depends on a validation set containing randomly selected, manually labelled and balanced distributed samples. The random selection and manual labelling and balancing of this validation set is not only sub-optimal for meta-learning, but it also scales poorly with the number of classes. Hence, recent meta-learning papers have proposed ad-hoc heuristics to automatically build and label this validation set, but these heuristics are still sub-optimal for meta-learning. In this paper, we analyse the meta-learning algorithm and propose new criteria to characterise the utility of the validation set, based on: 1) the informativeness of the validation set; 2) the class distribution balance of the set; and 3) the correctness of the labels of the set. Furthermore, we propose a new imbalanced noisy-label meta-learning (INOLML) algorithm that automatically builds a validation set by maximising its utility using the criteria above. Our method shows significant improvements over previous meta-learning approaches and sets the new state-of-the-art on several benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 元学习是处理不平衡和噪声标签学习的有效方法，但它依赖于包含随机选择、手动标记和平衡分布样本的验证集。该验证集的随机选择、手动标记和平衡不仅对于元学习来说不是最佳的，而且随着类别数量的扩展也很差。因此，最近的元学习论文提出了临时启发式方法来自动构建和标记该验证集，但这些启发式对于元学习来说仍然不是最佳的。在本文中，我们分析了元学习算法，并提出了新的标准来表征验证集的效用，基于：1）验证集的信息量； 2）集合的类别分配平衡； 3）集合标签的正确性。此外，我们提出了一种新的不平衡噪声标签元学习（INOLML）算法，该算法通过使用上述标准最大化其效用来自动构建验证集。我们的方法比以前的元学习方法有了显着的改进，并在几个基准上设定了新的最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的不平衡噪声标签元学习算法(INOLML)，通过优化验证集的信息量、类别平衡性和标签正确性来提升元学习性能。
AI.motivation: 传统元学习依赖随机选择的手动验证集，存在扩展性差、效率低的问题，现有自动构建方法仍不够优化。
AI.method: 提出三个验证集效用评估标准（信息量/类别平衡/标签正确性），设计INOLML算法自动构建最优验证集。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中显著优于现有方法，达到新的状态-of-the-art水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统性优化验证集构建标准，有效提升了不平衡噪声标签场景下的元学习性能。

authors_text: Fang-Ching Chen,Kuan-Dar Chen,Yi-Wen Liu
title: Domestic sound event detection by shift consistency mean-teacher training and adversarial domain adaptation
title_zh: 通过班次一致性平均教师训练和对抗域适应进行家庭声音事件检测
abstract: Semi-supervised learning and domain adaptation techniques have drawn increasing attention in the field of domestic sound event detection thanks to the availability of large amounts of unlabeled data and the relative ease to generate synthetic strongly-labeled data. In a previous work, several semi-supervised learning strategies were designed to boost the performance of a mean-teacher model. Namely, these strategies include shift consistency training (SCT), interpolation consistency training (ICT), and pseudo-labeling. However, adversarial domain adaptation (ADA) did not seem to improve the event detection accuracy further when we attempt to compensate for the domain gap between synthetic and real data. In this research, we empirically found that ICT tends to pull apart the distributions of synthetic and real data in t-SNE plots. Therefore, ICT is abandoned while SCT, in contrast, is applied to train both the student and the teacher models. With these modifications, the system successfully integrates with an ADA network, and we achieve 47.2% in the F1 score on the DCASE 2020 task 4 dataset, which is 2.1% higher than what was reported in the previous work.
summary: Semi-supervised learning and domain adaptation techniques have drawn increasing attention in the field of domestic sound event detection thanks to the availability of large amounts of unlabeled data and the relative ease to generate synthetic strongly-labeled data. In a previous work, several semi-supervised learning strategies were designed to boost the performance of a mean-teacher model. Namely, these strategies include shift consistency training (SCT), interpolation consistency training (ICT), and pseudo-labeling. However, adversarial domain adaptation (ADA) did not seem to improve the event detection accuracy further when we attempt to compensate for the domain gap between synthetic and real data. In this research, we empirically found that ICT tends to pull apart the distributions of synthetic and real data in t-SNE plots. Therefore, ICT is abandoned while SCT, in contrast, is applied to train both the student and the teacher models. With these modifications, the system successfully integrates with an ADA network, and we achieve 47.2% in the F1 score on the DCASE 2020 task 4 dataset, which is 2.1% higher than what was reported in the previous work.
abstract_zh: 由于大量未标记数据的可用性以及生成合成强标记数据的相对容易性，半监督学习和领域适应技术在国内声音事件检测领域引起了越来越多的关注。在之前的工作中，设计了几种半监督学习策略来提高平均教师模型的性能。即，这些策略包括换档一致性训练（SCT）、插值一致性训练（ICT）和伪标签。然而，当我们尝试补偿合成数据和真实数据之间的域差距时，对抗性域适应（ADA）似乎并没有进一步提高事件检测的准确性。在这项研究中，我们凭经验发现 ICT 倾向于将 t-SNE 图中的合成数据和真实数据的分布分开。因此，ICT被放弃，而SCT则相反，被应用于训练学生和教师模型。通过这些修改，系统成功与 ADA 网络集成，我们在 DCASE 2020 任务 4 数据集上的 F1 分数达到 47.2%，比之前的工作报告高出 2.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合迁移一致性均值教师训练和对抗域适应的方法，用于提升家庭声事件检测的性能。
AI.motivation: 由于未标记数据的大量存在以及合成强标记数据的相对容易性，半监督学习和域适应技术在家庭声事件检测中受到越来越多的关注。然而，之前的工作发现对抗域适应（ADA）未能进一步提高事件检测的准确性。
AI.method: 本文通过实验发现插值一致性训练（ICT）会拉大合成数据和真实数据的分布，因此放弃ICT，改用迁移一致性训练（SCT）来训练学生和教师模型，并将SCT与对抗域适应网络结合。
AI.result: 在DCASE 2020任务4数据集上，系统实现了47.2%的F1分数，比之前的工作提高了2.1%。
AI.conclusion: 通过放弃ICT并采用SCT结合ADA的方法，可以有效提升家庭声事件检测的性能。

search_text: Domestic sound event detection by shift consistency mean-teacher training and adversarial domain adaptation 通过班次一致性平均教师训练和对抗域适应进行家庭声音事件检测 Semi-supervised learning and domain adaptation techniques have drawn increasing attention in the field of domestic sound event detection thanks to the availability of large amounts of unlabeled data and the relative ease to generate synthetic strongly-labeled data. In a previous work, several semi-supervised learning strategies were designed to boost the performance of a mean-teacher model. Namely, these strategies include shift consistency training (SCT), interpolation consistency training (ICT), and pseudo-labeling. However, adversarial domain adaptation (ADA) did not seem to improve the event detection accuracy further when we attempt to compensate for the domain gap between synthetic and real data. In this research, we empirically found that ICT tends to pull apart the distributions of synthetic and real data in t-SNE plots. Therefore, ICT is abandoned while SCT, in contrast, is applied to train both the student and the teacher models. With these modifications, the system successfully integrates with an ADA network, and we achieve 47.2% in the F1 score on the DCASE 2020 task 4 dataset, which is 2.1% higher than what was reported in the previous work. 由于大量未标记数据的可用性以及生成合成强标记数据的相对容易性，半监督学习和领域适应技术在国内声音事件检测领域引起了越来越多的关注。在之前的工作中，设计了几种半监督学习策略来提高平均教师模型的性能。即，这些策略包括换档一致性训练（SCT）、插值一致性训练（ICT）和伪标签。然而，当我们尝试补偿合成数据和真实数据之间的域差距时，对抗性域适应（ADA）似乎并没有进一步提高事件检测的准确性。在这项研究中，我们凭经验发现 ICT 倾向于将 t-SNE 图中的合成数据和真实数据的分布分开。因此，ICT被放弃，而SCT则相反，被应用于训练学生和教师模型。通过这些修改，系统成功与 ADA 网络集成，我们在 DCASE 2020 任务 4 数据集上的 F1 分数达到 47.2%，比之前的工作报告高出 2.1%。 本文提出了一种结合迁移一致性均值教师训练和对抗域适应的方法，用于提升家庭声事件检测的性能。 Fang-Ching Chen,Kuan-Dar Chen,Yi-Wen Liu cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Elwin Huaman,Dieter Fensel
title: Knowledge Graph Curation: A Practical Framework
title_zh: 知识图谱管理：实用框架
comment: 6 pages, 1 figure, published in The 10th International Joint Conference on Knowledge Graphs (IJCKG'21) proceeding
comments: 6 pages, 1 figure, published in The 10th International Joint Conference on Knowledge Graphs (IJCKG'21) proceeding
abstract: Knowledge Graphs (KGs) have shown to be very important for applications such as personal assistants, question-answering systems, and search engines. Therefore, it is crucial to ensure their high quality. However, KGs inevitably contain errors, duplicates, and missing values, which may hinder their adoption and utility in business applications, as they are not curated, e.g., low-quality KGs produce low-quality applications that are built on top of them. In this vision paper, we propose a practical knowledge graph curation framework for improving the quality of KGs. First, we define a set of quality metrics for assessing the status of KGs, Second, we describe the verification and validation of KGs as cleaning tasks, Third, we present duplicate detection and knowledge fusion strategies for enriching KGs. Furthermore, we give insights and directions toward a better architecture for curating KGs.
summary: Knowledge Graphs (KGs) have shown to be very important for applications such as personal assistants, question-answering systems, and search engines. Therefore, it is crucial to ensure their high quality. However, KGs inevitably contain errors, duplicates, and missing values, which may hinder their adoption and utility in business applications, as they are not curated, e.g., low-quality KGs produce low-quality applications that are built on top of them. In this vision paper, we propose a practical knowledge graph curation framework for improving the quality of KGs. First, we define a set of quality metrics for assessing the status of KGs, Second, we describe the verification and validation of KGs as cleaning tasks, Third, we present duplicate detection and knowledge fusion strategies for enriching KGs. Furthermore, we give insights and directions toward a better architecture for curating KGs.
abstract_zh: 知识图谱 (KG) 已被证明对于个人助理、问答系统和搜索引擎等应用非常重要。因此，确保其高质量至关重要。然而，知识图谱不可避免地包含错误、重复和缺失值，这可能会阻碍它们在业务应用程序中的采用和实用性，因为它们没有经过精心策划，例如，低质量的知识图谱会产生构建在其之上的低质量应用程序。在这篇愿景论文中，我们提出了一个实用的知识图管理框架，用于提高知识图谱的质量。首先，我们定义了一组用于评估知识图谱状态的质量指标，其次，我们将知识图谱的验证和确认描述为清理任务，第三，我们提出了用于丰富知识图谱的重复检测和知识融合策略。此外，我们还为构建更好的 KG 架构提供了见解和方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实用的知识图谱（KG）整理框架，旨在通过质量评估、清洗任务和知识融合策略提升KG的质量。
AI.motivation: 知识图谱在实际应用中存在错误、重复和缺失值等问题，导致其质量低下，影响基于KG的应用效果，因此需要有效的整理方法。
AI.method: 首先定义KG质量评估指标，其次描述验证与清洗任务，再提出重复检测与知识融合策略，并探讨更优的整理架构方向。
AI.result: 提出了系统化的KG整理框架，包括质量评估方法、清洗策略及融合技术，并为未来架构优化提供了见解。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为提升KG质量提供了实践路径，有助于推动KG在商业应用中的可靠性和实用性。

authors_text: Weijie Wang,Song Liu,Qinfeng Shan,Lihao Jia
title: Highly dynamic locomotion control of biped robot enhanced by swing arms
title_zh: 摆臂增强双足机器人高动态运动控制
abstract: Swing arms have an irreplaceable role in promoting highly dynamic locomotion on bipedal robots by a larger angular momentum control space from the viewpoint of biomechanics. Few bipedal robots utilize swing arms and its redundancy characteristic of multiple degrees of freedom due to the lack of appropriate locomotion control strategies to perfectly integrate modeling and control. This paper presents a kind of control strategy by modeling the bipedal robot as a flywheel-spring loaded inverted pendulum (F-SLIP) to extract characteristics of swing arms and using the whole-body controller (WBC) to achieve these characteristics, and also proposes a evaluation system including three aspects of agility defined by us, stability and energy consumption for the highly dynamic locomotion of bipedal robots. We design several sets of simulation experiments and analyze the effects of swing arms according to the evaluation system during the jumping motion of Purple (Purple energy rises in the east)V1.0, a kind of bipedal robot designed to test high explosive locomotion. Results show that Purple's agility is increased by more than 10 percent, stabilization time is reduced by a factor of two, and energy consumption is reduced by more than 20 percent after introducing swing arms.
summary: Swing arms have an irreplaceable role in promoting highly dynamic locomotion on bipedal robots by a larger angular momentum control space from the viewpoint of biomechanics. Few bipedal robots utilize swing arms and its redundancy characteristic of multiple degrees of freedom due to the lack of appropriate locomotion control strategies to perfectly integrate modeling and control. This paper presents a kind of control strategy by modeling the bipedal robot as a flywheel-spring loaded inverted pendulum (F-SLIP) to extract characteristics of swing arms and using the whole-body controller (WBC) to achieve these characteristics, and also proposes a evaluation system including three aspects of agility defined by us, stability and energy consumption for the highly dynamic locomotion of bipedal robots. We design several sets of simulation experiments and analyze the effects of swing arms according to the evaluation system during the jumping motion of Purple (Purple energy rises in the east)V1.0, a kind of bipedal robot designed to test high explosive locomotion. Results show that Purple's agility is increased by more than 10 percent, stabilization time is reduced by a factor of two, and energy consumption is reduced by more than 20 percent after introducing swing arms.
abstract_zh: 从生物力学的角度来看，摆臂通过更大的角动量控制空间，在促进双足机器人高动态运动方面具有不可替代的作用。由于缺乏适当的运动控制策略来完美地集成建模和控制，很少有双足机器人利用摆臂及其多自由度的冗余特性。本文提出了一种通过将双足机器人建模为飞轮弹簧加载倒立摆（F-SLIP）来提取摆臂特征并使用全身控制器（WBC）来实现这些特征的控制策略，并提出了一种包括我们定义的敏捷性、稳定性和能耗三个方面的双足机器人高动态运动的评估体系。我们设计了多组仿真实验，根据评估系统，分析了用于测试高爆发力运动的双足机器人Purple（紫能量东升）V1.0跳跃运动时摆臂的效果。结果表明，引入摆臂后，Purple的敏捷性提高了10%以上，稳定时间缩短了两倍，能量消耗降低了20%以上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过摆臂增强双足机器人高动态运动控制的策略，并验证了其效果。
AI.motivation: 现有双足机器人因缺乏有效的控制策略，未能充分利用摆臂的多自由度冗余特性来提升动态运动能力。
AI.method: 将双足机器人建模为飞轮-弹簧加载倒立摆（F-SLIP），结合全身控制器（WBC）实现摆臂特性，并设计包含敏捷性、稳定性及能耗的评估体系进行实验验证。
AI.result: 引入摆臂后，Purple V1.0机器人敏捷性提升超10%，稳定时间缩短至原1/2，能耗降低超20%。
AI.conclusion: 该控制策略有效提升了双足机器人的高动态运动性能，验证了摆臂在动态行走中的关键作用。

motivation: 现有双足机器人因缺乏有效的控制策略，未能充分利用摆臂的多自由度冗余特性来提升动态运动能力。
method: 将双足机器人建模为飞轮-弹簧加载倒立摆（F-SLIP），结合全身控制器（WBC）实现摆臂特性，并设计包含敏捷性、稳定性及能耗的评估体系进行实验验证。
result: 引入摆臂后，Purple V1.0机器人敏捷性提升超10%，稳定时间缩短至原1/2，能耗降低超20%。
conclusion: 该控制策略有效提升了双足机器人的高动态运动性能，验证了摆臂在动态行走中的关键作用。
search_text: Highly dynamic locomotion control of biped robot enhanced by swing arms 摆臂增强双足机器人高动态运动控制 Swing arms have an irreplaceable role in promoting highly dynamic locomotion on bipedal robots by a larger angular momentum control space from the viewpoint of biomechanics. Few bipedal robots utilize swing arms and its redundancy characteristic of multiple degrees of freedom due to the lack of appropriate locomotion control strategies to perfectly integrate modeling and control. This paper presents a kind of control strategy by modeling the bipedal robot as a flywheel-spring loaded inverted pendulum (F-SLIP) to extract characteristics of swing arms and using the whole-body controller (WBC) to achieve these characteristics, and also proposes a evaluation system including three aspects of agility defined by us, stability and energy consumption for the highly dynamic locomotion of bipedal robots. We design several sets of simulation experiments and analyze the effects of swing arms according to the evaluation system during the jumping motion of Purple (Purple energy rises in the east)V1.0, a kind of bipedal robot designed to test high explosive locomotion. Results show that Purple's agility is increased by more than 10 percent, stabilization time is reduced by a factor of two, and energy consumption is reduced by more than 20 percent after introducing swing arms. 从生物力学的角度来看，摆臂通过更大的角动量控制空间，在促进双足机器人高动态运动方面具有不可替代的作用。由于缺乏适当的运动控制策略来完美地集成建模和控制，很少有双足机器人利用摆臂及其多自由度的冗余特性。本文提出了一种通过将双足机器人建模为飞轮弹簧加载倒立摆（F-SLIP）来提取摆臂特征并使用全身控制器（WBC）来实现这些特征的控制策略，并提出了一种包括我们定义的敏捷性、稳定性和能耗三个方面的双足机器人高动态运动的评估体系。我们设计了多组仿真实验，根据评估系统，分析了用于测试高爆发力运动的双足机器人Purple（紫能量东升）V1.0跳跃运动时摆臂的效果。结果表明，引入摆臂后，Purple的敏捷性提高了10%以上，稳定时间缩短了两倍，能量消耗降低了20%以上。 本文提出了一种通过摆臂增强双足机器人高动态运动控制的策略，并验证了其效果。 Weijie Wang,Song Liu,Qinfeng Shan,Lihao Jia cs.RO

authors_text: Magnús M. Halldórsson,Yannic Maus,Alexandre Nolin
title: Fast Distributed Vertex Splitting with Applications
title_zh: 使用应用程序进行快速分布式顶点分割
abstract: We present ${\rm poly\log\log n}$-round randomized distributed algorithms to compute vertex splittings, a partition of the vertices of a graph into $k$ parts such that a node of degree $d(u)$ has $\approx d(u)/k$ neighbors in each part. Our techniques can be seen as the first progress towards general ${\rm poly\log\log n}$-round algorithms for the Lovász Local Lemma. As the main application of our result, we obtain a randomized ${\rm poly\log\log n}$-round CONGEST algorithm for $(1+ε)Δ$-edge coloring $n$-node graphs of sufficiently large constant maximum degree $Δ$, for any $ε>0$. Further, our results improve the computation of defective colorings and certain tight list coloring problems. All the results improve the state-of-the-art round complexity exponentially, even in the LOCAL model.
summary: We present ${\rm poly\log\log n}$-round randomized distributed algorithms to compute vertex splittings, a partition of the vertices of a graph into $k$ parts such that a node of degree $d(u)$ has $\approx d(u)/k$ neighbors in each part. Our techniques can be seen as the first progress towards general ${\rm poly\log\log n}$-round algorithms for the Lovász Local Lemma. As the main application of our result, we obtain a randomized ${\rm poly\log\log n}$-round CONGEST algorithm for $(1+ε)Δ$-edge coloring $n$-node graphs of sufficiently large constant maximum degree $Δ$, for any $ε>0$. Further, our results improve the computation of defective colorings and certain tight list coloring problems. All the results improve the state-of-the-art round complexity exponentially, even in the LOCAL model.
abstract_zh: 我们提出 ${\rm poly\log\log n}$ 轮随机分布式算法来计算顶点分裂，将图的顶点划分为 $k$ 个部分，使得度数为 $d(u)$ 的节点在每个部分都有 $\approx d(u)/k$ 个邻居。我们的技术可以被视为 Lovász 局部引理的通用 ${\rm poly\log\log n}$ 轮算法的第一个进展。作为我们结果的主要应用，我们获得了一个随机的${\rm poly\log\log n}$-round CONGEST算法，用于$(1+ε)Δ$-边缘着色$n$-足够大的恒定最大度$Δ$的节点图，对于任何$ε>0$。此外，我们的结果改进了缺陷着色和某些严格列表着色问题的计算。所有结果都以指数方式提高了最先进的回合复杂度，即使在 LOCAL 模型中也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种快速分布式顶点分割算法，并将其应用于图的边着色等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有分布式算法在处理图分割和着色问题时，轮数复杂度较高，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计了基于随机化的多轮分布式算法，实现顶点分割并改进洛瓦兹局部引理的相关应用。
AI.result: 在CONGEST模型中，实现了(1+ε)Δ边着色算法，将轮数复杂度指数级提升，同时优化了缺陷着色和列表着色问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为分布式图算法提供了新的技术路径，显著提升了多项式对数轮复杂度下的计算效率。

authors_text: Sindhu B Hegde,Rudrabha Mukhopadhyay,Vinay P Namboodiri,C. V. Jawahar
title: Extreme-scale Talking-Face Video Upsampling with Audio-Visual Priors
title_zh: 具有视听先验的超大规模人脸视频上采样
comment: Accepted in ACM-MM 2022, 10 pages, 6 pages supplementary, 18 Figures
comments: Accepted in ACM-MM 2022, 10 pages, 6 pages supplementary, 18 Figures
abstract: In this paper, we explore an interesting question of what can be obtained from an $8\times8$ pixel video sequence. Surprisingly, it turns out to be quite a lot. We show that when we process this $8\times8$ video with the right set of audio and image priors, we can obtain a full-length, $256\times256$ video. We achieve this $32\times$ scaling of an extremely low-resolution input using our novel audio-visual upsampling network. The audio prior helps to recover the elemental facial details and precise lip shapes and a single high-resolution target identity image prior provides us with rich appearance details. Our approach is an end-to-end multi-stage framework. The first stage produces a coarse intermediate output video that can be then used to animate single target identity image and generate realistic, accurate and high-quality outputs. Our approach is simple and performs exceedingly well (an $8\times$ improvement in FID score) compared to previous super-resolution methods. We also extend our model to talking-face video compression, and show that we obtain a $3.5\times$ improvement in terms of bits/pixel over the previous state-of-the-art. The results from our network are thoroughly analyzed through extensive ablation experiments (in the paper and supplementary material). We also provide the demo video along with code and models on our website: \url{http://cvit.iiit.ac.in/research/projects/cvit-projects/talking-face-video-upsampling}.
summary: In this paper, we explore an interesting question of what can be obtained from an $8\times8$ pixel video sequence. Surprisingly, it turns out to be quite a lot. We show that when we process this $8\times8$ video with the right set of audio and image priors, we can obtain a full-length, $256\times256$ video. We achieve this $32\times$ scaling of an extremely low-resolution input using our novel audio-visual upsampling network. The audio prior helps to recover the elemental facial details and precise lip shapes and a single high-resolution target identity image prior provides us with rich appearance details. Our approach is an end-to-end multi-stage framework. The first stage produces a coarse intermediate output video that can be then used to animate single target identity image and generate realistic, accurate and high-quality outputs. Our approach is simple and performs exceedingly well (an $8\times$ improvement in FID score) compared to previous super-resolution methods. We also extend our model to talking-face video compression, and show that we obtain a $3.5\times$ improvement in terms of bits/pixel over the previous state-of-the-art. The results from our network are thoroughly analyzed through extensive ablation experiments (in the paper and supplementary material). We also provide the demo video along with code and models on our website: \url{http://cvit.iiit.ac.in/research/projects/cvit-projects/talking-face-video-upsampling}.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们探讨了一个有趣的问题，即可以从 $8\times8$ 像素视频序列中获得什么。令人惊讶的是，事实证明数量相当多。我们证明，当我们使用正确的音频和图像先验集处理这个 $8\times8$ 视频时，我们可以获得一个完整长度的 $256\times256$ 视频。我们使用我们新颖的视听上采样网络实现了极低分辨率输入的 $32\times$ 缩放。音频先验有助于恢复基本的面部细节和精确的嘴唇形状，单个高分辨率目标身份图像先验为我们提供了丰富的外观细节。我们的方法是端到端的多阶段框架。第一阶段产生粗略的中间输出视频，然后可用于对单个目标身份图像进行动画处理并生成逼真、准确和高质量的输出。与以前的超分辨率方法相比，我们的方法很简单并且性能非常好（FID 分数提高了 8 倍）。我们还将我们的模型扩展到人脸视频压缩，并表明我们在比特/像素方面比之前最先进的技术获得了 3.5 倍的改进。我们网络的结果通过广泛的消融实验（在论文和补充材料中）进行了彻底分析。我们还在我们的网站上提供演示视频以及代码和模型：\url{http://cvit.iiit.ac.in/research/projects/cvit-projects/talking-face-video-upsampling}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于音频-视觉先验的极端尺度 talking-face 视频超分辨率方法，将8×8像素的低分辨率视频重建为256×256像素的高质量视频。
AI.motivation: 传统超分辨率方法难以从极低分辨率输入中恢复精细的面部细节和动态表情，本文通过结合音频信息与目标身份图像先验，解决低分辨率视频重建中的细节丢失问题。
AI.method: 设计端到端多阶段框架：第一阶段生成粗粒度中间视频，第二阶段结合目标身份图像和音频先验进行细节优化，利用音频先验恢复面部特征与唇形，图像先验提供外观细节。
AI.result: 实现32倍尺度超分（FID分数提升8倍），视频压缩效率提升3.5倍（bits/pixel），并通过消融实验验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 音频-视觉先验与多阶段框架有效提升了极低分辨率 talking-face 视频的重建质量，为视频超分与压缩提供了新思路。

We also extend our model to talking-face video compression, and show that we obtain a $3.5\times$ improvement in terms of bits/pixel over the previous state-of-the-art. The results from our network are thoroughly analyzed through extensive ablation experiments (in the paper and supplementary material). We also provide the demo video along with code and models on our website: \url{http://cvit.iiit.ac.in/research/projects/cvit-projects/talking-face-video-upsampling}. 在本文中，我们探讨了一个有趣的问题，即可以从 $8\times8$ 像素视频序列中获得什么。令人惊讶的是，事实证明数量相当多。我们证明，当我们使用正确的音频和图像先验集处理这个 $8\times8$ 视频时，我们可以获得一个完整长度的 $256\times256$ 视频。我们使用我们新颖的视听上采样网络实现了极低分辨率输入的 $32\times$ 缩放。音频先验有助于恢复基本的面部细节和精确的嘴唇形状，单个高分辨率目标身份图像先验为我们提供了丰富的外观细节。我们的方法是端到端的多阶段框架。第一阶段产生粗略的中间输出视频，然后可用于对单个目标身份图像进行动画处理并生成逼真、准确和高质量的输出。与以前的超分辨率方法相比，我们的方法很简单并且性能非常好（FID 分数提高了 8 倍）。我们还将我们的模型扩展到人脸视频压缩，并表明我们在比特/像素方面比之前最先进的技术获得了 3.5 倍的改进。我们网络的结果通过广泛的消融实验（在论文和补充材料中）进行了彻底分析。我们还在我们的网站上提供演示视频以及代码和模型：\url{http://cvit.iiit.ac.in/research/projects/cvit-projects/talking-face-video-upsampling}。 本文提出了一种基于音频-视觉先验的极端尺度 talking-face 视频超分辨率方法，将8×8像素的低分辨率视频重建为256×256像素的高质量视频。 Sindhu B Hegde,Rudrabha Mukhopadhyay,Vinay P Namboodiri,C. V. Jawahar cs.CV

authors_text: Zican Hu,Wurui Shi,Hongkun Liu,Xueyun Chen
title: Road detection via a dual-task network based on cross-layer graph fusion modules
title_zh: 基于跨层图融合模块的双任务网络的道路检测
abstract: Road detection based on remote sensing images is of great significance to intelligent traffic management. The performances of the mainstream road detection methods are mainly determined by their extracted features, whose richness and robustness can be enhanced by fusing features of different types and cross-layer connections. However, the features in the existing mainstream model frameworks are often similar in the same layer by the single-task training, and the traditional cross-layer fusion ways are too simple to obtain an efficient effect, so more complex fusion ways besides concatenation and addition deserve to be explored. Aiming at the above defects, we propose a dual-task network (DTnet) for road detection and cross-layer graph fusion module (CGM): the DTnet consists of two parallel branches for road area and edge detection, respectively, while enhancing the feature diversity by fusing features between two branches through our designed feature bridge modules (FBM). The CGM improves the cross-layer fusion effect by a complex feature stream graph, and four graph patterns are evaluated. Experimental results on three public datasets demonstrate that our method effectively improves the final detection result.
summary: Road detection based on remote sensing images is of great significance to intelligent traffic management. The performances of the mainstream road detection methods are mainly determined by their extracted features, whose richness and robustness can be enhanced by fusing features of different types and cross-layer connections. However, the features in the existing mainstream model frameworks are often similar in the same layer by the single-task training, and the traditional cross-layer fusion ways are too simple to obtain an efficient effect, so more complex fusion ways besides concatenation and addition deserve to be explored. Aiming at the above defects, we propose a dual-task network (DTnet) for road detection and cross-layer graph fusion module (CGM): the DTnet consists of two parallel branches for road area and edge detection, respectively, while enhancing the feature diversity by fusing features between two branches through our designed feature bridge modules (FBM). The CGM improves the cross-layer fusion effect by a complex feature stream graph, and four graph patterns are evaluated. Experimental results on three public datasets demonstrate that our method effectively improves the final detection result.
abstract_zh: 基于遥感图像的道路检测对于智能交通管理具有重要意义。主流道路检测方法的性能主要取决于其提取的特征，可以通过融合不同类型的特征和跨层连接来增强特征的丰富性和鲁棒性。然而，现有主流模型框架中的特征往往通过单任务训练而在同一层中相似，传统的跨层融合方式过于简单而无法获得高效的效果，因此除了串联和加法之外更复杂的融合方式值得探索。针对上述缺陷，我们提出了一种用于道路检测和跨层图融合模块（CGM）的双任务网络（DTnet）：DTnet由两个并行分支组成，分别用于道路区域和边缘检测，同时通过我们设计的特征桥模块（FBM）融合两个分支之间的特征来增强特征多样性。 CGM通过复杂的特征流图提高跨层融合效果，并对四种图模式进行评估。在三个公共数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法有效地提高了最终的检测结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于跨层图融合模块的双任务网络（DTnet），用于改进遥感图像中的道路检测。
AI.motivation: 现有主流道路检测方法因单任务训练导致同层特征相似性过高，且传统跨层融合方式过于简单，难以有效提升特征多样性和鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计双任务网络（DTnet），包含道路区域和边缘检测两个并行分支，并通过特征桥模块（FBM）进行跨分支特征融合；提出跨层图融合模块（CGM），利用复杂特征流图及四种图模式增强跨层融合效果。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上的实验表明，该方法有效提升了道路检测的最终结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过双任务结构和跨层图融合模块，本文方法在特征多样性和融合效率上优于现有主流模型。

authors_text: Jihyeon Hyeong,Jayoung Kim,Noseong Park,Sushil Jajodia
title: An Empirical Study on the Membership Inference Attack against Tabular Data Synthesis Models
title_zh: 针对表格数据综合模型的成员推理攻击实证研究
abstract: Tabular data typically contains private and important information; thus, precautions must be taken before they are shared with others. Although several methods (e.g., differential privacy and k-anonymity) have been proposed to prevent information leakage, in recent years, tabular data synthesis models have become popular because they can well trade-off between data utility and privacy. However, recent research has shown that generative models for image data are susceptible to the membership inference attack, which can determine whether a given record was used to train a victim synthesis model. In this paper, we investigate the membership inference attack in the context of tabular data synthesis. We conduct experiments on 4 state-of-the-art tabular data synthesis models under two attack scenarios (i.e., one black-box and one white-box attack), and find that the membership inference attack can seriously jeopardize these models. We next conduct experiments to evaluate how well two popular differentially-private deep learning training algorithms, DP-SGD and DP-GAN, can protect the models against the attack. Our key finding is that both algorithms can largely alleviate this threat by sacrificing the generation quality.
summary: Tabular data typically contains private and important information; thus, precautions must be taken before they are shared with others. Although several methods (e.g., differential privacy and k-anonymity) have been proposed to prevent information leakage, in recent years, tabular data synthesis models have become popular because they can well trade-off between data utility and privacy. However, recent research has shown that generative models for image data are susceptible to the membership inference attack, which can determine whether a given record was used to train a victim synthesis model. In this paper, we investigate the membership inference attack in the context of tabular data synthesis. We conduct experiments on 4 state-of-the-art tabular data synthesis models under two attack scenarios (i.e., one black-box and one white-box attack), and find that the membership inference attack can seriously jeopardize these models. We next conduct experiments to evaluate how well two popular differentially-private deep learning training algorithms, DP-SGD and DP-GAN, can protect the models against the attack. Our key finding is that both algorithms can largely alleviate this threat by sacrificing the generation quality.
abstract_zh: 表格数据通常包含私人和重要信息；因此，在与他人分享之前必须采取预防措施。尽管已经提出了几种方法（例如差分隐私和k-匿名）来防止信息泄露，但近年来，表格数据合成模型变得流行，因为它们可以很好地在数据效用和隐私之间进行权衡。然而，最近的研究表明，图像数据的生成模型容易受到成员推理攻击，该攻击可以确定给定的记录是否用于训练受害者合成模型。在本文中，我们研究了表格数据合成背景下的成员推理攻击。我们在两种攻击场景（即一种黑盒攻击和一种白盒攻击）下对 4 个最先进的表格数据合成模型进行了实验，发现成员推理攻击会严重危害这些模型。接下来，我们进行实验来评估两种流行的差分隐私深度学习训练算法 DP-SGD 和 DP-GAN 能够在多大程度上保护模型免受攻击。我们的主要发现是，两种算法都可以通过牺牲生成质量来很大程度上减轻这种威胁。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了针对表格数据合成模型的成员推理攻击，并评估了两种差分隐私算法在缓解该攻击方面的效果。
AI.motivation: 表格数据通常包含敏感信息，因此在共享之前需要采取预防措施。尽管已有多种隐私保护方法，但近期研究表明生成模型可能受到成员推理攻击的威胁，因此需要研究表格数据合成模型是否也存在此问题。
AI.method: 作者在两种攻击场景（黑盒和白盒）下，对四种先进的表格数据合成模型进行了实验，并测试了差分隐私算法DP-SGD和DP-GAN在保护模型免受攻击方面的效果。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，成员推理攻击对这些模型构成了严重威胁，而DP-SGD和DP-GAN算法可以显著缓解这种威胁，但会牺牲生成数据的质量。
AI.conclusion: 差分隐私算法能够在一定程度上缓解成员推理攻击对表格数据合成模型的威胁，但需要在隐私保护和数据生成质量之间进行权衡。

authors_text: Hyounguk Shon,Janghyeon Lee,Seung Hwan Kim,Junmo Kim
title: DLCFT: Deep Linear Continual Fine-Tuning for General Incremental Learning
title_zh: DLCFT：用于一般增量学习的深度线性持续微调
abstract: Pre-trained representation is one of the key elements in the success of modern deep learning. However, existing works on continual learning methods have mostly focused on learning models incrementally from scratch. In this paper, we explore an alternative framework to incremental learning where we continually fine-tune the model from a pre-trained representation. Our method takes advantage of linearization technique of a pre-trained neural network for simple and effective continual learning. We show that this allows us to design a linear model where quadratic parameter regularization method is placed as the optimal continual learning policy, and at the same time enjoying the high performance of neural networks. We also show that the proposed algorithm enables parameter regularization methods to be applied to class-incremental problems. Additionally, we provide a theoretical reason why the existing parameter-space regularization algorithms such as EWC underperform on neural networks trained with cross-entropy loss. We show that the proposed method can prevent forgetting while achieving high continual fine-tuning performance on image classification tasks. To show that our method can be applied to general continual learning settings, we evaluate our method in data-incremental, task-incremental, and class-incremental learning problems.
summary: Pre-trained representation is one of the key elements in the success of modern deep learning. However, existing works on continual learning methods have mostly focused on learning models incrementally from scratch. In this paper, we explore an alternative framework to incremental learning where we continually fine-tune the model from a pre-trained representation. Our method takes advantage of linearization technique of a pre-trained neural network for simple and effective continual learning. We show that this allows us to design a linear model where quadratic parameter regularization method is placed as the optimal continual learning policy, and at the same time enjoying the high performance of neural networks. We also show that the proposed algorithm enables parameter regularization methods to be applied to class-incremental problems. Additionally, we provide a theoretical reason why the existing parameter-space regularization algorithms such as EWC underperform on neural networks trained with cross-entropy loss. We show that the proposed method can prevent forgetting while achieving high continual fine-tuning performance on image classification tasks. To show that our method can be applied to general continual learning settings, we evaluate our method in data-incremental, task-incremental, and class-incremental learning problems.
abstract_zh: 预训练表示是现代深度学习成功的关键要素之一。然而，现有的持续学习方法的工作主要集中在从头开始增量学习模型。在本文中，我们探索了增量学习的替代框架，在该框架中，我们根据预先训练的表示不断微调模型。我们的方法利用预训练神经网络的线性化技术来实现简单有效的持续学习。我们表明，这使我们能够设计一个线性模型，其中二次参数正则化方法被放置为最佳持续学习策略，同时享受神经网络的高性能。我们还表明，所提出的算法使得参数正则化方法能够应用于类增量问题。此外，我们还提供了现有参数空间正则化算法（例如 EWC）在使用交叉熵损失训练的神经网络上表现不佳的理论原因。我们表明，所提出的方法可以防止遗忘，同时在图像分类任务上实现高连续微调性能。为了表明我们的方法可以应用于一般的持续学习环境，我们在数据增量、任务增量和类增量学习问题中评估了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DLCFT框架，通过持续微调预训练模型实现通用增量学习，结合线性化技术和参数正则化方法防止遗忘。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习方法多从头训练模型，未能充分利用预训练表示的优势，且参数正则化方法在神经网络中效果有限。
AI.method: 采用预训练网络线性化技术构建线性模型，应用二次参数正则化作为最优策略，并扩展参数正则化至类别增量问题。
AI.result: 方法在图像分类任务中有效防止遗忘，同时在数据增量、任务增量和类别增量场景中均表现优异。
AI.conclusion: DLCFT通过线性化与正则化结合，在通用增量学习中实现高性能，理论分析揭示了现有方法如EWC的局限性。

However, existing works on continual learning methods have mostly focused on learning models incrementally from scratch. In this paper, we explore an alternative framework to incremental learning where we continually fine-tune the model from a pre-trained representation. Our method takes advantage of linearization technique of a pre-trained neural network for simple and effective continual learning. We show that this allows us to design a linear model where quadratic parameter regularization method is placed as the optimal continual learning policy, and at the same time enjoying the high performance of neural networks. We also show that the proposed algorithm enables parameter regularization methods to be applied to class-incremental problems. Additionally, we provide a theoretical reason why the existing parameter-space regularization algorithms such as EWC underperform on neural networks trained with cross-entropy loss. We show that the proposed method can prevent forgetting while achieving high continual fine-tuning performance on image classification tasks.
